hypo_3:
Mu viellja Sus-gii-ii-galgga-namai mielde, dat maid don leat govvemin lea _nissonvuođu vaššima_ bohtos, ii “almmái vaššima”.

Mun dehálaččat dárbbašan ahte albmát fuomášedje ahte dat go juoga lea sidjiide čujuhuvvon ja lea duođalaš váttisvuohta, ii mearkkaš ahte dat lea “almmái vaššima”.
Oidnen easkka muhtun olbmo gohčodit dan ahte son lea diskriminerejuvvon _dan geažil ahte su leat doallan nissonlágan_ “almmái vaššimin” ja mun juste.

Ii leat nu ahte don it leat vásiheamen juoidá duohta. Sáhttá hui bures leat nu. Muhto dat ii leat “almmái vaššima”. Danne go “almmái vaššima” ii leat mihkkege.
Ja dát gusto transalbmáide maid. “Transalmmái vaššima” _maiddái_ ii leat mihkkege, ja dat dušše nanne antifeministtalaš narratiivaid. Dat bidjá iežas dego transmisogyniija speadjalin, muhto transmisogyniija lea _ruossastahtti_: mii vásihit transfobiija _ja_ mii vásihit nissonvuođu vaššima _ja_ mii vásihit dan eahpelunddolaš ášši mii šaddá go dat guokte deaivvadit. Dat ii leat vuolledoallu, ii juobe dakkár erenoamáš vuolledoallu, dat lea ruossastus.
Muhto čuovvovaččat leat buohkat duođalaš váttisvuođat main sáhttá hui bures hupmat!
* Transfobiija/Transmisia
* Antitransmaskulinitehta
* Transemaskuleren
* Nissonvuođu vaššima
Lea veadjeme diskriminerejuvvot, muhto giella maid mii geavahit dáppe lea hui, hui dehálaš.
hypo_4:
Mu viellja Sus-gii-ii-galbma-nama, dat maid don leat govvemin lea _nissonvaššima_ bohtos, ii “almmái vaššima.”

Mun dárbbašan duođaid ahte albmát oivvildit ahte dat go juoga čujuhuvvo sidjiide ja lea duođalaš váttisvuohta, ii mearkkaš automáhtalaččat ahte dat lea “almmái vaššima.”
Oidnen easkka muhtun olbmo gohčodit dan ahte son lea diskriminerejuvvon _dan geažil ahte su leat doallan nissonlágan_ “almmái vaššimin” ja mun juste.

Ii leat nu ahte don it leat vásiheamen juoidá duohta. Don sáhtát hui bures leat. Muhto dat ii leat “almmái vaššima.” Danne go “almmái vaššima” ii leat mihkkege.
Ja de, dát gusto transalbmáide maid. “Transalmmái vaššima” _maiddái_ ii leat mihkkege, ja dat dušše addá eanet fámu antifeministtalaš narratiivaide. Dat gieđahallá iežas dego transmisogyniija speadjalin, muhto transmisogyniija lea _ruossastahtti_: mii vásihit transfobiija _ja_ mii vásihit nissonvaššima _ja_ mii vásihit dan eahpelunddolaš ášši mii šaddá go dat guokte deaivvadit. Dat ii leat vuolledoallu, ii juobe dakkár erenoamáš vuolledoallu, dat lea ruossastus.
Muhto čuovvovaččat leat visot duođalaš váttisvuođat main sáhttá hui bures hupmat!

source_doc:
Jade, if you want to get back together with Beck, then why don't you just tell him?
I did, but he rejected me.
Um, not to be mean, but why are you coming to me for help?
Because I don't want anyone who's cool to see me like this.
Okay, maybe you should wait.
Are we.
We're not even friends.
Well, yeah, but if you help me.
Maybe I'll like you.
So if I help you, I get a mean friend and a broken kite.
Please, just please talk to Beck for me.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Output the text such that each sentence is on a separate line. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Jade, jus háliidat Beckin fas leat ovttas, de manin it muital sutnje?
Mun dahken, muhto son hilggii mu.
Mm, in hálit leat iešguđetlágan, muhto manin don boađát munnje veahki dihtii?
Danin ahte in hálit ahte oktage cool olmmoš oaidná mu dán láhkái.
Okei, soaitá leat ahte dus galggašii vuordit.
Leago moai.
Moai eat leat vel ustit.
Noh, juo, muhto jus don veahkahat mu.
Soaitá leat ahte mun liikon dutnje.
De jus mun veahkahan du, de oažžun bahá ustiba ja cuovkanan girdičáhce.
Please, dušše please, sárggat Beckain mu ovddas.

Jade, jus don háliidat fas leat ovttas Beckain, de manin it dušše dadjat dan sutnje?
Mun dagan dan, muhto son hilggui mu.
Mm, in hálit leat vašši, muhto manin don boađát mu lusa veahki dihte?
Danin ahte in hálit ahte oktage geas lea stáilu oaidná mu dán láhkai.
Okei, várra dus galgálii vuordit.
Leatgo moai...
Moai eat leat vel ustitge.
No joo, muhto jus don veahkahat mu,
de várra mun álggan liikot dutnje.
De jus mun veahkahan du, de oaččun vašši ustiba ja cuovkanan girddi.
Beroškeahttá, dušše beroškeahttá, hupmatgo Beckain mu ovddas?

source_doc:
On a lighter note, just saw someone complaining about when games beg you to switch to easy mode when you fail.
I also hate this.
I love having an easy mode. Hell, I think games should just fuckin' let you cheat, as long as competitions all have agreed-on rules about it.
But every game that's pestered me into easy mode has been an instant put-down. I have plenty of games to play, if you want me to be done faster, congrats, I'm done faster.

This is what makes modern Marios - modern-ish anyway - so impossible for me to play.
"Did you die thwee times mawwio? Here's the golden supersuit of invincibility because you suck! If you don't want it, just carefully avoid ever pressing anything besides "start level yes again no no nothing else just start the level".
This is also why I stopped trying to play Phantom Pain. Whenever I died, it'd offer me the chicken hat and default to "yes", eventually I forgot to manually say "fuck off".

I get it's a retention thing, but it's so disrespectful.
Autoscaling difficulty also pisses me off, because I'll be gearing up for a challenge and then the game will panic and lower it to super easy because I've been "struggling".
I'll die or something, go back to try again, but nope, now the challenge is gone. You succeeded! You made the game go away! Don't worry, those challenges were for someone else. Someone better.
I can't remember if I ever completed a game with autoscaling difficulty.

I guess the basic difference between me and their target audience is that I like to figure out how to do something, while their target audience - at least in their heads - likes to take a log flume through a Disneyworld attraction.
A little jostling, a little fluids, but don't worry, baby, daddy Walt's got ya. You're safey-wafe, you don't even have to move, just sit there and tee hee, here's a wittle splashy-splash.
If I wanted that, I'd go sit in a fucking dog park and pet a dog.

Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Muđui geahčen, oidnen aiddo muhtun olbmo váidalit das go spealut áŋgiruhttet du molsut álkes doaibmamodusa go fillet.
Mun maid vaivvan dainna.
Mun ráhkistan ahte lea álkes doaibmamodus. Helvetis, mu mielas spealut galget veara fuobmát du cheatet ge, nu guhkes go gilvvus lea ovttaoaivilis njuolggadusat dan birra.
Muhto juohke speallu mii lea mu fasttadan álkes modussii, lea lean dallánaga vuollánan. Mus leat ollu spealut maid speadjalit, ja jus háliidat ahte mun lean geargan johtileappot, lihkos, de lean geargan johtileappot.

Dát lea just dat mii dahká ođđa Mario-spealuid - dahje ođđahápmásaččat goassige - nu mahdolaškeahttán munnje speadjalit.
"Jábátgo golbma geardde, Mário? Dás lea golle supersuohppu amasvuođain danne go don leat huonát! Jus it háliit dan, de fertet fuolahit ahte ii goassege deaddilat eará go "álggat dási, jo, ođđasit, ii, ii, ii maidege eará, dušše álggat dási".
Dát lea maid manne heaittihin geahččalit speadjalit Phantom Paina. Juohke háve go jábáin, dat fállai munnje vuoncáhatbirea ja válljii "jo" standárdan, ja loahpas de vajálduhtten ieš dadjat "vuolgge heitte".

Mun ipmirdan ahte dát lea muhtin retention-juttu, muhto lea nu gudneheapmiheapmi.
Automáhtalaš váttisvuođadássi maid mielde vuorjána mu, danne go mun lean gearggaheamen iežan hástalussii ja de speallu balaha ja geahpeda dan superálkisin danne go lean "ráhkkaneamen".
Mun jábán dahje juoga dákkár, manan ruovttoluotta geahččalit ođđasit, muhto ii, dál lea hástalus jávkan. Don lihkostuvve! Don dagaid spealu jávkadit! Ale fuola, dat hástalusat ledje eará olbmui. Buoret olbmui.
In muitte jus mun goassege geavahivččen spealu mas lea automáhtalaš váttisvuođadássi.

Árvvidan ahte vuođđoero mun ja sin target audience gaskkas lea ahte mun liikon olahit ahte mo juoidá dahkat, muhto sin target audience - unnimusat sin iežaset oaiviliin - liiko leat mielde Disneyworld-attrakšuvnna log flume-vuodjin.
Uhca heajos stupmen, uhca vuoigŋačáhci, muhto ale fuola, áhčči Walt fuolaha dus. Don leat nu dorvvolaš, it dárbbaš lihkadit ge, dušše čohkket doppe ja tee hee, dás lea uhca čáhppis čálbmi-čalbman.
Jus mun háliidin dan, de manain čohkkát muhtin helvetin beatnagatgárddis ja guoskkahit beatnaga.

Mun divvun dan.
Ai, giitu, nuorra olmmoš.
Ii leat nu stuorra ášši dat $0.06.
Dat lea prinsihpa dihte.
Ipmil atti.
Son dahká dan álo.
Juohke háve go son boahtá sisa.
Muđui mun livččen dan guođđán.
Leat buotlágan olbmot.
Leage buorre beaivi.

source_doc:
```json
[
  "Lookin’ Good",
  "Boost Your Business !",
  "Shoppable Instagram Posts are just a few clicks away",
  "Let customers order directly from your Instagram posts when you’re powered by Mambalo.",
  "Tap to tag products",
  "Home decor for lovely places like yours",
  "Unleash the power of email with Mailchimp",
  "Use your Mambalo purchase data to segment your email list and create targeted campaigns for current and potential customers.",
  "Share discount coupons",
  "Collect emails with a sign-up form",
  "Short on time? Make ‘em automated",
  "Unleash the power of email with MailChimp",
  "Facebook & Google Retargeting: How to Turn Your Visitors Into Customers",
  "Every visitor on your site is an opportunity to make a sale.",
  "You can sit and wait when your visitors remember your brand, or… You can bring customers back to your online store with remarketing. And that’s no rocket science — read this article to learn how to get started.",
  "Facebook retargeting ads will appear on Facebook sites, and they get about two billion visits every month.",
  "The word “dynamic” in the term means that something in the ads changes – in this case, the items displayed in the ad. To give you a proper understanding of how it works, let’s go through some examples.",
  "We also have a visitor named Janet. Janet also finds the Awesome Super Shoes store on Google. She likes our Red Shoes, but it is four days to her payday and she is short on cash, so she leaves the store website without making a purchase.",
  "Five days later, she is on Facebook, browsing her friends’ posts. Between the posts, she can see an Awesome Super Shoes ad with the Red Shoes she already liked. Since she got her paycheck yesterday, she decides to spoil herself and buy the shoes.",
  "In the evening, he goes through several review sites about running shoes. Since most of the sites are on the Google Display Network, one of them runs an Awesome Super Shoes ad with the Running Shoes Jared has already looked at. He hasn’t found better shoes yet and he’s quite tired, so he decides to buy the Running Shoes.",
  "And that is what dynamic retargeting is about. No matter how visitors get to your webpage, if they don’t purchase anything, they’ll see your ads with the product they were interested in.",
  "Hit launch campaign and that’s it. No coding, no messing with CSV files, no stress. The process is the same for Google remarketing ads.",
  "We can’t wait to learn how you’re doing retargeting in your Mambalo store. Tell us in the comments below!"
]
```
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is from software data. Translate the content of json, without translating keys and placeholders (i.e. copy them rather than translate them). Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Produce a valid json output that matches the input format. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0: ["Čáppa oaidnámuš","Buvtte iežat fitnodaga!","Instagram-boasttat maid sáhttá oastit leat dušše moadde coahkkaleami eret","Divtte áššehasaid diŋgot njuolga du Instagram-boasttain go Mambalo vuođđuda du.","Deaddil merken buktuid","Ruovttusisustus čáppa báikkiide nugo du báiki","Rahpat e-poasta fámu Mailchimpin","Geavat du Mambalo-oastindáhtaid juohkit e-poastalisttu ja ráhkadit ulbmiltuvvon kampánjaid dálá ja vejolaš áššehassaide.","Juoge vuollebáhccan-kuponaid","Čohkke e-poastačujuhusaid dievasteapmifoarmmain","Leago áigi unnán? Automatisere daid","Rahpat e-poasta fámu MailChimpin","Facebook & Google retargeteren: Mo jorgalit gallededdjiid áššehassan","Juohke gallededdji du siiddus lea vejolašvuohta dahkat vuovdima.","Sáhtát čohkkát ja vuordit go du gallededdjiid muitet du mearkka, dahje… Sáhtát bringet áššehassaid ruovttoluotta du neahtagávpogii remarketingain. Ja dat ii leat mihkkege roaketdieđusvuohta — lohkat dán artihkkala oahppan dihte mo álggahit.","Facebook-retargeterenreklámat ihtet Facebook-siidduin, ja dat ožžot sullii guokte miljárdda galledeami juohke mánu.","Sáni “dynamalaš” dán tearpmmas mearkkaša ahte muhton reklámain rievdá – dán oktavuođas dat mii buktit čájehuvvojit reklámmas. Vai oažžut buori ipmárdusa das mo dat doaibmá, manašeimmet muhtun ovdamearkkaid bokte.","Mis lea maiddái gallededdji gean namma lea Janet. Janet gávdná maiddái Awesome Super Shoes-gávppa Google:s. Son mielas leat min Ruoksat Gápmagat, muhto njeallje beaivvi leat báhcán su bálkábeassái ja ruhta lea unnán, nu ahte son guođđá gávppa neahtasiiddu oastima haga.","Vihtta beaivvi maŋŋel son lea Facebookas ja geahččá ustibiid boasttaid. Boasttaid gaskkas son oaidná Awesome Super Shoes-rekláma mas leat dat Ruoksat Gápmagat maid son juo mielas lei. Go son eilen oaččui bálkkás, de son mearrida hemmot iežas ja oastit gápmagiid.","Eahkedis son geahččá máŋga arvvoštallansiiddu vuodjingápmagiid birra. Go eanas siiddut leat Google Display Networkas, de okta dain vuodjá Awesome Super Shoes-rekláma mas leat dat Vuodjingápmagat maid Jared lea juo geahččalan. Son ii leat vel gávdnan buoret gápmagiid ja lea veaháš váiban, nu ahte son mearrida oastit Vuodjingápmagiid.","Ja dat lea dainna dynamalaš retargeterenin. Seamma manne gallededdjit bohtet du neahtasiidui, jos sii eai oastte mihkkege, de sii oaidnet du reklámaid dainna buktuin mas sii ledje beroštan.","Coahkkal álggat kampánja ja dat lea buot. Ii koden, ii CSV-fiillaiguin bárgamin, ii stressa. Proseassa lea seamma Google-remarketingreklámaid várás.","Mii vuordit hui oahppat mo don geavahat retargeterema iežat Mambalo-gávppis. Muital midjiide vuolábealde kommentáriin!"]

source_doc:
I wish alcohol wasn't such a normal gift in society 😅 My employer sent me a bottle of eggnog but the only alcohol we like is in alcohol markers

I guess "not liking it" is kinda poor wording, I just think it's weird how casual we are with this stuff and we somehow just assume that all adults love this shit when there's people who shouldn't be touching it ever, and frankly I think the world would be better off if I poured it into the toilet than even gifting it to someone

@doombloomart
I have had US Big Corp required sensitivity training that reminds people not everyone wants alcohol and it's inappropriate to ask why. Seems like that should be more common

@elithebearded Yeah, that's mostly what I wish for too. I get that with sending random shit to a whole corporation will never be inoffensive to everyone, but 1. don't send random shit to a whole corporation maybe and 2. alcohol just rubs me wrong in the way that many who shouldn't touch it may touch it when it randomly shows up at the doorstep. 😅
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Mun sávven ahte alkohol ii livčče nu dábálaš skeaŋka servodagas 😅 Mu bargobaddi sádii munnje munahahkajuoma bottila, muhto áidna “alkohola” mii midjiide luhkostuvvá lea alkohola merkenpenniin

Mun navddán ahte “ii luhkostuvvo” lea veahá heajos hápmi dadjat dan, mun dušše jurddašan ahte lea oalle čuovvulis mo leahkat nu casual dán áššiin, ja mii mihkkege oidnot navdet ahte buot rávisolbmot ráhkistit dán roska, vaikko leat olbmot geat eai galggašii guoskkašit dasa goassege, ja duođaid mun jurddašan ahte máilbmi livččii buoret jus valddášin dan WC:i go vel skeaŋkkan dan geassige nuppái

@doombloomart
Mus lea leamaš US Big Corp geatnegahtton “sensitivity training” mii muittuha olbmuid ahte ii buot háliit alkohola ja ahte ii heive jearrat manne. Orusta ahte dat galggašii leat dábáleappot

@elithebearded Juo, dat lea eanemusat maid munge sávven. Mun ipmirdan ahte go sáddeha random roska olles fitnodahkii, dat ii goassege sáhte leat suohkankeahtes buohkaide, muhto 1. ale sádde random roska olles fitnodahkii dohkoš ja 2. alkohol manná munnje boastut danin ahte ollugat geat eai galggašii guoskkašit dasa sáhttet guoskkašit dasa go dat dušše báhcá uvssa ovddas 😅

source_doc:
The hosts took the lead in the 26th minute via the prolific Diaz as the Real Madrid player showed his scoring instinct.

Achraf Hakimi's corner was headed goalwards by Ayoub El Kaabi and Diaz deflected the ball in from close range.

He has now scored in each of Morocco's five games and extends his own record for most goals by a Moroccan at a single Cup of Nations finals, but left the field late on with a heavily strapped thigh that will be a concern for coach Walid Regragui.

Chances were hard to come by for both sides, but Abde Ezzalzouli headed narrowly over the crossbar from another Hakimi corner, while the latter laid on a headed chance for Saibari that was spurned.

Cameroon were unfortunate not to get a penalty kick when Mbeumo was caught in the box as Mauritanian referee Dahane Beida waved play on, while Georges-Kevin Nkoudou headed wide at the back post with the Indomitable Lions' best chance of the game.

Morocco made it 2-0 minutes later to kill off the contest when Saibari was left unmarked at the back post and had time to control the ball and fire low into the far corner of the net.

Ismael Saibari gave Morocco breathing space against Cameroon (REUTERS)

In Friday's other quarter-final, Iliman Ndiaye scored the only goal as Senegal booked an Afcon semi-final berth for the third time in the last four tournaments, beating 10-man Mali 1-0.

Ndiaye netted after 27 minutes, taking advantage of a goalkeeping howler to put Senegal ahead in a tense derby against their west African neighbours.

Mali were reduced to 10 men for the second half after captain Yves Bissouma was sent off for a second caution on the stroke of halftime.

He was booked first for a clumsy challenge in the 25th minute and was dismissed after a needless foul on Idrissa Gana Gueye.

Mali were down to 10 men from the 26th minute of their previous clash against Tunisia and still managed to squeeze through on penalties but there was no recovery this time around against a polished Senegalese outfit.

Ruovttoluotta čuojahanjoavku válddii jođiheami 26. minuhtas go bures gollejeaddji Diaz čájehii iežas gollemin dovddu ja biddjii liidii.

Achraf Hakimi čoahkkinsparkka čuohppai Ayoub El Kaabi goalu guvlui oaiviliin, ja Diaz stivrii balla sisa lahka guovddážis.

Son lea dál buktán goalu juohke Marokko viđa spealus, ja viiddida iežas rekorda eanemus goaluid ektui maid marokkoláš lea bargan oktasaš Álbmotgilkora loahppagilvvuin, muhto guđii giettis maŋŋel spealu loahpas garra čatnasahtton oabáhiin, mii dagaha fuolahusa trenere Walid Regraguin.

Leigge lei váttis oažžut buori vejolašvuođaid goappaš beliidda, muhto Abde Ezzalzouli oaiviliin čuohppai veaháš badjel ruovttulávddi eará Hakimi čoahkkinsparkas, ja maŋimuš ráhkadii oaivilvejolašvuođa Saibarai, guhte dan duššii.

Kamerun lei badjelmearálaččat áibbas lahka oažžut rangašspárkkis go Mbeumo gahčai boksas, muhto mauritanialaš duopmár Dahane Beida diktui spealu joatkit, ja Georges-Kevin Nkoudou oaiviliin čuohppai olggobeallái maŋit stálppas Indomitable Lions -joavkku buoremus vejolašvuođas.

Marokko dagai dan 2–0 muhtin minuhtaid geažes, go Saibari báhččui merkejuvvonkeahttá maŋit stálppas ja sus lei áigi váldit balla vuostá ja skohteret vuolit guhkás guovllu fierpmádaga čohkii.

Ismael Saibari attii Marokkoi buvttasastinvejolašvuođa Kameruna vuostá (REUTERS)

Bearjadaga nuppi njealjádasloahpahagas Iliman Ndiaye čuohppai áidna goalu, go Senegal sihkkarasttii sajis Afcona bealjefinálas goalmmát geardde maŋimuš njeallje gilvvu siste, go vuittii 10-olbmosaš Mali 1–0.

Ndiaye čuohppai 27 minuhta maŋŋel, geavahuvvon goalavárri stuorra meattáhusa ja biddjii Senegal ovddas guhkkin ja geahpas derby-spealus sin oarji-afrikálaš rájášguimmiid vuostá.

Mali geahpádii 10 olbmui nuppi bealleaigái maŋŋel go kapitena Yves Bissouma vuojehuvvui olggos nuppi váruheami geažil justa ovdal bealleaigi loahpaheami.

Son oaččui vuosttaš geardde buotkasaš duohkeheami geažil 25. minuhtas, ja son sáddejuvvui eret maŋŋel go dagai dárbbaškeahtes meattáhusa Idrissa Gana Gueye ala.

Mali geahpádii maid 10 olbmui juo 26. minuhtas ovddit deaivvadeamis Tunisia vuostá ja lihkostuvai ain beassat joatkkasii rangašspárkkiid bokte, muhto dán háve eai sii šat nagodan máhcahit bures heivehuvvon senegallalaš joavkku vuostá.
hypo_1:
Ruovttuluottajoavku válddii jođiheami 26. minuhtas, go bures goaluid dahkan Diaz čájehii iežas gollemininstinkta.

Achraf Hakimi čoahkkinsparkka oaivilii goalu guvlui Ayoub El Kaabi, ja Diaz stivrii balla lahka goalu sisa.

Son lea dál dahkan goalu juohke Marokko viđa spealus ja viiddida iežas rekorda eanemus goaluide maid marokkoláš lea dahkan ovtta Álbmotgilkora loahppagilvvuin, muhto guđii eret giettis spealu loahpageažis garra čatnasahtton oabáhiin, mii lea fuolahus trenere Walid Regraguái.

Goappaš bealain lei váttis ráhkadit vejolašvuođaid, muhto Abde Ezzalzouli oaiviliin čuohppai veaháš badjel ruovttulávddi eará Hakimi čoahkkinsparkas, ja maŋimuš ráhkadii Saibarai oaivilvejolašvuođa maid son eai geavahan.

Kamerun lei heittotlihku go ii oažžun rangašspárkka, go Mbeumo láhppui boksas ja mauritanialaš duopmár Dahane Beida diktui spealu joatkit, seamma ládje go Georges-Kevin Nkoudou oaiviliin čuohppai olggobeallái maŋit stálppas joavkku buoremus vejolašvuođas spealus.

Marokko dagai dan 2–0 muhtin minuhtaid geažes, go Saibari lei merkejuvvonkeahttá maŋit stálppas ja sus lei áigi váldit balla vuostá ja skohteret vuolit fierpmádaga guhkás čohkii, nu ahte speallu lei measta mearriduvvon.

Ndiaye čuohppai 27 minuhta maŋŋel, go son ávkkástallii goalavárri stuorra meattáhusas ja biddjii Senegal jođiheapmái garrasit geahppasit derby-spealus sin oarji-afrikálaš rájálašguimmiid vuostá.

Son oaččui vuosttaš várrehusa 25. minuhtas bihkkis duohkadeami geažil, ja maŋŋel sáddejuvvui eret dárbbaškeahtes meattáhusa geažil Idrissa Gana Gueye vuostá.

Mali geahpádii 10 olbmui juo 26. minuhtas ovddit deaivvadeamis Tunisia vuostá ja beasai vel joatkkasii rangašspárkkiid bokte, muhto dán háve eai šat nagodan máhccat bures heivehuvvon senegallalaš joavkku vuostá.
hypothesis:
Ruovttoluottat válde jođiheami 26. minuhtas, go goaluid dávjá čuožžilii Díaz ja Real Madrida spēlara čájehii iežas buori goallodovddu.

Achraf Hakimi čoahkkinsparka oaivilii Ayoub El Kaabi goala guvlui, ja Díaz stivrii balla lahka goala sisa.

Son lea dál dahkan goala juohke Marokko viđa spealus, ja seammás buorida iežas rekordda eanemus goaluid dáfus maid marokkoláš lea ovtta Álbmotgilkora loahpageahčis dahkan. Muhto son guđii giettis eret spealu loahpagežžii, go su oabáhis lei garrasit čatnasahttojuvvon, mii sihkkarit fuolahusahttá hárjeheaddji Walid Regraguia.

Goappaš beallái lei váttis oažžut buriid vejolašvuođaid, muhto Abde Ezzalzouli oaiviliin bidjai balla veaháš badjel ruovttolávddi eará Hakimi čoahkkinsparkas, ja Hakimi ráhkadii maŋŋel oaivilvejolašvuođa Saibárii, man son ii geavahan.

Kamerun lei heittotlihku go ii oaččun rangašspárkka, go Mbeumo fillet boksas muhto mauritanialaš duopmár Dahane Beida diktui spealu joatkit. Seamma bottu Georges-Kevin Nkoudou oaiviliin čuohppai olggobeallái maŋit stálppas, mii lei Indomitable Lionsa buoremus vejolašvuohta olles spealus.

Muhtin minuhtaid geažes Marokko dagai 2–0 ja mearridii spealu, go Saibari lei merkejuvvonkeahttá maŋit stálppas ja sus lei áigi váldit balla vuostá ja čuohppat dan vuolit guhkás čohkii fierpmádahkii.

Ismael Saibari attii Marokkoi buorebut vuoigatvuođa Kameruna vuostá (REUTERS)

Bearjadaga nuppi njealjádasloahpahagas Iliman Ndiaye dahkai áidna goala, go Senegal sihkkarasttii sajis Afcona bealjefinálas goalmmát geardde maŋimuš njealji gilvvu siste vuoitin 10-olbmosaš Mali 1–0.

Ndiaye čuohppai 27 minuhta maŋŋel, go son ávkkástallii goalavárri stuorra meattáhusas ja biddjii Senegal jođihepmui garrasit geahpas derby-spealus sin oarji-Afrihká rájálašguimmiid vuostá.

Mali geahpádii 10 olbmui nuppi bealleaigái, go kapitena Yves Bissouma sáddejuvvui eret nuppi várrehusa geažil juste ovdal bealleaigi loahpaheami.

Son oaččui vuosttaš várrehusa 25. minuhtas bihkkis duohkadeami geažil, ja maŋŋel sáddejuvvui eret dárbbaškeahtes meattáhusa geažil Idrissa Gana Gueye vuostá.

Mali geahpádii 10 olbmui juo 26. minuhtas ovddit deaivvadeamis Tunisia vuostá ja beasai vel joatkkasii rangašspárkkiid bokte, muhto dán háve eai šat nagodan máhccat bures heivehuvvon senegallalaš joavkku vuostá.

Dreyfus.
What does that look?
Libby is dead, which means I don't have a wife.
You don't have lamb chops.
Oh, gosh, she spoiled you rotten.
Dreyfus.
Hey, doctor.
Weston.
Hi, Emily.
Baby.
How are you?
Midterms over?
Uh, but that's a relief.
So it's sunny up there in New York, huh?
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Output the text such that each sentence is on a separate line. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0: Dreyfus. Makkár dat oru? Libby lea jápmán, mii mearkkaša ahte mus ii leat eamit. Dus eai leat sávzzabiergacoppat. Ái, ipmir, son hemmii du ollásit. Dreyfus. Hei, doavttir. Weston. Bures, Emily. Mánná. Mo manat? Leatgo gaskaboddoskuvllageahččaleamit lohppan? Dat lea ge profiit, ja. Nju, lea go doppe New Yorkas beaivváš, vai?
hypo_1: Dreyfus. Makkár dat orru? Libby lea jápmán, mii mearkkaša ahte mus ii leat eanaš isit. Dus eai leat sávzzabierrangáhkut. Ái, ipmir, son hemmii du áibbas. Dreyfus. Hei, doavttir. Weston. Bures, Emily. Mánážan. Mo don leat? Leatgo gaskaboddogeahččaleamit lohppan? Muhto dat lea oaiveheamit. Nii ahte lea go doppe New Yorkas beaivváš, vai?
hypo_2: Dreyfus. Makkár dat lea? Libby lea jápmán, mii mearkkaša ahte mus ii leat eanaš náittosolmmoš. Dus eai leat sávzzabierran. Ái, ipmir, son hemmii du áibbas pillet. Dreyfus. Hei, doavttir. Weston. Bures, Emily. Bábán. Mo don leat? Leatgo gaskaboddogeahččaleamit lohppan? Dat lea geahččalit oaiveheamit. Nii ahte doppe New Yorkas lea beaivváš, vai?
hypo_3: Dreyfus. Mo dat orru? Libby lea jápmán, mii mearkkaša ahte mus ii leat náittosolmmoš. Dus eai leat sávzzabihtát. Ái, ipmir, son hemmii du áibbas pillet. Dreyfus. Hei, doavttir. Weston. Bures, Emily. Mu unna. Mo don manat? Leatgo gaskaboddogeahččaleamit lohppan? Dat lea buorre diehtu. Nii ahte doppe New Yorkas lea beaivválaččat, vai?
hypo_4: Dreyfus. Mo dat orru? Libby lea jápmán, mii mearkkaša ahte mus ii leat eanet áhčči. Dus eai leat sávccebihtát. Ái, eai, son hemmii du ollásit. Dreyfus. Hei, doavttir. Weston. Bures, Emily. Mu ráhkis. Mo manat? Leatgo gaskaboddogeahččaleamit lohppan? Dat lea máinna buorri. Nii ahte doppe New Yorkas lea beaivváš, vai?
hypo_5: Dreyfus. Mo dat orru? Libby lea jápmán, mii mearkkaša ahte mus ii leat eanet isit. Dus eai leat lammabihtát. Ái mu, son hemmii du ollásit. Dreyfus. Hei, doavttir. Weston. Bures, Emily. Ráhkis. Mo dus manná? Leatgo gaskaboddogeahččaleamit lohppan? Dat lea duođaid liekkas. De doppe New Yorkas lea beaivváš, vai?
hypo_6: Dreyfus. Mo dat orru? Libby lea jápmán, mii mearkkaša ahte mus ii leat nissonis. Dus eai leat sávzabihtát. Ái, ipmir, son hemmii du badjel meari. Dreyfus. Hei, doavttir. Weston. Bures, Emily. Mu váibmu. Mo manná? Leatgo gaskageahččaleamit lohppan? Dat gal lea huikkan. De doppe New Yorkas lea beaivváš, vai?
hypo_7: Dreyfus. Mo dat orru? Libby lea jápmán, mii mearkkaša ahte mus ii leat šat beanas. Dus eai leat sávzabihtát. Ái, muhto, son hemmii du ollásit. Dreyfus. Hei, doavttir. Weston. Bures, Emily. Ráhkis. Mo dutnje manná? Leatgo gaskageahččaleamit lohppan? Dat lea hui geahpasvuohta. De doppe New Yorkas lea beaivváš, vai?

Maid don don jurddašat das?
Go geahččá maŋŋelit dan, gilvvu ja iđit eahketid soađiid ja buot dan.
Ja liikkot go don.
Čielgasit, soaitá don oaivvildat ahte dat lea heajos.
Soaitá maid, mo don, mo don kategorisere dan iežat oaiviliid siste?
No, dat lea, oppalaččat dat lea heahpatlaš.
Danne in háliit leat son olmmoš gii lea suhttan dan geažil ahte, ó, in ožžon dakkár ja dakkár, daningo in duođaid dovdan nu.

Ja liikkot go don das?

Dáppe lea hui seavdnjat.

Divtte mus dušše viežžat taskalámpa, de mun.
Buorre, de mun dárbbašan dušše dárkkistit.
Buorre beaivi, madame.
Sonar.

source_doc:
@la Isn't rule #1 of machining that if you haven't faced it off, it's not square or flat?

@azonenberg yes, of course, but I *did* mean to face it off. I just had my tool zero set wrong.
Because I assumed that it was roughtly flat.
I'm making an extra part today. I have the stock. And if I don't it will bug me to no end. Plus, during test fitting the bearing I broke the glue holding the part on my plate, so I would have to indicate it back in anyways, which I don't wanna dooooo, so.....

@la I know the feeling.
Had a similar problem when working on my house where literally every datum you might think of using was wrong.
I had a contractor frame a door frame plumb and square. Had to rip out a couple of studs after he left because the door needed to be like a degree off level in order to be flush with the floor and not floating in the air on one side.
Another (partial height) wall has each stud carefully cut to length because no two are the same size... The floor isn't flat so to make the countertop level you need the wall to be a parallelogram rather than a rectangle

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. hypo_0:
@la Ii go mašiinneremis leat njuolggadus #1 ahte jos it leat dan planastan, de ii leat njealljehas dahje ravda?

@azonenberg lea, diehttelas, muhto mun *gal* jurddašin planastit dan. Muhto mu reaidozero lei biddjojuvvon boastut.
Dannego mun earáin válddán ahte dat lei measta ravda.
Mun ráhkadan odne oktasaš oasse. Mus lea materiála. Ja jos in dahkat dan, de dat váivášišii mu geargái. Ja vel, geahččaleami áigge go heivehin bearriŋga, de mun čuoikkahin liibma mii doalai oasi mu pláhta alde, nu ahte mun livččen galgan bidjat dan ruovttoluotta sisaindikeren, ja dat in hálit dahkat oooo, nu ahte.....

@la Dieđán dán dovddu.
Mus lei sullasaš váttisvuohta go barggen mu viesuin, gos juohke datum maid sáhtáš smiehttat geavahit lei duođaid boastut.
Mus lei kontraktora mii ráhkadii uvssa rámma nu ahte dat lei njuolggo ja njealljehas. Mun ferten gaikut eret muhtun stohppaliid su mannan maŋŋel, danne go uvsa fertii leat sullii ovtta gráda mielde boastut dásis vai dat livččii seamma dásis láhttuiin iige livčče guovllus nu ahte nubbi bealli livččii áimmus.
Eará (oassái allat) seaidnis lea juohke stohppal fuolahit čuohppon rivttes guhkkodahkii, danne go ii oktage guovttis leat seamma stuoris... Láhttu ii leat ravda, nu ahte jos hálidat beavdelásema leat dásis, de fertet seaidni leat parallelogramma iige rektangel

source_doc:
@afewbugs I have seen this too, I do worry that new members might not find such groups in the real world now as they are less likely to be on old fashioned social media. For instance someone was trying to give away two pedal cycles in need of repair and couldn't get any interest through Facebook. A few years ago they wouldn't have lasted ten minutes before someone claimed them. I have one and I am gutted that I wasn't able to take the second. Similarly, litter picking and community gardens.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs I have more luck shifting things through Facebook marketplace these days than I do with Gumtree any more, and I can't face eBay for things too big to post. Possibly it depends a lot on where you are though, especially with bikes!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace is a big one keeping me on Facebook too. I used to think it was to keep in touch with friends but I barely see any posts from my actual friends anymore, so now it's mostly marketplace, local groups and the fact most local businesses and even the Library only seem to have their opening times, special events etc on Facebook
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
@afewbugs Mun lean oaidnán dán maiddái, ja mun duođas fuolahan ahte ođđa miellahtut eai dárbbašlaččat gávnna dakkár joavkkuid olggobealde dál, go sii eai leat nu álkit leat boaresládje sosiála mediain. Ovdamearkka dihte muhtun geahččalii addit eret guokte pedal-syhkala maid dárbbašedje divvuma, muhto ii oažžon oktage beroštumi Facebooka bokte. Muhtun jagiid áigi dalle dat eai livčče bistán eambbo go logi minuhta ovdalgo muhtin váldá daid. Mus lea okta, ja mun lean hirbmat bahás go in bastán váldit dan nubbi. Seammal ruskkačoaggine ja servodathágit.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs Mus lea eanet lihkku dál sirdit diŋggaid Facebook Marketplace bokte go Gumtree bokte, ja in gal birge eBayin danlágan diŋggaiguin mat leat menddo stuorrát sáddet. Sihkkarit dat hirbmat sorjá das gos leat, erenoamážit syhkaliiguin!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace lea okta stuorámus ášši mii doallá mu Facebookas maiddái. Ovdal jurddašin ahte dat lei vai doallat oktavuođa ustibiiguin, muhto mun geađán unnán duohta mu ustibiid postemiid šat, nu ahte dál dat lea eanas Marketplace, báikkálaš joavkkut ja dat ahte eanas báikkálaš fitnodagat ja vel Girjerádjuge orrot dušše bidjamin rahpanáiggiid, erenoamáš dáhpáhusaid jna Facebookii
hypo_1:
@afewbugs Mun lean oaidnán dán maiddái, ja mun duođaid fuolahan ahte ođđa miellahtut eai dáidde gávdnat dakkár joavkkuid duohta eallimis dál, go sii eai leat nu álkce leat boareslágan sosiála mediain. Ovdamearkka dihte muhtun geahččalii addit eret guokte syhkala maid dárbbašedje divvuma, muhto ii oažžon oktage beroštumi Facebooka bokte. Muhtin jagiid áigi dalle dat eai livčče bistán vel logi minuhta ovdal go muhtun váldá daid. Mus lea okta, ja mun lean hui heittot go in beassan váldit dan nuppi. Seammá láhkai ruskka čoaggin ja servodathágit.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs Mus lea eanet lihkku dál ožžot diŋggaid johttit Facebook Marketplace bokte go Gumtree bokte, ja in gal háliit geavahit eBay stuorát diŋggaide maid ii sáhte sáddet posttain. Dáidá gal hirbmat sorjat das gos leat, erenoamážit syhkaliiguin!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace lea okta stuorra sivva mii doallá mu Facebookas maiddái. Ovdal jurddašin ahte dat lei vai doallat oktavuođa ustibiiguin, muhto mun in oainne go unnán postemiid iežan duohta ustibiin šat, nu ahte dál dat lea eanas Marketplace, báikkálaš joavkkut ja dat ahte eanas báikkálaš fitnodagat ja vel girjerádjuge orrot dušše bidjamin rahpanáiggiid, erenoamáš dáhpáhusaid jna Facebookii
hypo_2:
@afewbugs Mun lean oaidnán dán maiddái, ja mun duođaid fuolastan ahte ođđa miellahtut eai dál gávnna dakkár joavkkuid duohta eallimis, go sii leat unnánnáset boareslágan sosiála mediain. Ovdamearkka dihtii muhtun geahččalii addit eret guokte syhkala mat dárbbašedje divvuma, muhto ii oažžon oktage beroštumi Facebooka bokte. Muhtin jagiid dás ovdal daid livčče váldán muhtun olbmo juo ovdal go logi minuhta lei vássán. Mus lea okta, ja mun lean hui heittot go in beassan váldit dan nuppi. Seammá láhkai ruskka čoaggin ja servodathágit.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs Mus lea dál eanet lihkku oažžut diŋggaid eret Facebook Marketplace bokte go Gumtree bokte, ja in gal háliit geavahit eBay daid diŋggaide mat leat menddo stuorrát postta bokte sáddet. Dáidá gal ollu sorjat das gos leat, erenoamážit syhkaliiguin!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace lea okta stuorra sivva mii doallá mu Facebookas maiddái. Ovdal jurddašin ahte lean doppe vai doallat oktavuođa ustibiiguin, muhto mun in oainne go hui unnán postemiid iežan duohta ustibiin šat, nu ahte dál dat lea eanas Marketplace, báikkálaš joavkkut ja dat ahte eanas báikkálaš fitnodagat, ja vel girjerádju, orrot dušše bidjamin rahpanáiggiid, erenoamáš dáhpáhusaid jna Facebookii.
hypo_3:
@afewbugs Mun lean oaidnán dán maiddái, ja mun duođas fuolastan ahte ođđa miellahtut dál eai dáidde gávdnat dákkár joavkkuid duohta eallimis, go sii leat uhcit jáhkkimis boareslágan sosiála mediain. Ovdamearkka dihtii muhtin geahččalii addit eret guokte syhkala mat dárbbašedje divvuma, muhto ii oažžon ovttage beroštumi Facebooka bokte. Muhtin jahkkiid dás ovdal dat eai livčče seisson eanet go logi minuhta ovdal go muhtin boahtá ja váldá daid. Mus lea okta, ja mun lean hui suhttan danin go in beassan váldit dan nuppi. Seammá lea ruskka čoaggin ja servošatgárddit.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs Mus lea dán áigge eanet lihkku oažžut diŋggaid eret Facebook Marketplace bokte go Gumtree bokte, ja mun in fal gierdda eBay geavahit dakkár diŋggaide mat leat menddo stuorrát posttasáddemii. Soaitá gal ollu sorjat das gos leat, erenoamážit jos leat syhkkaliid birra!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace lea muhte stuorra sivva manne mun lean Facebookas maiddái. Ovdal jurddašin ahte lean doppe vai doallat oktavuođa ustibiiguin, muhto mun in oainne šat go hui unnán postemiid iežan duohta ustibiin, nu ahte dál dat lea eanas Marketplace, báikkálaš joavkkut ja dat ahte eanas báikkálaš fitnodagat, ja vel girjerádju, orrot dušše bidjamin rahpanáiggiid, erenoamáš dáhpáhusaid jna Facebookii.

source_doc:
Outside of court a never ending stream of flying monkeys has doxxed, harassed and threatened me and anyone they believe have "helped" me in anyway shape or form.
One flying monkey is the tiktoker Areej "liberationluvr" Hakim who jumped on my ex's public posts, and knows my ex privately.
I'll re-post some of their videos about me with a CW.
But I want to make it clear how much these people wish to erase me and my few accomplishments.
Here's violent threats about a witness in my case.

This tiktoker has made it their PRIMARY content to attempt to dox me, my friends and specifically witnesses to my illegal eviction.
In the video they made about me they attempt to paint me as "not an activist", "not a hacker" and "just a grifter".
ALL because my ex decided that splitting bills while navigating a break constituted domestic violence.
They then call their constant online lynch mob chasing me around "activism" and fund raise off MY pain and court process.
#ParentingWhileBlack

Areej "solidarityluvr" is known locally for posting tiktoks of herself stalking + harassing multiple of her ex's all on her tiktok+IG.
Areej maced a trans librarian, Canyon, ON camera as she got off work likely bc Canyon had to enforce BASIC library rules.
Areej cyberbullied Canyon for months after.
Canyon soon thereafter died of a suspected intentional drug overdose.
Many in the community believe Areej's actions directly contributed to Canyon's death.
THESE are the "friends" my ex keeps.

Anywho... this type of leftist infighting, is the worst portlandia coded telenovela ever.
I've NEVER posted anything at all publicly about Areej till now.
Areej did contact me 2years ago with some infighting, which I immediately DECLINED to be involved with.
I had a few private & community conversations about the issues they raised to ensure a restorative justice process had or would occur.
One had occured and had plenty of support so I bowed out.
This had been the extent of our contact.

At the time I bowed out I warned the community against cyber bullying especially 3rd parties to the initial interpersonal conflict.
This warning was directed to Areej, I felt their cyber bullying ON top of the already existing decisions in their favor was in poor taste.
I especially felt Areej doxxing the restorative justice committee/mediators DURING the process was actively abusive.
I warned specifically about the likelihood of Areej's victims self harming being a real risk.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Duopmu olggobealde leat geigehisgeahtes “flying monkey” -ráidu doxxen, hehtten ja uhkan muidege ja buohkaide geat sii jáhkket leat mu “veahkehan” vaikko man láhkai.
Okta “flying monkey” lea tiktoker Areej “liberationluvr” Hakim, geas lei dárbu luoitit iežan mu ex:a almmolaš postemiidda, ja son dovdá mu ex:a priváhtta.
Mun galgan ođđasit postet muhtun sin videoid munnje birra CW:in.
Muhto háliidan čielggadit man olu dát olbmot háliidit sihkkut mu ja mu unna sáhttámušaid.
Dáppe leat veahkaváldi uhkadusat duođašteaddji birra mu áššis.

Dát tiktoker lea dahkan dan iežas VÁLDOSISDOALLUN ahte geahččala doxxet mu, mu ustibiid ja erenoamážit duođašteaddjiid mu lobiheapme olggosbálkesteamis.
Videoš mas sii dahket mu birra, geahččalit sii čájehit mu “ii aktivistan”, “ii hackeran” ja “dušše suoládeaddjin”.
BUOT dan geažil ahte mu ex mearridii ahte rehkenastimiid juogadeapmi go earuheaddibeaivvit válddit badjelii lei bearrašiid siste veahkaváldin.
Ja de sii gohčodit iežaset bistevaš neahtta-lynšamobba, mii ruohttasa mu birra, “aktivisman”, ja čoaggit ruđa MU bálu ja duopmoproseassa ala.
#VáhnenvuohtaGoLeatČáhppes

Areej “solidarityluvr” lea báikkálaččat dovddus danin ahte son lea posten tiktokaid iežas birra go son suohkala ja heađušta moanaid iežas ex:aid iežas tiktokas + IG:s.
Areej sparii trans-bibliotekára, Canyon, ON camera go son lei boahtimin barggus eret, dáhpáhusain dan geažil ahte Canyon fertii čađahit VUOĐĐO bibliotehkareavttuid.
Areej cyberbullyii Canyon mánotbajiid maŋŋel dan.
Ii guhká dan maŋŋel Canyon jámii, jáhkkimis dihtii iešalddes ulbmillaš mirkkobáhkaneami geažil.
Ollu servodagas jáhkket ahte Areeja dagut njuolga váikkuhedje Canyon jápmimii.
DÁT leat dat “ustibat” maid mu ex doallá.

Muhtoge... dakkár gurutbealálaš sisabaháštallan lea vearrámus portlandia-koden telenovela iktege.
Mun in leat GOASSEGE almmolaččat posten maidege Areej birra ovdal dál.
Areej válddii oktavuođa munnje 2 jagi dás ovdal muhtun sisabaháštallamiin, maid mun dalán DIIHTII hilggiin searvat.
Mun lean leamaš muhtun priváhta ja servodaga ságastallamiin daid áššiid birra maid sii lokte, vai sihkkarastit ahte restauratiivva riektevuoda proseassa lei dahje galgii dáhpáhuvvat.
Okta lei juo dáhpáhuvvan ja das lei ollu doarjja, nu ahte mun guđđiin dan.
Dát lei min oktavuođa olles mearra.

Dan áigge go mun guđđiin dan, mun váruihan servodaga cyberbullyema vuostá, erenoamážit goalmmát bealiid vuostá vuosttaš persovnnalaš konflikta birra.
Dát várrehus lei čujuhuvvon Areejii; mus lei dovdu ahte su cyberbullyen GIELLÁ geahččalemiid badjel mat juo ledje su beales, lei hui boastut máksu.
Erenoamážit mus lei dovdu ahte Areej doxxen restauratiivva riektevuoda lávdegotti/mediátoriid proseassa ÁIGI lei aktiivvalaččat veahkaválddálaš.
Mun váruihin erenoamážit dan birra ahte lea duohta riskka ahte Areeja ávictimat sáhttet vahágahtit iežaset.
hypo_1:
Duopmostuovrra olggobealde lea geahppángeahtes “flying monkey” -ráidu doxxen, hehtten ja uhkan mu ja buohkaid geat sii jáhkket leat mu “veahkehan” vaikko makkár láhkai ge.

Okta dain “flying monkey” -olbmuin lea tiktoker Areej “liberationluvr” Hakim, gii luoitii iežas mu ex:a almmolaš postemiidda, ja dovdá mu ex:a priváhtta.

Mun galgan ođđasit postet muhtun sin videoid mat leat mu birra, CW:in.

Muhto mun háliidan čielggasit čájehit man olu dát olbmot háliidit sihkkut mu ja mu unna sáhttámušaid.

Dáppe leat veahkaválddálaš uhkádusat mu ášši duođašteaddji birra.

Dát tiktoker lea dahkan das iežas VÁLDOSISDOALLU: geahččalit doxxet mu, mu ustibiid ja erenoamážit duođašteaddjiid mu lobiheapme olggosbálkesteamis.
Dan videos maid sii dahke mu birra, sii geahččalit čájehit mu “ii aktivistan”, “ii hackeran” ja “dušše suoládeaddjin”.
BUOT dan geažil ahte mu ex mearridii ahte rehkenastimiid juohkin go mii ledje earuheamen, lei bearraša siste veahkaváldi.
Ja de sii gohčodit iežaset bistevaš neahtta-lynšamobba, mii ruohttasa mu maŋis, “aktivisman”, ja čoaggit ruđa MU bákčasa ja duopmoproseassa ala.

Areej sparii trans-bibliotekára, Canyon, ON camera, go son lei barggus boahtimin eret, ilmehahtti dan geažil ahte Canyon fertii čađahit VUOĐĐO bibliotehkareavttuid.
Areej cyberbullyii Canyon mánotbajiid maŋŋel dan.
Ii guhká dan maŋŋel Canyon jámii, jáhkkimis dihtii ulbmillaš mirkkobáhkaneami geažil.
Ollu servodagas jáhkket ahte Areeja dagut njuolga váikkuhedje Canyon jápmimii.
DÁT leat dat “ustibat” maid mu ex doallá lahka.

Muhtunge... dakkár gurutbealálaš sisabaháštallan lea vearrámus portlandia-koden telenovela iktege.

Okta lei juo dáhpáhuvvan ja das lei ollu doarjja, nu ahte mun guđđiin dan.
Dát lei min oktavuođa olles mearra.

Dan áigge go mun guđđiin dan, mun váruihan servodaga cyberbullyema vuostá, erenoamážit goalmmát bealiid vuostá vuosttaš persovnnalaš konflikta oktavuođas.
Dát várrehus lei čujuhuvvon Areejii; mus lei dovdu ahte su cyberbullyen vel daid mearrádusaid badjel mat juo ledje su beales, lei hui boastut máksu.
Erenoamážit mus lei dovdu ahte Areej doxxen restauratiivva riektevuoda lávdegotti/mediátoriid proseassa ÁIGI lei aktiivvalaččat veahkaválddálaš.
Mun váruihin erenoamážit ahte lea duohta riskka ahte Areeja ávictimat sáhttet vahágahtit iežaset.

Areej sprejai gázas transbibliotekára, Canyon, ON CAMERA, go son lei barggus boahtimin, ilmehahtti dan geažil ahte Canyon fertii čađahit VUOĐĐO bibliotehkareavttuid.
Areej cyberbullyii Canyon mánotbajiid dan maŋŋel.
Ii guhká dan maŋŋel Canyon jámii, jáhkkimis mielde ulbmillaš mirkkobáhkaneami geažil.
Ollu servodagas jáhkket ahte Areeja dagut njuolgga váikkuhedje Canyon jápmimii.
DÁT leat dat “ustibat” maid mu ex doallá lahka.

Muhto de... dakkár gurutbealálaš sisabaháštallan lea vearrámus portlandia-koden telenovela goassege.
Mun in leat GOASSEGE posten maidege almmolaččat Areej birra ovdal dál.
Areej válddii oktavuođa munnje 2 jagi dás ovdal muhtun sisabaháštallamiin, maid mun dalán DIIHTII hilggiin searvat.
Mus ledje muhtun priváhta & servodaga ságastallamat daid áššiid birra maid sii lokte, vai sihkkarastit ahte restauratiivva rievttálašvuođa proseassa lei dahje galgii dáhpáhuvvat.
Okta lei juo dáhpáhuvvan ja das lei ollu doarjja, nu ahte mun guđđiin dan.
Dát lea leamaš min oktavuođa olles mearra.

Dan áigge go mun guđđiin dan, mun váruihin servodaga cyberbullyema vuostá, erenoamážit goalmmát bealiid vuostá geat ledje vuosttaš persovnnalaš konflikta olggobealde.
Dát várrehus lei čujuhuvvon Areejii; mus lei dovdu ahte su cyberbullyen, vel badjel daid mearrádusaid mat juo ledje su buorrin, lei hui boastut mávssolaš.
Erenoamážit mus lei dovdu ahte Areej doxxen restauratiivva rievttálašvuođa lávdegotti/mediátoriid proseassa ÁIGI lei aktiivvalaččat hehttehus.
Mun váruihin erenoamážit ahte lea duohta riskka ahte Areeja ávictimat sáhttet vahágahttit iežaset.
hypothesis:
Duopmostuovrra olggobealde lea loahpatkeahtes ráidu “flying monkey” -olbmuin doxxen, hehtten ja uhkan mu ja buot geaid sii jáhkket leat mu “veahkehan” vaikko makkár láhkai ge.
Okta dain “flying monkey” -olbmuin lea tiktoker Areej “liberationluvr” Hakim, guhte njuike mu ex:a almmolaš postemiid vuostá ja dovdá mu ex:a priváhtalaččat.
Mun galggan ođđasit juohkit muhtun sin videoid mu birra, CW:in.
Muhto mun háliidan dahkat čielggasin man ollu dát olbmot háliidit sihkkut mu ja mu moadde lihkostuvvan ášši.
Dáppe leat veahkaválddálaš uhkádusat mu ášši duođašteaddji birra.

Dát tiktoker lea dahkan das iežas VÁLDOSISDOALU geahččalit doxxet mu, mu ustibiid ja erenoamážit duođašteaddjiid mu lobiheapme olggosbálkesteami áššis.
Dan videos maid sii dahke mu birra, sii geahččalit govvidit mu “ii aktivistan”, “ii hackeran” ja “dušše suolus olbmon”.
BUOT dan geažil ahte mu ex mearridii ahte rehkenastimiid juohkin go mii lei earuheame, lei bearraša siste veahkaváldi.
Dan maŋŋel sii gohčodit iežaset bistevaš neahttalynšamobba, mii mu álo čuovvu, “aktivisman”, ja čoaggit ruđa MU bákčasa ja duopmoproseassa ala.

I don't think y'all understand how excited I am to eat these.
I had them for the very first time when I last came to Portugal, and I was obsessed.
I ate about 50 of these.
Probably no exaggeration.
I ate so many of these when I was when I was last here.
And then I tried them in like other countries afterwards.
And they never hit the same.
They never hit the same.
So I'm having these again in Portugal.
Let's try them.

source_doc:
@rechelon extremely unpopular is one way of putting it… i don’t live in berlin but i think people everywhere had roughly the same response, which is “fuck these assholes for doing something that leaves so many uninvolved people without electricity and treating it like necessary collateral damage”. I’ve seen lots of people speculate that it was a false flag to make the left look bad. Not that the cops care, they are probably giddy with excitement now (a gross thing to imagine) that they have a pretense to raid and criminalize the leftist scene.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Yeah, I mean it seems like there's still about half a dozen anticivs raised on meme accounts who are shocked the scene didn't stand with them, but are extremely shocked that old timer anticivs who felt disrespected by said crew and haven't backed them.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
I do worry that we'll see a self-justification spiral where a handful of anticivs get so mad at the movement for not supporting their super based attack on the civilized that they end up in ITS level shit within a year or two of isolation and seething.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
@rechelon hui epopulárra lea okta vuohki cealkit dan… in oro Berlinis, muhto mun jurddan ahte olbmot juohke sajis vástidedje oalle seamma láhkai, mii lea “fuck dát idiohtat go dahket juoidá mii guođđá nu olu olbmuid geat eai leat juo mihkkege mielde haga elektra ja gieđahallet dan nugo dat livččii dárbbašlaš liigemassivahkku”. Mun lean oaidnán ollu olbmuid spekulereamen ahte dat lei false flag vai oaivvildit gurutlihkadusa bahánin. Ii nu ahte politiijat beroštit, sii leat várra hui illudan dál (okta fasti ášši maid govvidit) go sis lea dál ágga rázziid dahkat ja kriminaliseret gurutbeali skene.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Juo, de mii, orru ai vel leat sullii bealle logi anticiv-vaš olbmot geat leat bajásšaddan meme-konttuin ja leat suorggahan ahte skene ii čuožžilan sin beales, muhto leat vel eanet suorggahan ahte boarráseappot anticiv-olbmot geat dovde iežaset heaittihuvvon dan joavkku bokte eai leat sin doarjun.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Mun duođas fuolabalan ahte mii oažžut oaidnit iešduhtadan-spirála mas muhtun anticiv-olbmot šaddet nu suhttadin lihkadussii go dat ii doarjjo sin hui “based” áŋgirdeami siviliserejuvvon olbmuid vuostá vai sii loahpas bohtet dakkár ITS-dási seavdnjadussii jahkái dahje guovtti jahkái eretlonohallama ja bossuma maŋŋel.
hypo_1:
@rechelon hui epopulárra lea okta vuohki cealkit dan… in oro Berlinis, muhto mun jurddan ahte olbmot juohke sajis reagerejedje mehter seamma láhkai, mii lei: “vittu dán sorta idiohtaid go dahket juoidá mii guođđá nu olu sivvaheapme olbmuid haga sähkö ja gieđahallet dan nugo dat livččii dárbbašlaš ‘collateral damage’.” Mun lean oaidnán ollu olbmuid spekulereamen ahte dat lei false flag vai bahánii čájehit gurutbeali. Ii nu ahte poliissat beroštit, sii leat várra dál ieš hui ilois ja hypereamen (fasti jurddašit) go sis lea dál geasuheapmi dahkat rázziid ja kriminaliseret gurutlaš skene.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Juo, dego mun jurddan, orru ahte vel leat sullii beallelogi anticiv-olbmot geat leat bajásšaddan meme-konttuin ja leat suorggahan ahte skene ii čuožžilan sin beales, muhto leat vel eanet suorggahan ahte boares anticiv-olbmot geat dovde iežaset heaittihuvvon dán joavkku bokte eai leat sin doarjun.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Mun duođas fuolabalan ahte mii vel oaidnit iešguđetlágan iešduhtadan-spirála, gos muhtun anticiv-olbmot šaddet nu suhttadin lihkadussii go dat ii doarjjo sin hui “based” áŋgirdeami siviliserejuvvon olbmuid vuostá ahte sii loahpas šaddet dakkár ITS-dási seavdnjadussii juo ovtta dahje guovtti jagi siste, eretlonohallama ja bossuma maŋŋel.
hypo_2:
@rechelon hui epopulárra lea okta vuohki dan bidjat… in oro Berlinis, muhto mun jurddan ahte olbmot juohke sajis reagerejedje várra seamma láhkai, mii lei: “vittu dáid idiohtaid go dahket dakkár ášši mii guođđá nu ollu sivvaheapme olbmuid haga elektrisitehta ja gieđahallet dan dego dat livččii dárbbašlaš ‘collateral damage’.” Mun lean oaidnán ollu olbmuid spekuleremin ahte dat lei false flag, vai gurutbealli čájehuvvošii bahásin. Ii nu ahte poliissat danin beroštit; sii leat várra dál iluin čuovvuleamen dan (suhtas fasti govvidit) go sis lea dál vuođđu dahkat rázziid ja kriminaliseret gurutlaš skene.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Juo, dego mun oaivvildan, orru ahte vel leat sullii beallelogi anticiv-olbmot geat leat bajásšaddan meme-konttuin ja leat suorggan danin ahte skene ii čuožžilan sin beales, muhto leat vel eanet suorggan danin ahte boares anticiv-olbmot, geat dovde iežaset heaittihuvvon dán joavkku bokte, eai leat sin doarjun.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Mun duođas fuolabalan ahte mii oaidnit iešduhtadan-spirála, gos muhtun anticiv-olbmot šaddet nu suhttadin lihkadussii go dat ii doarjjo sin hui “based” áŋgirdeami siviliserejuvvon olbmuid vuostá, ahte sii loahpas gearganit muhtun ITS-dási seavdnjadussii juo ovtta dahje guovtti jagi siste, eretlonohallama ja bossuma maŋŋel.
hypo_3:
@rechelon hui epopulárra lea okta vuohki dan dadjat… mun in oro Berlinis, muhto jurddan ahte olbmot juohke sajis reagerejedje oalle seamma láhkai, ja dat lei: “vittu dáid duššáš olbmuid go dahket dakkár ášši mii guođđá nu olu sivvaheapme olbmuid haga sähkka ja gieđahallet dan dego dat livččii dárbbašlaš collateral damage.” Mun lean oaidnán ollu olbmuid spekuleret ahte dat lei false flag, vai gurutbealli čájehuvvošii bahásin. Ii nu ahte poliissat beroštit das; sii leat várra dál oalle fiervvásat dan geažil (vuostálas jurddašit) go sis lea dál teknihkalaš siva bargat rázziid ja kriminaliseret gurutlaš skene.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Juo, mun oaivvildan ahte orru vel leamen sullii beallelogi anticiv-olbmot geat leat bajásšaddan meme-konttuin, ja leat suorggan danin ahte skene ii čuožžilan sin beales, muhto leat hui suorggadeaddjit danin ahte boares anticiv-olbmot, geat dovde iežaset heaittihuvvon dán joavkku geažil, eai leat sin doarjun.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Mun duođas fuolabalan ahte mii sáhttit oaidnit iešduođasteaddji spirála, gos muhtun anticiv-olbmot šaddet nu suhttadin lihkadussii go dat ii doarjjo sin hui “based” áŋgirdeami siviliserejuvvon olbmuid vuostá, ahte sii loahpas gearganit muhtun ITS-dási seavdnjadussii juo ovtta dahje guovtti jagi siste, earálágan eretorruma ja bossuma maŋŋel.
hypo_4:
@rechelon “hui epopulárra” lea okta vuohki dan bidjat… mun in oro Berlinis, muhto jurddan ahte olbmot buot sajis reagerejedje suollemassii seamma láhkai, ja dat lei: “vittu dáid idiohtaid go dahket dakkár ášši mii guođđá nu olu sivvaheapme olbmuid haga čuovgga haga sähka, ja gieđahallet dan dego dat livččii muhtun dárbbašlaš collateral damage.” Mun lean oaidnán ollu olbmuid spekuleret ahte dat lei false flag vai gurutbealli čájehuvvošii bahásin. Ii nu ahte poliissat das beroštit; sii leat várra dál oalle riemus dan geažil (hui boastut jurddašit dan) go sis lea dál ágga bargat rázziid ja kriminaliseret gurutlaš skeana.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Juo, oaivvildan ahte orru vel leamen sullii guhtta anticiv-olbmo geat leat “bajásšaddan” meme-konttuin, ja leat suorggaduvvon go skene ii čuožžilan sin bealde, muhto leat vel eanet suorggaduvvon danin ahte boarrásat anticiv-olbmot, geat dovde ahte dat joavku heaittihii sin, eai leat sin doarjun.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Mun duođas fuolabalan ahte mii vel oaidnit dakkár iešduođasteaddji spirála, gos muhtun anticiv-olbmot šaddet nu veagalin lihkadussii go dat ii doarjjo sin “super based” áŋgirdeami siviliserejuvvon olbmuid vuostá, ahte sii loahpas šaddet muhtun ITS-dási seavdnjadussii juo ovtta dahje guovtti jagi siste, earut ja bossut iežaset siste.
hypo_5:
@rechelon “hui epopulárra” lea okta vuohki dan dadjat… mun in oro Berlinis, muhto mun jurddan ahte olbmot visot sajis reagerejedje sullii seamma láhkai, ja dat lei: “vittu dáid asshole-id go dahket dakkár ášši mii guođđá nu olu sivvaheapme olbmuid haga sähka ja danin vel gieđahallet dan dego dat livččii muhtun dárbbašlaš collateral damage.” Lean oaidnán ollu olbmuid spekuleret ahte dat lei false flag, vai gurutbealli čájehuvvošii bahásin. Ii nu ahte poliissat das beroštit; sii leat várra dál oalle riemuid mielde dan geažil (hui vuollán dovdu jurddašit dan) go sis lea dál ágga bargat rázziid ja kriminaliseret gurutlaš skeana.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Juo, dat orru vel nu ahte leat vel sullii bealle dusena anticiv-olbmo, geat leat šaddan meme-konttuin, ja geat leat suorggaduvvon go skene ii čuožžilan sin bealde, muhto leat vel eanet suorggaduvvon danin ahte boarrásat anticiv-olbmot, geat dovde ahte dat joavku leat heaittihan sin, eai leat sin doarjun.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Mun duođaid fuolabalan ahte mii vel oaidnit iešduođasteaddji spirála, gos muhtun anticiv-olbmot šaddet nu veagasin lihkadussii go dat ii doarjjo sin “super based” áŋgirdeami siviliserejuvvon olbmuid vuostá, ahte sii loahpas gávdnojit muhtun ITS-dási seavdnjadusas juo ovtta dahje guovtti jagi siste, go leat earruhuvvon ja buvssot iežaset siste.

source_doc:
Ate a little more chicken and had a wash. Also had a little more fight when I made her take her fluids last.
We phoned the vet at 830 this morning to ask if they looked under her soft pallet while she was sedated, as she has major ear polyps. Was told the vet would call back. They didn't, rang just now (1645 local) and was told the vet wasn't in today. I was a bit annoyed and said "we paid you over £600 yesterday, you said phone if we have questions, we have questions you're not answering!"
"I don't like your tone, sir "
"It's not your fault personally, but when I pay the better part of a grand I expect a level of service that you're not providing"
"I'll get a vet from the other branch to ring you"

Seeing vet at other practise at half seven for more anti nausea medicine. They're not going to charge out of hours rate as we rang first thing.
Just got another 10ml of rescue fluids into her.

Back. Anti nausea jab, gabapentin, and she's home. Ate some chicken and some cheese.
Got more gabapentin in pill form for her, too

Won't stop eating. Having to slow her down to prevent her from vomiting. She's also absolutely, completely, totally, off her tits. Mullered. Stoned. Caned. Fully in the yellow submarine.
Vet says this'll reset her appetite, or, when we stop giving her painkillers, show it's pain stopping her eating, which would mean medical imaging time.

She's eating a bit, and even played a little, but she's still on the medications so it might be that. Still giving her recovery fluids, which she's still not fighting as she would normally.

Valencia has decided we are all Suspicious. Won't come when called, runs if you go to her. Still comes on her own terms, so it's fine, she's just seen her adoptive sister repeatedly wrapped in a towel and made to drink Stuff, and she wants none of that, thank you very much.

Ming update: she's a little more active, but still floppy and sleeping a lot. She's on two lots of painkillers still, so she's probably fairly stoned.
She IS eating, little and often, and finished off the last of her rescue fluids from a saucer by herself. She's washing, but she hasn't slapped valencia in ages, and she's still not right. Hoping it's the painkillers, and that when we withdraw them, her appetite remains.

Ming has finished the course of painkillers and is showing determined desire to go out, which we're not allowing yet. She's eating, playing, but it'll be a few days until the drugs are cleared from her system and we'll then see how she is.
Cautiously optimistic.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Boradii vel uhcán eanet guoli ja bassii iežas. Maiddái lei vel uhcán eanet vuostálastin go dagain su loahpamus vuolidemiid juhkat.
Telefoneriimet ealliidivššárdoktárii otne iđit diibmu 8:30 jearrat ahte geahččaledje go su njálmmis vuollebeaivái go lei jávkan, daningo sus leat stuorra bealljepolypat. Mii oaivvilduvvui ahte doktár riehtá fas ringet. Ii son dahkan dan, ringeimet aiddo dál (16:45 báikkálaš áigi) ja muitaleigga ahte doktár ii lean otne barggus. Mun ledjen veahá suhttan ja dadjen: "dii oažžuidehpet eilen badjel £600, dii cealkiidet ahte ringet jos mis leat gažaldagat, mis leat gažaldagat maid dii it vástit!"
"Mun in liiko du jietnadagas, hearrá"
"Ii leat du sivva persovnnalaččat, muhto go mávssán measta duhát, de vuorddán bálvalusdási maid dii it fállá"
"Mun bivddán oktasaš ovttadaga doktára ringet du"

Oaidná doktára nuppi praksisas beaivváhálbma geažes eambbo vuosttaldanmielladávddaid vuostá. Ii galgga máksit olggobealde rabasáiggi haddi, daningo mii ringeimet vuosttažettiin iđit.
Oidnen aiddo vel 10 ml veajáhusvuolidemiid su siste.

Ruovttoluotta. Vuosttaldanmiella-báhppa, gabapentin, ja son lea ruovttus. Boradii veahá guoli ja veahá vuostá.
Oaččuimet sus maiddái eanet gabapentini tableahtta hámiin

Ii heaitte borramis. Fertet su hilgut vai ii okset. Son lea maiddái ollásit, dego visot, hui hui seavdnjat. Čuoldán. Stoned. Caned. Olleslaččat dan sárga submariinnas.
Doktár dadjá ahte dát bidjá su borranhálu fas ortnegii, dahje, go heaitit addimis su bákčaseaivvaid, de čájeha ahte bávččas leat dat mat hehttejit su boradit, ja dat mearkkaša ahte de dárbbašuvvo govveniskadeapmi.

Son borada veahá, ja vel speallagii uhcán, muhto son lea ain dál dain dálkkasiin, nu ahte dat sáhttá leat sivva. Addit suide ain recovery-vuolidemiid, maid son ii ain vuostálastte nu mo dábálaččat dahká.

Valencia lea mearridan ahte mii buohkat leat Suspektat. Ii boađe go gohčoduvvo, ja viegká jos manat su lusa. Boahtá vel iežas eavttuin, nu ahte buorre lea, son lea dušše oaidnán ahte su adoptiobárdničábbán leat máŋgga háve geavahuvvon báhppirnjuolggas ja bággejuvvon juhkat Stuorraid, ja son ii hálit mihkkege danlágan, giitu olu.

Ming-ođastus: son lea veaháš eanet aktiivvalaš, muhto lea ain geažes njálga ja nohkká olu. Son oažžu ain guokte sorta bákčaseaivvaid, nu ahte son lea várra hui seavdnjat.
Son borada, UNNA JA DÁVVIST, ja loahpai ieš maŋimuš veajáhusvuolidemiid skálžžis. Son bassá iežas, muhto ii leat dávjá šlapan Valencia guhká áiggis, ja son ii leat vel buorre. Sávvan ahte dát lea bákčaseaivvaid geažil, ja ahte go heaitit daid, de su borranhálu bissá.

Ming lea loahpahan bákčaseaivvaid kuursii ja čájeha nannosit ahte háliida olggos, muhto mii eat su vel diktte. Son borada, speallá, muhto dat váldá vel moadde beaivvi ovdalgo dálkkasat leat olggos su vuogádagas, ja de mii oaidnit mo son lea.
Várrugas optimisma.
hypo_1:
Son boradii vel uhcán eanet guoli ja bassii iežas. Maiddái son vuostálastii veahá eanet go bággejin su loahpas juhkat vuolidemiid.
Telefoneriimet ealliidoktárii otne iđit diibmu 8:30 jearrat, geahččaledje go su njálmmi soft palate vuolde go son lei jávkan, daningo sus leat stuorra bealljepolypat. Mii oaivvilduvvui ahte ealliidoktár ringe fas. Ii son ringen, ja go mii aiddo dál ringeimet (16:45 báikkálaš áigi), de mii gullaimet ahte ealliidoktár ii leat otne barggus. Mun ledjen veahá suhttan ja dadjen: "mii mávssi eilen badjel £600, dii cealkkibehtet ahte ringet jos mis leat gažaldagat, mis leat gažaldagat maid dii it vástit!"
"Mun in liiko du jietnadagas, hearrá"
"Ii leat du sivva persovnnalaččat, muhto go mávssán measta duhát, de vuorddán dakkár bálvalusa maid dii it leat addimin"
"Mun oaččuhán nuppi ovttadaga ealliidoktára ringet du"

Mannat nuppi praksisii beaivváhálbma geažes oažžut eanet vuosttaldanmiella-dálkkasa. Ii galgga máksit olggobealde rabasáiggi haddi, daningo mii ringeimet vuosttažettiin iđit.
Saihken aiddo vel 10 ml veajáhusvuolidemiid su siste.

Ii heaitte boradeamis. Fertet su maŋŋelit vai ii okset. Son lea maiddái ollásit, dego visot, hui seavdnjat. Mullered. Stoned. Caned. Olleslaččat dan fiskes submariinnas.
Ealliidoktár dadjá ahte dát sáhttá bidjat su borranhálu fas ortnegii, dahje ahte go mii heaitit addimis bákčaseaivvaid, de oidno ahte bávččasat leat dat mat hehttejit su boradit, ja de galggašii govveniskadeapmi.

Son borada veahá, ja vel speallagii uhcán, muhto son lea ain dálkkasiin, nu ahte sáhttá leat dan geažil. Addit suide ain veajáhusvuolidemiid, maid son ii ain vuostálastte nu mo dábálaččat dahká.

Valencia lea mearridan ahte mii buohkat leat Hui eahpáduslašat. Ii boađe go gohčoduvvo, ja viegká jos manat su lusa. Boahtá vel iežas eavttuin, nu ahte buorre lea; son lea dušše oaidnán ahte su adopterejuvvon oabbá lea máŋgii geardde báhccán liinna siste ja bággejuvvon juhkat Juoidá, ja son ii háliit mihkkege dakkáris, giitu olu.

Ming-ođastus: son lea veaháš eanet aktiivvalaš, muhto lea ain luovvan ja nohkká olu. Son oažžu ain guokte sorta bákčaseaivvaid, nu ahte son lea várra veahá seavdnjat.
Son GAL borada, unnán ja dávjá, ja loahpai ieš maŋimuš veajáhusvuolidemiid skálžžis. Son bassá iežas, muhto ii leat šláhppán Valencia guhká áiggis, ja son ii leat vel buorre. Sávvan ahte dát lea bákčaseaivvaid geažil, ja ahte go mii heaitit daid, de su borranhálu bissá.

Ming lea loahpahan bákčaseaivvaid kuursii ja čájeha nannosit ahte háliida olggos, muhto mii eat su vel diktte. Son borada, speallá, muhto dat váldá vel moadde beaivvi ovdal go dálkkasat leat olggos su vuogádagas, ja de mii oaidnit mo son lea.
Várrugas optimisttalaččat.

Mannat nuppi praksisii beaivváhálbma geažes oažžut eanet vuosttalduhttinmiella-dálkkasa. Sii eai áigo váldit olggobealde rabasáiggi haddi, daningo mii riŋgeimet vuosttažettiin iđit.
Saihken aiddo vel 10 ml veajáhusvuolidemiid su siste.

Ruovttoluotta. Vuosttalduhttinmiella-báhppa, gabapentin, ja dál son lea ruovttus. Boradii veahá guoli ja veahá vuostá.
Oaččuimet suide maiddái eanet gabapentini tableahttahámis

Ii heaitte boradeamis. Fertet su veahá maŋŋelit vai ii okset. Son lea maiddái ollásit, dievasit, oktiibuot hui seavdnjat. Mullered. Stoned. Caned. Olleslaččat fiskes submariinnas.
Ealliidoktár dadjá ahte dát bidjá su borranhálu fas ortnegii, dahje ahte go mii heaitit addimis bákčaseaivvaid, de oidno ahte bávččasat leat dat mat hehttejit su boradeamis, ja dat mearkkašivččii ahte lea govveniskadeami áigi.

Son borada veahá, ja vel speallagii uhcán, muhto son lea ain dálkkasiin, nu ahte sáhttá leat dan geažil. Addit suide ain veajáhusvuolidemiid, maid son ii ain vuostálastte nu mo dábálaččat dahká.

Valencia lea mearridan ahte mii buohkat leat hui eahpáduslašat. Ii boađe go gohčoduvvo, ja viegká jos manat su lusa. Boahtá vel iežas eavttuin, nu ahte buorre lea; son lea dušše oaidnán ahte su adopterejuvvon oabbá lea máŋgii geardde báhccán liinna siste ja bággejuvvon juhkat Juoidá, ja son ii háliit mihkkege dakkáris, giitu olu.

Ming-ođastus: son lea veaháš eanet aktiivvalaš, muhto lea ain luovvan ja nohkká olu. Son oažžu ain guokte sorta bákčaseaivvaid, nu ahte son lea várra veahá seavdnjat.
Son GAL borada, unnán ja dávjá, ja loahpai ieš maŋimuš veajáhusvuolidemiid skálžžis. Son bassá iežas, muhto ii leat šláhppán Valencia guhká áiggis, ja son ii leat vel buorre. Sávvan ahte dát lea bákčaseaivvaid geažil, ja ahte go mii heaitit daid, de su borranhálu bissá.

Ming lea loahpahan bákčaseaivvaid kuursa ja čájeha nannosit ahte háliida olggos, muhto mii eat su vel diktte. Son borada, speallá, muhto dat váldá vel moadde beaivvi ovdal go dálkkasat leat olggos su vuogádagas, ja de mii oaidnit mo son lea.
Várrugas optimisttalaččat.

source_doc:
(1/?)
@lorry
> Bumble is dire at Trust and Safety
Care to expand on that or link me?
> Whitney (Bumble) [is] a billionaire anyway, so what does she care?
I presume she didn't found Bumble by herself, maybe wasn't even part of the original group (as with Melon Husk and Tesla). What about the rest of them?
@screwlisp

(2/?)
@lorry
> I imagine there's still space for going back to the old model
There's plenty of new models to be tried that would be a huge improvement over playing hashtag roulette, either on DataFarms or decentralised social networks. One idea I saw was online dating as a group-based social experience. This is a handwave in the right direction. As is @cy's idea about matchmakers in another branch of this thread.

(3/?)
Speaking of roulette, what about a Chat Roulette style speed-dating app?
The app could;
* perform some basic T&S vetting (to minimise unsolicited dick-cam, etc), including confirming what general area you're in (ask me how!)
* throw you into a round of realtime speed dating with others in your area (text? Voice? Video? see 4/4).
* As with normal speed dating, if you both Favourite each other after talking, you get each others' contacts
#OnlineDating #ChatRoulette

@strypey I nearly joined #Chatroulette, but then Covid and the Ukraine war started, so that never went anywhere. I had a different direction I wanted to take them, though.
#Bumble #TrustAndSafety ? Well, the industry isn't exactly full of dating site whistleblowers, but safety workers in the industry do talk to me. I know more than I would ever want to know about the inside workings of most dating sites, and sadly. It's not really an amazing revelation that Bumble is as bad as the rest, though.
None of the dating sites puts more than a veneer of effort into T&S. They weigh the cost of litigation against the cost of actually doing the work, and so far, litigation costs have always been lower.

@lorry
> he industry isn't exactly full of dating site whistleblowers
Any particular reason for that?
> They weigh the cost of litigation against the cost of actually doing the work, and so far, litigation costs have always been lower
Huh. The Fight Club principle at work. Sad. We deserve better from our digital matchmaking tools.

Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text.
