hypo_0:
(1/?)
@lorry
> Bumble lea hirbmat heittot luohttehahttivuođas ja dorvvolašvuođas
Háliidatgo dán eanet čilgehit dahje munnje liŋket?
> Whitney (Bumble) lea goitge miljardeara, de mii sus lea fuola?
Mun navddan ahte ii son vuođđudan Bumble iešsát, ja vejolaččat ii lean ge vuosttaš joavkkus ge (nugo Melon Husk ja Tesla). Mo leat earáid dilli?
@screwlisp

(2/?)
@lorry
> Mun jurddašan ahte boares modealla guvlui ain lea sadji máhcat
Leat ollu ođđa modeallat maid sáhtášii geahččalit, ja dat buoridivčče ollu eanet go speallat hashtag-rulettha, sihke DataFarms:s dahje desentraliserejuvvon sosiála fierpmádagain. Okta idea maid mun oidnen, lei ahte neahtta-deaivvadeapmi livččii joavkkuide vuođđuduvvon sosiála vásáhus. Dat lea sullii gieđabastin rivttes guvlui. Seammal go @cy idea matchmakereid birra dán ságastallama eará suorggis.

(3/?)
Go leat juo ruletthas hupman, mii livččii Chat Roulette-šlájat jođánis deaivvadan-appa?
Appa sáhtášii;
* dahkat muhtun vuođđodásis T&S dárkkisteami (vai unnidit oktageahččat čuoččuhangovvuid jna), maiddái duođaštit makkár guovllus don leat (jeara mus mo!)
* bálkestit du reaaliaigásaš jođánis deaivvadanvuoruide earáiguin du guovllus (teaksta? Jietna? Video? geahča 4/4).
* Nugo dábálaš jođánis deaivvadeamis, jos moabbat merkebehtet guđegeará Favorihttan ságastallama maŋŋel, de oažžubeahtti guđegeará oktavuođadieđuid
#Neahttadeaivvadeapmi #ChatRoulette

@strypey Mun lahka liikon #Chatroulette:i, muhto de Covid ja Ukraina soahti álggahedje, nu ahte das ii šat šaddan mihkkege. Mus lei gal eará suunta maid in háliidan doidii váldit.
#Bumble #LuohttehahttivuohtaJaDorvvolašvuohta ? No, ii dát industriija leat baš de dievas deaivvadansiiddu vuoigatvuođaskaddiid almmuhaddiin, muhto dorvvolašvuođabargit industriijas hupmet munnje. Mun dieđán eanet go goassege háliidivččen diehtit eanas deaivvadansiidduid sistebargguid birra, ja dat lea váivi. Ii leat duođasge makkárge stuorra paljastus ahte Bumble lea nu heittot go earáidge.
Ii oktage deaivvadansiiddus bidja eanet go oinnolaš geahččalusa T&S:i. Sii máidnastit áššáiduhttima goluid vuostá daid goluid mat manašedje dasa ahte bargu duođaid dahkkojuvvo, ja dán rádjai leat áššáiduhttima golut álo leamaš unnit.

@lorry
> industriijas ii leat baš de ollu deaivvadansiiddu vuoigatvuođaskaddiid almmuhaddit
Leago das erenoamáš siva?
> Sii máidnastit áššáiduhttima goluid vuostá daid goluid mat manašedje dasa ahte bargu duođaid dahkkojuvvo, ja dán rádjai leat áššáiduhttima golut álo leamaš unnit
Huh. Fight Club-prinsihppa doaimmas. Moras. Mii galašit buoret digitála gáibádanreaiddut mat buktet olbmuid oktii.

> Sii veardidit rihkkosáššiid goluid dasa, man olu dat duohta bargu mávssášii, ja dán rádjai leat rihkkosáššigollut álo leamaš unnit
Huh. Fight Club-prinsihppa doaimmas. Moras. Mii gal anssášeimmet buoret digitála reaidduid mat veahkehit olbmuid gávdnat guoimmi.

source_doc:
I'm being weird.
But you.
Oh, I'm not too worried about that.
Being with you just now is so nice.
I mean, taking a trip to a regular grocery store with a regular guy.
In a regular limo?
Yeah, but it felt good to spend the afternoon.
That had nothing to do with the record business.
I mean, to get away from all those people who only act nice to you because they want something.
You run into a lot of those, huh?
Yeah.
Even my grandmother sends me demo tapes.
So what were you afraid was weird?

source_doc:
I just had a very nice #dream that I made friends with Lee Chaeyeon. I just started talking to her nand the next thing I know, I have stayed over her house (like when the French kidnapped me for Christmas) and she is telling me to go up stairs and "shuffle up a little bit" (her English was generally excellent) by which she meant "tidy up a little bit" to show her mom we were ready to eat.
She comes upstairs to "shuffle up" her room and starts making gestures to explain what she means ...
1/

(she was always so excited to see me in this dream) because I was taking my coat off instead of "shuffling up."
Then she indicates this little piece of paper and says she has left me an autograph but in return she wants this little trading card I made in second grade of "50 Spikes," a sonic knock-off, obviously with more spikes. (This card actually exists IRL BTW). I start explaining to her what it is and if she really wants it (she did) I at least needed a picture of her holding it.
2/

Partly because I would miss it, but also, otherwise no one would believe me that she had wanted this thing from me.
It was then I realized we still didn't have each others' phone numbers.
3/3
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Mun oidnen álgo justta hui somá #niehku mas mun šadden ustibin Lee Chaeyeonain. Mun dušše álggahin surrat suinna ja boahtáge de boahtte ášši lea ahte mun lean mannan su ruovttus iiđidit (nugo go fránskkat rievdadedje mu juovllaid várás) ja son lohká munnje ahte mana bajás trappaid ja "shuffle up a little bit" (su eŋgelasgiella lei oppalaččat hui buorre), mas son mearkkašii "ordne veaháš" vai čájeha eadnásis ahte mii leat gearggus borrat.
Son boahtá bajás "shuffle up" iežas lanjas ja álggaha liikostit gieđain čilget maid son mearkkaša ...
1/

(son lei dán nieggas álo nu ilus go oinnii mu) danin go mun válddán mu beaskka eret iige lean "shuffling up."
De son čájeha dán unna báhpárbihtá ja lohká ahte son lea guođđán munnje autográfa, muhto ruovttoluotta son háliida dán unna lonohallankortta maid mun ráhkadin nubbi luohkás, "50 Spikes," Sonic-kopiija, čielgasit eanet spihkaiguin. (Dát korta duođaid lea gávdnamis IRL, muide). Mun álggahin sutnje čilget maid dat lea, ja jos son duođaid háliidii dan (son háliidii), de mun dárbbašin unnimusat gova sus go son doallá dan gieđas.
2/

Muhtin oasis danin go mun livččen dan váilihan, muhto maiddái danin go muđui ii oktage oskošehčče mu ahte son lei háliidan dán diŋgga mus.
De dalle mun fuobmájin ahte mis ain eai lean guovttoset telefonnummirat.
3/3

De dalle mun fuobmájin ahte mis ain eai lean guhtet guimmiideamet telefonnummirat.

hypothesis:
Mun oidnen easka hui somá #niehku mas mun šadden ustibin Lee Chaeyeonain. Mun dušše álggahin ságastallat suinna, ja de dan boahtte áigge fuobmájin ahte lean su luhtte idjadallan (nugo dalle go fránskkat “rievdade” mu juovllaid áigge), ja son lohká munnje ahte galggan mannat bajás trappaid ja "shuffle up a little bit" (su eŋgelasgiella lei oppalaččat hui buorre), mas son mearkkašii ahte “ortnet veaháš” vai čájehit eatnis ahte mii leat gearggus borrat.
Son boahtá bajás iežas latnjii “shuffle up” dahkat ja álggaha gieđaid lihkostit vai čilget maid son dainna mearkkaša ...
1/

(son lei dán nieggas álo nu ilus go oinnii mu), danin go mun válddán beaskka eret iige álggán “shuffle up.”
De son čájeha dán unna báhpárbihtá ja lohká ahte son lea guođđán munnje autográfa, muhto dan ovddas son háliida dán unna lonohallankortta maid mun ráhkadin nubbiluohkás “50 Spikes”, Sonic-kopiija, diehttelasat eanet spihkaiguin. (Dát korta duođaid gávdno IRL, muide.) Mun álggahan sutnje čilget maid dat lea, ja jos son duođaid háliida dan (ja son háliidii), de mun unnimusat dárbbašin gova sus go son doallá dan gieđas.
2/

Oassálit danin go mun váiliživččen dan, muhto maiddái danin go muđui ii oktage oskošivčče mu ahte son lei háliidan dán diŋgga mus.
De dalle mun fuobmájin ahte mis ain eai lean guhtet guimmiideamet telefonnummirat.
3/3

source_doc:
"An utterly miserable day": Kempton Park meeting marred by death of three horses

The Lanzarote Hurdle card at Kempton Park was marred by the death of three horses, including the Grade One-winning Kalif Du Berlais, whose loss Paul Nicholls described as "a big kick in the teeth" and a "sad day."

Kalif Du Berlais - whose ownership group includes Sir Alex Ferguson - unseated Harry Cobden in the four-runner Coral Silviniaco Conti Chase and landed lame, with the broken shoulder he sustained proving untreatable and he was euthanised by the veterinary team on Saturday.

Nicholls said: "It's a sad day when you lose horses like that, it's hard on the whole team. It's a big kick in the teeth for everyone, the owners, the poor girl who looks after him - you hate to see that happen. He was just showing his class today, he jumped and travelled well and sadly now he will never be able to show the potential we thought he had.

"I can say as much as I like, but it's just a shame for the whole team. Harry was extremely upset and is missing his ride in the last as he doesn't feel great about it. He's a big, bold horse who attacks his fences and those horses, when they do that, can end up having a bad fall.

"He was enthusiastic today and travelling beautifully and we'll never know where we would have ended up, we've always had a lot of faith in him. These things happen, sadly, and we'll have to try to pick ourselves up and move forward. These horses get the best of everything, there's not much you can say to make it better at this point.

"It never gets any easier when these things happen and it's a big old blow."

In the Coral Daily Rewards Shaker Handicap Chase, Jonjo and AJ O'Neill's Peso was pulled up on the flat with an injury that could not be treated, leaving racecourse vets with no choice but to euthanise him.

Harry Derham saddled Wertpol for the juvenile hurdle and the horse looked to be running a huge race before falling at the last and sustaining a life-ending injury. Derham said on his X account: "An utterly miserable day at Kempton Park today losing Wertpol who we only had the good fortune of having in our yard for a short period of time.

"It's a sad day when you lose horses like that, it's hard on the whole team. It's a big kick in the teeth for everyone," said Paul Nicholls. Photograph: Alan Crowhurst/Getty Images

"He was a bright talent who was fresh and happy doing his work every day, often playing around and expressing himself. He loved his job and I am so sad for his Heart Of The South syndicate, who are the most wonderful group of people. Racing can at times be a painful sport and today has been a tough day for a number of connections. A day to forget."

A spokesperson for Kempton Park said: "All of us at Kempton Park care deeply about the welfare of all racehorses, as do the thousands of racing staff who provide them with world-class levels of care at home every day. Our heartfelt condolences are with the connections of all three horses."

hypo_0:
"Duođaid heajos beaivi": Kempton Parka gilvu lea suorggahit golmma heasta jápmima geažil

Kempton Parka Lanzarote Hurdle -gilvobeaivvi lea suorggahit golmma heasta jápmin, maiddái Grade One-vuittuheaddji Kalif Du Berlais, man massima Paul Nicholls govvidii go "stuora čuohppu bániide" ja "suorggás beaivi".

Kalif Du Berlais - man eaiggádbuohka siskkilda Sir Alex Fergusonage - jáhkkui Harry Cobdena njealje-heasta Coral Silviniaco Conti Chase -gilvosis ja boahtii ruovttoluotta láibin; su biepmojuvvon oaži šattai nu vahágaheapmái ahte dan ii sáhttán dikšut, ja eallindohppárjoavku bissehii dan lauppaloggabeaivve.

Nicholls dadjai: "Lea suorggás beaivi go massá nuppiid heasttaid, dat lea váttis olles joavkui. Dat lea stuora čuohppu bániide buohkaide, eaiggádiidda, geasis nieidii gii dan fuolahii - ii hálit oaidnit ahte nu dáhpáhuvvá. Son lei aiddo čájeheame iežas buoremusvuođa otne, son njuikii ja lihkostuvai bures, ja suorggás dál ii son goassege šat sáhte čájehit dan vejolašvuođa maid mii jáhkkiimet sus leat.

"Mun sáhtán dadjat maid beare olu, muhto dat lea dušše heahppi olles joavkui. Harry lei hirbmat suorggadit ja ii mana maŋimuš gilvui, danne go son ii dovdda iežas bures dan geažil. Son lea stuoris, rohkkas heasta gii ruhtada geaidnuidis, ja go nuppiid heasttat dahket nu, de sii sáhttet heađalaš luohttama oažžut.

"Son lei otne áŋgir ja johttii hui čábbát, ja mii eat goassege dieđe gos mii livččiimet loahpahallan; mii leat álo oalle luohtán sutnje. Dákkár áššit dáhpáhuvvet, suorggás, ja mii fertet geahččalit čohkket iežamet fas ja joatkit ovddosguvlui. Dáid heasttaid fuolahit buot buoremusat, ii leat ollu maid sáhttá dadjat mii buoridivččii dili dál.

"Dat ii goassege šatta álkit go dákkár áššit dáhpáhuvvet, ja dat lea hirbmat garra časkin."

Coral Daily Rewards Shaker Handicap Chase -gilvosis Jonjo ja AJ O'Neill Peso bissehuvvui njoammil vahága geažil maid ii sáhttán dikšut, nu ahte gilvobálgá eallindohppáriin ii lean eará vejolašvuohta go bissehit dan.

Harry Derham lei bidjan Wertpol gilvui nuoraid hurdle-gilvus, ja heasta orui jođiheame hui buori gilvvu ovdal go luoitái maŋimuš geardde ja oaččui vahága mii bissehii su eallima. Derham čálii iežas X-konttus: "Duođaid heajos beaivi Kempton Parkas otne go massiimet Wertpola, gean mii oaččuimet buori lihkostuvvamin dušše oanehis áigái min šilljus.

"Lea suorggás beaivi go massá nuppiid heasttaid, dat lea váttis olles joavkui. Dat lea stuora čuohppu bániide buohkaide," dadjá Paul Nicholls. Govva: Alan Crowhurst/Getty Images

"Son lei čuvges talentta geain lei ođđaŋasvuohta ja son lei ilolaš barggusis juohke beaivve, dávjá speallame ja čájeheame iežas. Son ráhkistii barggus, ja mun lean hui suorggi su Heart Of The South-syndikáhtii, mii lea buoremus olbmuidjoavku. Gilvu sáhttá muhtumin leat báhkkan sporta, ja otne lea lean váttis beaivi máŋgga osolaččaide. Beaivi maid galgá vajálduhttit."

Kempton Parka ovddasteaddji dadjai: "Buohkat mii Kempton Parkas fuolahit váimmolaččat buot gilvoheasttaid buresveadjima birra, nugo maiddái dat duhát gilvobargit geat addet sidjiide máilmmi dási fuolahusa ruovttus juohke beaivve. Min váimmolaš oasálahtut leat buot golmma heasta lagašlaččaiguin."

The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. source_doc:
And being one of the weirdo, we just frequently get attacks here and there. Either online, offline, or even from your closest people. Those attacks usually stem from homophobia, transphobia, or sometimes just, don't like how weird we are and how weird we act, especially furries that do deeper immersions like roleplaying and therianthropy.

Hence some of us got safety by not needing to tell who we are and where we were from. Some of us got safety by only revealing ourselves to our friends or close friends. Face/body reveal is a culture that most of the furries did at least once in a private post, whether it be "delete soon" kind of post or in story.

Despite being so, we're still open for social interactions offline. We do furmeets—a personal meeting between furries, be it in a group or personal, be it in an event or just casually—and sometimes making a con/fur on, such as MWFF, IWAG, PAWAI, FURUM, and so on. It's fun to meet them offline, get to know each other, be able to see them in person as most of us have never seen each other's faces, take a photo to keep personally and censor publicly, laugh together and discuss similar interests, and so on. It's fun, social, and warm.

Although, things don't feel the same today. As people start trying to strip anonymity of people, attack furries, therian, LGBTQIA, and dox them, as how also our community participate and stir the dramas inside, things has been a little more chaotic, less warm, and less feeling like community or family. It's not the same anymore.

Part of me hopes things can return to how it feels in the 2000s and 2010s, but, I'll just let God do the rest. I'm a little hopeless in society and humans. I'm tired of how things get worse and meant to attack and divide small communities into a hopeless being. I don't like how society is now no longer respecting and being in unity.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Ja go leat okta dain erenoamážit olmmošiin, de mii ožžot dávjá vaššalaš rávvagiid doppe ja dáppe. Sihke neahtas, olggobealde neahta, dahje vel lagamus olbmuin. Dát rávvagat boahtet dávjá homofobiijas, transfobiijas, dahje muhtin geardde dušše das ahte sii eai mielas doaimma dan mo erenoamáš mii leat ja mo erenoamážit mii láhtet, erenoamážit furryt geat mannet viidáset immersiovddas, nugo roleplay ja therianthropy.

Danin muhtimat mis ožžohtit dorvvu dan bokte ahte ii dárbbaš muitalit geat mii leat ja gos mii leat boahtán. Muhtimat mis ožžot dorvvu dušše dan bokte ahte čájehit iežaset ustibiidda dahje lagas ustibiidda. Face/body reveal lea kultuvra maid eanas furryt leat dahkan unnimusat oktii priváhta-posttas, lea go dat “sihkkut fargga” šládja posttat dahje story:s.

Vaikko lea nu, de mii leat vel rabasat sosiála oktavuođaide olggobealde neahta. Mii doallat furmeet:id — persovnnalaš deaivvadeapmi furryiid gaskkas, leago joavkkus dahje persovnnalaččat, leago eventtas dahje dušše casualat — ja muhtin geardde ráhkadit con/furon, nugo MWFF, IWAG, PAWAI, FURUM, ja nu ain. Lea somá deaivvadit sin olggobealde neahta, oahpásmuvvat guhtet guimmiide, beassat oidnit sin persovnnalaččat go eanetin mis eai leat goassege oaidnán guhtet guimmiid vuddagiid, váldit govva maid seailluhit iežat várás ja cenzureret almmolaččat, boagustit ovttas ja ságastallat seamma beroštumiid birra, ja nu ain. Lea somá, sosiála, ja liekkas.

Muhto, dat eai dovdo seamma láhkai odne. Go olbmot álget geahččalit váldit eret olbmuid anonymitehta, rávvet furryiid, therianiid, LGBTQIA-olbmuid, ja doxxet sin, ja go min searvi maid searvá ja buvttada dramaid siskkobealde, de áššit leat šaddan veahá eanet chaosalažžan, unnit liekkasin, ja unnit seammalágan searvevuohtan dahje bearašin. Dat ii leat seamma šat.

Oassi mus doaivvu ahte áššit sáhttet máhccat dasa mo dat dovdojedje 2000- ja 2010-loguin, muhto mun divttán Ipmila dahkat loahpa. Mun lean veahá doaivvuhis servodaga ja olbmuid ektui. Mun lean váiban das mo áššit mannet dušše vearrát ja leat jurddašuvvon rávvet ja juohkit unna searvviid doaivvuhisvuođa guvlui. Mun in liiko das mo servodat dál ii šat gudne ja leat ovttasvuođas.

Ja go leat okta dain maid eará olbmot atnet erenoamážit, de mii oaččut dávjá ávkkiid ja veahkkaválddi dáppe ja doppe. Sihke neahtas, olggobealde neahta, dahje vel iežat lagamus olbmoin. Dát rávvagat boahtet dábálaččat homofobiijas, transfobiijas, dahje muhtumin dušše das ahte sii eai liiko dan mo erenoamáš mii leat ja mo mii láhtet, erenoamážit furryt geat mannet buoret mielde iešguđetlágan immersiovttaide, nugo roleplayii ja therianthropyiin.

Danin muhtimat mis leat dovdan iežaset dorvvolažžan go eai dárbbaš muitalit geat sii leat ja gos sii leat boahtán. Muhtimat leat ožžon dorvvu dušše dan bokte ahte sii čájehit iežaset ustibiidda dahje lagas ustibiidda. Face/body reveal lea kultuvra maid eanas furryt leat dahkan unnimusat oktii priváhta-posttas, leago dat “delete soon” šládja posttat dahje story:s.

Lea hui somá deaivvadit sin olggobealde neahta, oahpásmuvvat guhtet guimmiide, oaidnit guđege persovnnalaččat go eanas mis eai leat goassege oaidnán guhtet guimmiid vuddagiid, váldit govvva maid seailluhit iežaset várás ja cenzureret almmolaččat, boagustit ovttas ja ságastallat seammalágan beroštumiid birra, ja nu ain. Muhto odne ii dat dovdo seamma šat. Dat ii leat seamma šat.

Oassi mus doaivvu ahte áššit sáhttet máhccat dasa mo dat dovdojedje 2000- ja 2010-loguin, muhto mun divttán Ipmila fuolahit loahpa. Mun lean veahá doaivvuhis servodaga ja olbmuid ektui. Muhtimat leat ožžon dorvvu dan bokte ahte čájehit iežaset dušše ustibiidda dahje hui lagas ustibiidda. Face/body reveal lea kultuvra maid eanet furryt leat dahkan unnimusat oktii priváhta-posttas, leago dat “delete soon” -šládja postta dahje story.

Vaikko lea nu, de mii leat ain rabasat sosiála deaivvademiide olggobealde neahta. Mii lágidit furmeet:id — persovnnalaš deaivvadeami furryiid gaskkas, joavkkus dahje guovttos, eventtas dahje dušše casualat — ja muhtumin maiddái conaid/furconaid, nugo MWFF, IWAG, PAWAI, FURUM, ja nu ain. Lea somá deaivvadit sin olggobealde neahta, oahpásmuvvat guhtet guimmiide, oaidnit guđege olmmožin go eanas mis eai leat goassege oaidnán guhtet guimmiid vuddagiid, váldit govvva maid seailluhit iežas várás ja almmolaččat cenzureret, boagustit ovttas ja ságastallat seammalágan beroštumiid birra, ja nu ain. Lea somá, sosiála ja liekkas.

Muhto odne ii dat dovdo seamma šat. Go olbmot álget geahččalit váldit anonymitehta eret, rávvet furryiid, therianiid, LGBTQIA-olbmuid, ja doxxet sin, ja go maiddái min searvi searvá siskkáldas draamaide ja buvttada daid vel eanet, de áššit leat šaddan veahá eanet kaotalažžan, unnit liekkasin, ja unnit seammaláganin go searvi dahje bearaš. Dat ii leat seamma šat.

Oassi mus doaivvu ahte áššit sáhttet máhccat dasa mo dat dovdojedje 2000- ja 2010-loguin, muhto mun divttán Ipmila fuolahit loahpa. Mun lean veahá doaivvuhis servodaga ja olbmuid ektui. Mun lean váiban das mo áššit mannet ain vearrát, ja mo unna searvvit geahččaluvvojit rávvet ja juohkit nu ahte das šaddá dušše doaivvuhisvuohta. Mun in liiko das mo servodat dál ii šat gudne earáid dahje eallá ovttasvuođas.

source_doc:
:redpanda: sometimes people will ask us like "what if you got a publisher for [game] wouldn't that be wicked?" but the problem is that all that would have to go through our game director, Ashe, who's said she wont speak to any publisher who doesn't address her as Ashe
the second she gets "Jess" the deal ends

:redpanda: and in a world where like, not even the AI slop publishers sending AI emails, but the people who have been flat out rude and some of them like, you could *feel* the misogyny dripping off their email, we're not really interested in talking to any of them lol

:redpanda: (I will shout out the publishers who have reached out to us though who have been like "here's some of the games we've published" and, out of their catalog, they picked out exclusively furry games. at least they did their homework)

:redpanda: anyways if you ever were like "I don't understand why Blobun isn't on switch? it'd be a perfect fit" that's why, and we can't afford the devkit and version of gamemaker that does that export, so yea you gotta go steam deck (or x86-ARM converter on those anbernics) if you want it on the go

hypo_0:
:redpanda: muhtumin olbmot jearahit min dego "muhto maid jos dii ožžobehtet almmuheaddji [game]-ii, ii dat leat hui buorre?" muhto váttisvuohta lea ahte buot dat ferte mannat min speallastivrralačča, Ashe, bokte, ja son lea cealkán ii hálit hupmat oktage almmuheaddjiin ii ge son geat eai čujot su Ashen
nuppi sekunddas go son ožžu "Jess", sohppon jávká

:redpanda: ja máilmmis gos dego, ii dušše dat AI-buoidan almmuheaddjit geat sáddet AI-imeaila, muhto maiddái dat olbmot geat leat leamaš njuolggo rude, ja muhtun sis dego, don sáhtát *dovdat* mo misogyniija golggai sin imeailas, de ii min duođaid beroštupmi leat hupmat oktage sis lol

:redpanda: (mun gal háliidan maid namuhit daid almmuheaddjiid geat leat váldán oktavuođa minguin ja leamaš dego "dát leat muhtun spealut maid mii leat almmuhan" ja de, sin katalogas, sii válljejit dušše furry-spealuid. unnimusat sii leat bargan ruovttobarggu)

:redpanda: muhto geahča, jos don goassege leat jurddašan dego "mun in ipmir manne Blobun ii leat switchas? dat livččii perfektalaš seammaheapmi" de danin, ja mii eat máhte máksit ovdánahttinreaiddu ja dán exporta dahkan Gamemaker-veršuvnna, nu ahte joo fertet mannat steam deckain (dahje x86-ARM-konverterain dain anbernicain) jos háliidat dan mátkkis mielde

source_doc:
Ashley Barnes at the double as Burnley claim welcome win over Millwall

Ashley Barnes bagged a brace as Burnley put their Premier League worries on hold to cruise into the fourth round of the FA Cup with a 5-1 win over Millwall.

The 36-year-old scored his first goal of the season early on and added his second midway through the second half as the blundering Lions gifted a confident home side the most emphatic of wins.

Boss Scott Parker made eight changes to the side that started in Wednesday's 2-2 draw with Manchester United and they did not disappoint, as further goals from Loum Tchaouna and Jaidon Anthony put them out of sight by half-time.

Substitute Jaydon Banel added Burnley's fifth on the stroke of 90 minutes before the shell-shocked Lions, who had completely capitulated, netted an added-time consolation through Josh Coburn.

Burnley dominated the opening exchanges and grabbed the lead in the 11th minute when Jacob Bruun Larsen squared for Barnes to sweep home past visiting goalkeeper Steven Benda.

The Lions mustered little in response, with Aidomo Emakhu booting their best chance straight at Burnley keeper Max Weiss after being released down the left by Joe Bryan.

But the visitors slowly grew into the game and should have levelled when Jake Cooper got his head on Alfie Doughty's cross from deep on the left but was denied by a brilliant over-arm save from Weiss.

The keeper saved again from Cooper on the half-hour as Millwall threatened a leveller but the visitors were undone by two defensive errors that put the game beyond their grasp.

Tchaouna was allowed to thread his left-foot shot from the edge of the box past a static Benda on 35 minutes and shortly before the break the Millwall keeper's poor clearance ultimately gifted Anthony the chance to slide home his side's third.

Millwall looked livelier at the start of the second half and Thierno Ballo should have done better when he found space to get a shot off in the left side of the box, but the home side were clearly in cruise control.

Tchaouna came close to his second when he rifled a shot against the outside of Benda's right-hand post and the increasingly inevitable fourth arrived on 65 minutes when Kamarl Grant made a hash of clearing Anthony's right-wing cross and a delighted Barnes mopped up.

Hunting for a hat-trick, Barnes flashed a header straight at Benda as the linesman's flag was raised, but it was Banel who completed the rout from close range before Coburn's confident finish in stoppage time.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Ashley Barnes guovtti golain go Burnley oaččui buori vuittu Millwalla badjel

Ashley Barnes čuohppii guokte goalu go Burnley biddjii Premier League-baluid doarvái ja álkit beasai FA Cupa njealját vuoruide 5–1 vuittuin Millwalla badjel.

36-jahkásaš čuohppii vuosttaš goalusis dán áigodagas jo álggus ja lasihii nuppi goalusis nubbi beali gaskka rájes, go boastut Lions attii iešdovdduvvan ruovttobeallái iežas buoremus ja čielga vuittu.

Ovddasvástideaddji Scott Parker rievdadii gávcci spēlariid dan liidnus mii álggahii gaskavahku 2–2 dássevuđđema Manchester Uniteda vuostá, ja sii eai heaittihan, go vel golat Loum Tchaounas ja Jaidon Anthonys dagahin ahte sii ledje juo olggos oaidnosis bealleáiggi rádjai.

Molsašupmái boahtán Jaydon Banel lasihii Burnley viđát goala 90 minuhta rádjai, ovdal go šokkerduvvon Lions, mii lei ollásit geažuhan, čuohppii lassááigge lohttaseaddji goala Josh Coburna bokte.

Burnley hálddašii álggu dáhpáhusaid ja váldii jo johtui 11. minuhtas, go Jacob Bruun Larsen addii Barnesii, guhte čuohppii ruovttui guossiheaddji goalkeeper Steven Benda badjel.

Lions ii bargan olu vástádussan, ja Aidomo Emakhu časkkui sin buoremus vejolašvuođa njuolga Burnley goalie Max Weissii maŋŋel go Joe Bryan lei su luovvan gurut bealde ovddas.

Muhto guossit lassánedje mielde speallái ja livčče galgan dásset, go Jake Cooper oažžui oaivilii Alfie Doughty guhkás gurut bealde boahtán ruossa birra, muhto Weiss eastadii su čábbát badjelgieđain dahkkon várjalemiin.

Goalie várjjalii fas Cooperis bealle diimmu maŋŋel, go Millwall uhkidedii dássema, muhto guossit biddjojuvvojedje eret guovtti suddjonmeattáhusa geažil, mat dagahin ahte speallu ii šat lean sin gieđas.

Tchaouna oaččui 35. minuhtas friddja časkkit gurutjuolggis skuvlla boksu ravddas badjel stilla Benda, ja áibbas ovdal boatkama Millwall goalkeeper heajos eretčaskin loahpalaččat attii Anthonyi vejolašvuođa čuohppit iežas liidnu goalu nummir golbma.

Millwall orrui ealásut nuppi beali álggus, ja Thierno Ballo livččii galgan buorebut geavahit vejolašvuođa go son gávnnahii sajádaga časkit boksu gurut bealde, muhto ruovttobealli lei čielgasit hálddašeamen spealu alcces iežas ritmmain.

Tchaouna lei lahka nuppi goalasis go son časkkii garrasit Benda olgeš beale poastta olggobeallái, ja eanet ja eanet várrahuvvon njealját goal boahtii 65. minuhtas, go Kamarl Grant dustii heittot eret Anthony olgeš siivva ruossa ja ilu Barnes čorget loahpačohkkes.

Barnes, guhte bivdii hat-tricka, oaivilčaskkii njuolga Benda guvlui seamma bottas go siiddu duomár geasse bajás lippu, muhto lei Banel guhte ollánii vuoittu lahkabáikkis ovdal go Coburn čuohppii iešdovddus lohppas stoppan áiggis.

Millwall orrui eanet eallinmielalažžan nuppi beali álggus, ja Thierno Ballo livččii galgan buorebut lihkostuvvat go son gávnnahii sajádaga časkit boksu gurut bealde, muhto ruovttobealli lei čielgasit visot hálddašeamen.

Muhto guossit bohte láivvit mielde speallái ja livčče galgan dásset, go Jake Cooper oaččui oaivilii Alfie Doughty ruossa guhkás gurutbealde, muhto Weiss eastadii su čáppa várjalemiin.

Goalie várjjalii fas Cooper časkima bealle diimmu maŋŋel, go Millwall uhkidedii dássema, muhto guossit heitejit ieža eret guovtti suddjonmeattáhusa geažil, mat mearridedje spealu.

Tchaouna oaččui 35. minuhtas friddja časkit gurutjuolggis boksu ravddas badjel lihkakeahtes Benda, ja veaháš ovdal boatkama Millwall goalie heajos eretčaskin attii loahpalaččat Anthonyi vejolašvuođa čuohppit iežas joavkku goalu nummir golbma.

Millwall orrui eanet eallinmielalažžan nuppi beali álggus ja Thierno Ballo livččii galgan buorebut geavahit vejolašvuođa, go son gávnnahii sajádaga časkit boksu gurutbealde, muhto ruovttobealli lei čielgasit spealu ollásit hálddašeamen.

Tchaouna lei lahka nuppi goalasis, go son garra časkkiin deattuhii Benda olgešbeale poastta olggobeallái, ja njealját goal, mii orrui eanet ja eanet várrahuvvon, boahtii 65. minuhtas, go Kamarl Grant meattáhahtii Anthony olgešsiivva ruossa eretčaskima ja ilus Barnes čuohppii maŋimušaid.

Go Barnes bivdii hat-tricka, son oaivilčaskkii njuolga Benda guvlui seamma bottas go linjaduomára lippu geasuhuvvui bajás, muhto lei Banel guhte ollašuhtii duolbama lahkabáikkis ovdal go Coburn čuohppii iešdovddus lassááiggis.

Well, aren't you even going to look at me?
Sure.
You're too young to know anything about children.

You're nothing like 25.

No.

Yes, I have.
But don't you ever finish a sentence.
Yes, if I'm allowed to.
Okay, let's start all over.
Sit down.
Tell me about yourself.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. Don it leat mihkkege 25-jahkásačča láhkai.

source_doc:
Falkirk strengthen top six hopes with away win at St Mirren

Miller then made sure of the points just after the hour mark as he capitalised on some static St Mirren defending to race on to his own blocked shot before dinking the ball over George.

It was an afternoon to forget for St Mirren, who lost Liam Donnelly, Killian Phillips and George to injury as they slipped to a third straight defeat.

Falkirk had the first opening in the 18th minute when Barney Stewart laid the ball off to Dylan Tait, whose curling effort from just outside the box took a slight deflection before cannoning off the top of the crossbar.

St Mirren finally threatened just after the half-hour mark when Mikael Mandron shot from a tight angle, forcing Falkirk goalkeeper Scott Bain into a smart stop with his feet.

Falkirk then raced down the other end and the lively Miller was released and allowed to shoot from a similar angle but George comfortably saved.

The match was finally coming to life and Dan Nlundulu was the next to fire at goal in the 36th minute after the Bairns had given up possession cheaply, but it was a routine stop at the near post by Bain.

Nlundulu then got in behind and slid the ball home, though the cheers from the home fans were short-lived as the assistant referee raised his flag for what appeared to be a clear offside.

The hosts had already lost Donnelly to injury midway through the first half and they suffered a further blow when Phillips, who appeared to hurt his shoulder in the opening period, came off at the interval.

The match was crying out for a moment of quality and it came 10 minutes into the second half through Yeats.

Tait's perfect through ball released Miller, and although George came racing out of his goal and timed his challenge well, the loose ball fell invitingly for Yeats, who curled a stunning first-time finish into the top corner of the unguarded St Mirren goal.

It got even better for the away side just after the hour mark as the Bairns doubled their lead.

Miller's initial shot from the edge of the box was blocked by Scott Tanser but, as the home defence hesitated, Miller reacted first to run on to the loose ball and lift a right-footed shot over the onrushing George.

St Mirren suffered yet another blow shortly after as the keeper was forced off to be replaced by Ryan Mullen.

The enforced changes and the quickfire goals seemed to rock the hosts and they never threatened a comeback, with their afternoon summed up in the 89th minute when Tanser completely mis-kicked his attempted volley from six yards out.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Falkirk nanne badjel guhtta alimus sajádaga doaivagiid vierusvuoittoin St Mirrena vuostá

De Miller sihkkarasttii čuoggáid diimmu mearkka maŋŋá, go son geavahii ávkki St Mirrena gárvvismeahttun suodjalusas ja viežžalii iežas hehttejuvvon šuhttii ovdal go loktii balla George badjel.

Lei iđit beaivi mii galggai vajáldahttit St Mirrenii, mii massii Liam Donnelly, Killian Phillips ja George vahágiid geažil, ja nu sii heidet goalmmát vuos njuolga vuollánanvuoittuide.

Falkirkis lei vuosttaš buorre vejolašvuohta 18. minuhta go Barney Stewart attii balla Dylan Taitii, gean geažes geavrris šuhttin ruvttoluotta ceahki olggobealde ožžoi unna rievdama ovdal go časkii badje risttegoalkkái.

St Mirren álgii loahpas áitet vehá maŋŋel bealle diimmu, go Mikael Mandron šuhttii guhkes geahččanguovllus, ja Falkirka goallevárrejeaddji Scott Bain ferte čájehit jierpmálaš várjalusa juolggiiguin.

Falkirk de viežžalii jođánit nuppe guvlui, ja čoahkkis Miller oaččui vejolašvuođa šuhttit sullasaš geahččanguovllus, muhto George várjalasttii álkit.

Speallu lei loahpas boahtimin eallimii, ja Dan Nlundulu lei čuovvovaš gii šuhtii goalái 36. minuhtas maŋŋel go Bairns lei massán balla menddo álkit, muhto dat lei dábálaš várjalus lahka poasttas Bainas.

Nlundulu beasai de suodjalusa duohken ja sliddii balla goalii, vaikko ruovttuluotta olbmuid illudančuorvut eai bistán guhkká, go veahkkeduopmár loktii lippu ovddas mii orui čielga offsiden.

Ruovttuluotta joavku lei juo massán Donnelly vahága geažil vuosttaš beallemeari gaskka rádjai, ja sii oačču vel eanet hehttema go Phillips, guhte orui vahágahttán iežas skálžžu rabas álggus, vulggii olggos botta go bealli nohkkai.

Speallu dárbbašii hirbmat kvalitehta bottu, ja dat bođii 10 minuhta maŋŋel nube bealle álggus Yeatsa bokte.

Taita ollislaš čađačiekčan luoitii Millera, ja vaikko George viežžalii olggos goalástis ja áddii iežas duššama buriin áiggiin, luovvanan balla lihkostuvai Yeatsii, guhte geavrris hui čáppat vuosttaš geardde loahpaheami badji čiegii várjjakeahtes St Mirrena goalii.

Vierusjoavkui manai vel buorebut diimmu mearkka maŋŋá, go Bairns guovddáštii ovdamunni.

Millera vuosttaš šuhttin ceahki ravddas hehttejuvvui Scott Tansera bokte, muhto go ruovttuluotta suodjalus epmádii, Miller reagereii vuosttažettiin, viežžalii luovvanan balla ja loktii olgešjuolggiin šuhttima jođánit ovdánan George badjel.

St Mirren vásihii vel oktii lossa čuolmma oanehaččat maŋŋel, go goallevárrejeaddji fertii vuolgit ja Ryan Mullen bođii sadjái.

Bákkolaš rievdadeamit ja jođánis goalat orrojedje ruovttuluotta joavkku, iige dat goassege áitet boahtit ruovttoluotta, ja sin beaivi čoahkkáige 89. minuhtas go Tanser ollásit boastut čeahkkalii iežas volley-geahččaleami guhtta jardda guovllus.
hypo_1:
Falkirk nanne badjel guhtta buoremus sajádaga doaivagiid vierusvuoitumin St Mirrena vuostá

De Miller sihkkarasttii čuoggáid diimmu mearkka maŋŋel, go son geavahii ávkki St Mirrena lihkadmeahttun suodjalusas: son viežžalii iežas hehttejuvvon šuhttima čuovvut ja loktii de balla George badjel.

Lei St Mirrenii beaivi, maid sii háliidedje vajáldahttit, go Liam Donnelly, Killian Phillips ja George buohkat báhcet eret vahágiid geažil, ja joavku geige goalmmát geardde njuolga vuollánemiin.

Falkirkis lei vuosttaš buorre vejolašvuohta 18. minuhtas, go Barney Stewart sirddii balla Dylan Taitii, gean geavrris šuhttin ceahki olggobealde ožžoi unna rievdama ovdal go deavddui badje risttegoalkka ala.

St Mirren áitet loahpas vehá maŋŋel bealle diimmu, go Mikael Mandron šuhttii garra geahččanguovllus ja bákkui Falkirka goallevárrejeaddji Scott Baina várjalit juolggiiguin jierpmálaččat.

Falkirk viežžalii de jođánit nuppe beallái, ja eallinlaš Miller luoittojuvvui čiekčat ja oaččui šuhttinvuoigatvuođa sullasaš geahččanguovllus, muhto George várjalasttii álkit.

Speallu lei loahpas ealláskahttimin, ja Dan Nlundulu lei čuovvovaš gii šuhtii goalái 36. minuhtas maŋŋel go Bairns lei balla menddo álkit luovvanan, muhto Bain várjalasttii dábálaččat lahka poasttas.

Nlundulu beasai de suodjalusa duohken ja čuikgadii balla goalii, muhto ruovttuluotta olbmuid illudančuorvut eai bistán guhkká, go veahkkeduopmár loktii lippu čielga offside-gearddu geažil.

Ruovttuluotta joavku lei juo massán Donnelly vahága geažil vuosttaš beallemeari gaskka rádjai, ja sii ožžo vel eanet hehttema, go Phillips, guhte orui vahágahttán skálžžus álgooasás, báhččii eret bottii.

Speallu dárbbašii kvalitehta bottu, ja dat bođii 10 minuhta maŋŋel nube bealle álggus Yeatsa bokte.

Taita ollislaš čađačiekčan luoitii Millera, ja vaikko George viežžalii jođánit olggos goalástis ja áigudahtii iežas duššama bures, luovvanan balla boahtii bures Yeatsii, guhte geavrris hui čábbát vuosttaš geardde loahpaheami bidjii várjjakeahtes St Mirrena goala badji čiegii.

Vierusjoavkui manai vel buorebut diimmu mearkka maŋŋel, go Bairns guovddáštii ovdamunni.

Millera vuosttaš šuhttin ceahki ravddas hehttejuvvui Scott Tansera bokte, muhto go ruovttuluotta suodjalus epmádii, Miller reagereii vuosttažettiin, viežžalii luovvanan balla ja loktii olgešjuolggiin šuhttima ovdánan George badjel.

St Mirren vásihii vel ođđa lossa čuolmma oanehaččat maŋŋel, go goallevárrejeaddji fertii vuolgit ja Ryan Mullen bođii sadjái.

Bákkolaš rievdadeamit ja jođánis goalat orrojedje časkán ruovttuluotta joavkku, iige dat goassege áitet ruovttoluotta boahtit, ja sin heajos beaivi čoahkkánii 89. minuhtas, go Tanser ollásit boastut čeahkkalii iežas volley-geahččaleami guhtta jardda guovllus.
hypo_2:
Falkirk nanne bajimus guhtta searvvi gaskii beassan-doaivagiid vierusvuoitumiin St Mirrena vuostá

Diimmu mearkka maŋŋá oanehaččat Miller sihkkarasttii čuoggáid, go son ávkkástallii St Mirrena heajos suodjalusas, viežžalii iežas hehttejuvvon šuhttima čuovvut ja de čiekčanii balla George badjel.

St Mirrenii dát lei beaivi maid sii háliidedje vajáldahttit, go Liam Donnelly, Killian Phillips ja George báhce vahágiid geažil eret, ja joavku geige goalmmát geardde maŋŋálaga vuollánemii.

Falkirkis lei vuosttaš stuorra vejolašvuohta 18. minuhtas, go Barney Stewart sirddii balla Dylan Taitii, gean geavrris šuhttin ceahki olggobealde ožžoi unna rievdama ovdal go deavddui risttegoalkka bajimus oasis.

St Mirren áitet loahpas oanehaččat bealle diimmu maŋŋá, go Mikael Mandron šuhttii hui garras geahččanguovllus ja bákkui Falkirka goallevárrejeaddji Scott Baina várjalit juolggiiguin jierpmálaččat.

Falkirk viežžalii de jođánit nuppe beallái, ja čilggas Miller luoittojuvvui ovddos ja oaččui šuhttit sullasaš geahččanguovllus, muhto George várjalasttii dat álkit.

Speallu lei loahpas ealláskahttimin, ja Dan Nlundulu lei čuovvovaš gii šuhtii goalái 36. minuhtas maŋŋá go Bairns lei balla menddo álkit massán, muhto Bain várjalasttii dábálaččat lahka poasttas.

Nlundulu beasai de suodjalusa duohken ja čuikgadii balla goalii, muhto ruovttuluotta olbmuid illudančuorvut bistte eai guhkká, go veahkkeduopmár loktii lippu dan geažil, mii orui čielga offside-n sajin.

Ruovttuluotta joavku lei juo massán Donnelly vahága geažil vuosttaš beallemeari gaskamuttus, ja sii oaččo vel eanet hehttema, go Phillips, guhte orui skálžžus vahágahttán álgooasás, báhččii eret bealleáigge.

Speallu dárbbašii buori kvalitehta bottu, ja dat bođii 10 minuhta maŋŋá nube bealle álggus Yeatsa bokte.

Taita ollislaš čađačiekčan luoitii Millera, ja vaikko George viežžalii jođánit olggos goalástis ja áigudahtii iežas duššama bures, luovvanan balla bođii bures Yeatsii, guhte geavrris hui čábbát vuosttaš geardde loahpaheami bidjii várjjakeahtes St Mirrena goala bajimus čiegii.

Vierusjoavkui manai vel buorebut diimmu mearkka maŋŋá, go Bairns guovddážii ovdamunni.

Millera vuosttaš šuhttin ceahki ravddas hehttejuvvui Scott Tansera bokte, muhto go ruovttuluotta suodjalus epmádii, Miller reagereii vuosttažettiin, viežžalii luovvanan balla ja loktii olgešjuolggiin šuhttima ovdánan George badjel.

St Mirren vásihii vel ođđa lossa čuolmma oanehaččat maŋŋá, go goallevárrejeaddji fertii vuolgit ja Ryan Mullen bođii sadjái.

Bákkolaš rievdadeamit ja jođánis goalat orrojedje časkán ruovttuluotta joavkku, iige dat goassege áitet ruovttoluotta boahtit, ja sin heajos beaivi čoahkkánii 89. minuhtas, go Tanser ollásit boastut čeahkkalii iežas volley-geahččaleami guhtta jardda guovllus.

Speallu dárbbašii kvalitehta bottu, ja dat bođii 10 minuhta maŋŋá nube bealle álggus Yeatsa bokte.

Taita ollislaš čađačiekčan luoitii Millera, ja vaikko George viežžalii jođánit olggos goalástis ja áigudahtii iežas duššama bures, luovvanan balla bođii bures Yeatsii, guhte geavrris hui čábbát vuosttaš geardde loahpaheami bidjii várjjakeahtes St Mirrena goala bajimus čiegii.

Vierusjoavkui manai vel buorebut diimmu mearkka maŋŋá, go Bairns guovddážii ovdamunni.

Millera vuosttaš šuhttin ceahki ravddas hehttejuvvui Scott Tansera bokte, muhto go ruovttuluotta suodjalus epmádii, Miller reagereii vuosttažettiin, viežžalii luovvanan balla ja loktii olgešjuolggiin šuhttima ovdánan George badjel.

St Mirren vásihii vel ođđa lossavuođa oanehaččat maŋŋá, go goallevárrejeaddji fertii vuolgit ja Ryan Mullen bođii sadjái.

Bákkolaš rievdadeamit ja jođánis goalat orrojedje časkán ruovttuluotta joavkku, iige dat goassege áitet ruovttoluotta boahtit, ja sin heajos beaivi čoahkkánii 89. minuhtas, go Tanser ollásit boastut čeahkkalii iežas volley-geahččaleami guhtta jardda guovllus.

source_doc:
We just got to the top of this mountain and we're gonna hike down, and apparently it is going to take four hours.
And I'm wearing the perfect shoes for this.
Just.
They're made for this.
Where'd you get it?
I just found a rock.
Can I pet him?
He must be terrified.

source_doc:
Aren't you going to say goodbye to me?
How did you know I was going?
I knew it this afternoon.
The way you faced up to him.
Well, I would have told him then.
Except for you.
I thought it would be best if I slipped out this way.
Are you sure you're doing the right thing?
There's nothing else I can do.
Will you.
Will you let me know where you are?
Paul?
As soon as I know myself.

source_doc:
Campanīle
A #poetry thread
i.
A Roman church belfry,
gold cross reaching for clouds:
bell tolls, sets brass note free,
sings out through misty shroud,
its high peal an appeal
to the faithful long gone.
No more piety’s zeal:
many sunsetted dawns.
Its stone tower keeps watch
through the mask of dusk-rain,
skies loosing their barrage
upon roof tiles again.
🧵👇🏼
#poem #poemaday #moody #neoclassical #church #night #photography

ii.
Who pulled on the bell cord?
Lone monk in his cloister
with none left in accord.
He, grain in church oyster —
yet no cell holds his bed,
no dust stirred by his shoes,
his name never was said,
no old books that he used.
The bell rope hangs, worn, frayed,
gnawed by church mice’s teeth.
It’s been long since it swayed,
pulled by hands underneath.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
The night wind whispers psalms
and breathes canticles’ chant
to swing the clapper of bronze,
I answer in descant —
but not with my own voice.
The wind swallows my call,
chimes its own holy noise
with the hands of its squall.
✋🏼🧵

Campanīle
Á #divttasnáittosat
i.
Romalaš girku biellotorni,
golleváldoristta deaddileamen bálgáid guvlui:
biellu čuojaha, luoitá pronssan čuoggá friddja,
lávlá čađa sumis suodjalusa,
dan allat čuojan lea gohččun
oskkolaččaide geat leat guhká mannan.
Ii leat šat oskkolašvuođa báhkkin:
máŋga eahketruohttasa iđida.
Dan geađgetorni várjala,
eahkedisarjjas árppis arvat čađa,
almmit luoitimin iežaset rássu
viessocearuid ala fas.
🧵👇🏼
#divttat #divttaotnebbe #miellagiddevaš #neoklassihkalaš #girku #ihku #govven

ii.
Gii geasuha biellabákte?
Okto munkka iežas klostaris
go ii leat oktage šat mielde.
Son, nugo njuorjjanas girkku skálžus —
muhto ii oktage sellas leat su seaŋga,
ii poražas lihkastuvvon su gápmagiiguin,
su namma ii lean goassege dadjan,
ii boares girjjit maid son geavahii.
Biellabákte heaŋgá, golahuvvon, reavvan,
girkko sáhpána bániid borran.
Lea guhkes áigi dan rájes go dat lihkadii,
gieđaid geasuhuvvon vulobealde.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
Ihki biegga suhttá salmmaid
ja vuoigŋá kantihkkalaš lávlumiid
vai pronssan čuoldin lihkahtuvvo,
mun vástidan badjeljienain —
muhto in iežan jienain.
Biegga niehku mu gohččuma,
čuoja iežas bassi šuma
iežas stuorrabiegga gieđaiguin.
✋🏼🧵

iežas garra biega gieđaiguin.
✋🏼🧵
hypo_4:
Campanīle
Okta #divttanáittosat
i.
Romalaš girkobiellotorni,
golleváldonristta ojastallá balvvaid guvlui:
biellu čuoja, luoitá pronssajiena friddja,
lávlá olggos sumis veles čađa,
dan allis čuojan lea gohččun
oskkolaččaide geat leat guhká mannan.
Ii leat šat oskkolašvuođa báhkkin:
máŋga iđida leat eahketan.
Dan geađgetorni čohkket várrogas
eahkedearvva-árpma veailla čađa,
go almmit fas luoitet iežaset rássu
kattacearuid ala.
🧵👇🏼
#divtta #divttabeaivi #dovddolaš #neoklassihkalaš #girku #ihku #govven

ii.
Gii geasuha biellabátti?
Okto munkka iežas klostaris,
go ii leat oktage šat suinna seammalaš.
Son, nugo okta ránes girkku siste —
muhto ii oktage sellas leat su seaŋga,
ii poraš lihkastuvvon su gápmagiin,
su namma ii lean goassege namuhuvvon,
eaige oktage boares girjjit maid son geavahii.
Biellabákti heaŋgá, golahuvvon, rahpasan,
girkosáhpána bániid borran.
Lea guhkes áigi dan rájes go dat maŋggalii,
gieđaid geasuhuvvon vulobealde.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
Ihki biegga suhttá salmmaid
ja vuoigŋá kantihkkaliid lávluma
vai pronssa čoalkki lihkahit,
mun vástidan badjeljienain —
muhto in iežan jienain.
Biegga niehku mu gohččuma,
čuoja iežas bassi šuma
iežas garra biega gieđaiguin.
✋🏼🧵

source_doc:
painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [1/x]
I figured it'd be fun to share the whole process that goes into making a painting a custom scene. could be useful to some, and entertaining to others :)
👩‍🦱 ~ EVE & ADAM ~ 🧔‍♂️
as you all know, I'm a deeply religious person 🛐 so..
the scene: we're in the garden of eden. adam is eating apples from the forbidden tree, because of course he is. eve is having none of his shit, grabs an unfortunate unsuspecting nearby serpent, and is about to whip the shit out of adam. 🐍
#painting

painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [2/x]
so, we're gonna need reference photos. I want eve to be in the process of swinging the serpent around; so then I figured a baseball batter would be a good fit.
so wading through the AI slop, I found this actual photo that has a nice pose and good lighting.

painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [3/x]
I want adam to be in a protective stance, while also holding a forbidden apple, and all this, seen from the side/back. also, the lighting has to come from the same side as the batter. so all and all, it's pretty hard to find a proper reference pic for this, so I am posing for this one myself.
took about 20 pics with slightly different in stances etc., and decided on this one. (the right hand is going to hold the apple)

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
málen bazkiin! 🧵 (hiđis) thread [1/x]
jurddašin ahte livččii suohtas juogadit olles proseassa man mii manná dasa go ráhkada málen dihto scenii. sáhttá leat muhtumiidda ávkin, ja earáide fas suohtasin :)
👩‍🦱 ~ EVA & ADAM ~ 🧔‍♂️
nu go buohkat diehtibehtet, de mun lean hui oskkolaš olmmoš 🛐 de..
scene: mii leat eden gárddis. adam lea borramin ealát gildojuvvon muoras, dannego dat gal lea nu. eva ii fuola su bullshitis mihkkege, grabba lahka leativuođa heaittihis geađgábiessi, ja lea áigumas piššut adamis ellegiela. 🐍
#málen

málen bazkiin! 🧵 (hiđis) thread [2/x]
de, mii dárbbašit referánsagovaid. mun háliidan ahte eva livččii jo serpentta čuovvuleamen birra; de jurddašin ahte baseball-battára livččii buorre heivehus.
de go čađahin AI-buozas, de gávdnen dán duohta govva mas lea fiinna pose ja buorre čuovga.

málen bazkiin! 🧵 (hiđis) thread [3/x]
mun háliidan ahte adam livččii suodjaleaddji asendis, seammás go doallá gildojuvvon ealu, ja buot dát oidnojuvvo bealde/duohkkobealde. maiddái čuovga ferte boahtit seamma bealde go battáras. de oktiibuot lea oalle váttis gávdnat dása heivvolaš referánsagova, nu ahte mun poseren dán ieš.
válddán sullii 20 govva veaháš sierra asendiiguin jna., ja válljen dán. (olgeš giehta galgá doallat ealu)

source_doc:
Relentless Clan power past Steelers in statement home win

The Clan got off to a strong start with Joe Hazeldine slamming a first-time shot into the Sheffield net after some nice slip passing between Hugo Roy and Deven Sideroff.

Despite some strong defensive play from Glasgow, the Steelers found a breakthrough via Brien Diffley's sharp shooting through traffic before Mikko Juusola gave the visitors the lead with a deflected shot from right wing.

In the second period, the Clan saw momentum swing their way with Steven Seigo slipping a tidy finish from close-range past Matthew Greenfield to tie the game up.

Shortly after, Rylan Schwartz grabbed a go-ahead goal with a bullet from the backdoor after some luck with the Clan avoiding a too many men call.

Sheffield forced their way back into the game with Ryan Tait driving on net and backhanding a shot which Brine saved but didn't keep hold of as Kevin Tansey poked a third goal over the line for the visitors.

With the score line tied going into the final frame, the noise peaked inside Braehead and Glasgow gained control of the game.

Tristin Langan saw retribution for the ongoing battle he had to put up with throughout the game with Mitchell Heard as he cracked the bar with a beautiful finish to give his side the lead.

A holding penalty on Miihkali Teppo applied pressure to the hosts' advantage late on with the Steelers pulling their netminder for the extra attacker.

Langan grabbed his second of the game on the empty net though to round off the night with a well-earned and much-needed two points for the Clan on home ice.

Glasgow Clan head coach, Corey Neilson said after the game: "We were the better team. Our forecheck was excellent, that's something we've worked on all week and it was relentless tonight. The identity we were looking for is starting to show. It was really enjoyable to coach with full lines and take advantage of a team that's playing short, because usually we're on the other side of that."

Sheffield Steelers head coach, Aaron Fox, said: "I thought we were pretty good for the majority of the game. Glasgow jumped on us early, but our bounce back was good. Our guys were gassed by the end, we only had three lines but we were in the battle all game, I can't fault the compete level of our guys."

hypo_0:
Vuordemeahttun Clan lei nanu go bođii Steelersiid badjelas vuoittut dovddastanruovttuvuoitaga.

Clan álggahii garrasit, go Joe Hazeldine časkii vuosttaš geardde čuoggá Sheffielda fierpmádahkii čábbát luoitagis maŋŋel, man ovddidii čábbes sirdojuvvon čeahpes speallu Hugo Roy ja Deven Sideroff gaskkas.

Vaikko Glasgow čájehii nana suddjenbarggu, de Steelers gávnnahii láidesteami, go Brien Diffley časkii bahás ja dárkilit olbmuid guovdu mielde, ovdal go Mikko Juusola attii guossiid johtui njunnelaston luoitagiin olgeš siivus.

Nubbi bealis oinnii Clan, ahte mearkkašahtti fápmu sirdašii sin beallái, go Steven Seigo bijai čáppa lahkaluoitaga Matthew Greenfielda meattá ja dásii spealu.

Fargga dan maŋŋel Rylan Schwartz čuohpai ovddidančuoggá, go son časkii garra luoitaga maŋábealde, maŋŋel go Clan geavahii lihkostuvvama go sii vázze badjen olbmuid mearkkašumi haga.

Sheffield bahččii iežas ruovttoluotta speallui, go Ryan Tait viegai fierpmádaga vuostá ja backhand-luoitagiin časkii, man Brine godii, muhto ii doallan dan, nu ahte Kevin Tansey stohkii guossiid goalmmát čuoggá rastá linnjá.

Go boahttevaš bealli álggahuvvui dásse bohtosiin, de jietna ollii alimus dási Braeheadas ja Glasgow válddii spealu háldui.

Tristin Langan oaččui máksojuvvot dan joatkevaš viggama ovddas man son ferte ceavzit olles spealu čađa Mitchell Heard vuostá, go son časkii bárra čáppis loahpahagain ja attii iežas lihttui johtui.

Miihkali Teppo holden-duhtavas ráŋggáštus dagahii ruovttulihttui deaddilis vuordáma loahpageahčen, go Steelers válddii fierpmádatvárrejeaddji eret oažžun dihtii lasálbmot.

Langan čuohpai goit nubbi čuoggásis guorus fierpmádahkii ja loahpahii eahkeda Clan várás bures verdienen ja hui dárbbašlaš guovtti čuoggáin ruovttujiegas.

Glasgow Clan váldovalástalli Corey Neilson celkkii spealu maŋŋel: "Mii leat buoret lihttu. Min forecheck lei buorre, dat lea juoga maid leat bargan olles vahku ja dat lei odne eahket vuordemeahttun. Identitehta maid ohccimin leat, lea álgán oidnot. Lei duođas buorre valáštallat dievas linnjáiguin ja geavahit ávkin lihtu vuostá mii speallá unnán olbmuiguin, danne go dábálaččat mii leat dan nuppi bealde."

Sheffield Steelers váldovalástalli Aaron Fox celkkii: "Mun jurddašin ahte mii leimmet hui buorit eanemus oasi spealus. Glasgow bođii min badjelii árrat, muhto min máhcahat lei buorre. Min báikkálaččat ledje loahpas hui váiván, mii leimmet dušše golbma linnjá, muhto mii leimmet gárvvis giehtadallamis olles spealu, in sáhte moittit min olbmuid gilvalahttinvuođa."

Vuordemeahttun Clan vuittii Steelersis nanus dovddastanruovttuspealus.

Clan álggahii spealu nanus, go Joe Hazeldine časkii vuosttašguvlui luoitaga Sheffielda fierpmádahkii čábbes oaivvis Sirdojumiid maŋŋel Hugo Roy ja Deven Sideroff gaskkas.

Vaikko Glasgow čájehii nanus suddjenbarggu, de Steelers murrii geahččalusa, go Brien Diffley bahás ja dárkilit časkii olbmuid čađa, ovdal go Mikko Juusola attii guossiid johtui njunnehuvvon luoitagiin olgeš siivus.

Nuppi bealis bođii fápmu Clan beallái, go Steven Seigo bijai čáppa lahkaluoitaga Matthew Greenfielda meattá ja dásii spealu.

Fargga dán maŋŋel Rylan Schwartz čuohpai ovddidančuoggá garrá luoitagiin maŋábealde, maŋŋel go Clan lihkostuvai go sii eai oaččo badjen olbmuid ráŋggáštusa.

Sheffield bahččii iežas ruovttoluotta speallui, go Ryan Tait viegai fierpmádaga vuostá ja backhandain časkii; Brine dorvvastii dan, muhto ii doalahan, ja Kevin Tansey stohkii goalmmát čuoggá guossiid ovddas rastá linnjá.

Go maŋimuš bealli álggahuvvui dásse bohtosiin, de jietna ollii alimus dási Braeheadas ja Glasgow válddii spealu háldui.

Tristin Langan oaččui máksojuvvot dan joatkevaš gievrrasvuođa ovddas, man son ferte gierdat olles spealu čađa Mitchell Heard vuostá, go son časkii bárra čáppis loahpahagain ja attii iežas lihttui johtui.

Miihkali Teppo holden-ráŋggáštus dagahii ruovttulihttui deattu loahpageahčen, go Steelers válddii fierpmádatvárrejeaddji eret oažžun dihtii lasáčáliheaddji.

Langan čuohpai goit iežas nubbi čuoggá spealus guorus fierpmádahkii ja loahpahii eahkeda Clan várás bures verdienen ja hui dárbbašlaš guovtti čuoggáin ruovttujiegas.

Glasgow Clan váldovalástalli Corey Neilson celkkii spealu maŋŋel: "Mii leimmet buoret lihttu. Min forecheck lei erenoamáš, dat lea juoga maid leat bargan olles vahku ja dat lei odne eahket vuordemeahttun. Dat identitehta maid mii ohcamin leat, lea álgán oidnot. Lei duođas somás valáštallat dievas linnjáiguin ja geavahit ávkin dan, ahte vuosttášlihttu speallá unnán olbmuiguin, danne go dábálaččat mii leat dan nuppi bealde."

Sheffield Steelers váldovalástalli Aaron Fox celkkii: "Mun jurddašin ahte mii leimmet hui buorit eanemus oasi spealus. Glasgow bođii min badjelii árrat, muhto min máhccan lei buorre. Min olbmot ledje loahpas hui váiván, mii leimmet dušše golbma linnjá, muhto mii leimmet gilvvus mielde olles spealu, in sáhte moittit min olbmuid gilvalahttinvuođa."

Miihkali Teppo holden-ráŋggáštus dagahii loahpas deattu ruovttulihtui ovdamuni ala, go Steelers válddii fierpmádatvárrejeaddji eret oažžut dihtii lasáčáliheaddji.

Langan čuohpai goit iežas nubbi čuoggá spealus guorus fierpmádahkii, ja dan bokte gidde eahkeda Clan várás bures verdienen ja hui dárbbašlaš guovtti čuoggáin ruovttujiegas.

Glasgow Clan váldovalástalli Corey Neilson celkkii spealu maŋŋel: "Mii leimmet buoret lihttu. Min forecheck lei erenoamáš; dat lea juoga maid leat bargan olles vahku, ja odne eahket dat lei vuordemeahttun. Dat identitehta maid mii leat ohcamin, lea álgán oidnot. Lei duođas somás valáštallat dievas linnjáiguin ja geavahit ávkin dan, ahte vuosttášlihttu speallá unnán olbmuiguin, danne go dábálaččat mii leat dan nuppi bealde."

Sheffield Steelers váldovalástalli Aaron Fox celkkii: "Mun jurddašin ahte mii leimmet hui buorit eanemus oasi spealus. Glasgow bođii min badjelii árrat, muhto min máhccan lei buorre. Min olbmot ledje loahpas hui váiván, mii leimmet dušše golbma linnjá, muhto mii leimmet gilvvus mielde olles spealu. In sáhte moittit min olbmuid gilvalahttinhálu."

Clan oaččui nanu álggu, go Joe Hazeldine časkii ovttageardán luoitaga Sheffielda fierpmádahkii maŋŋel čáppa, njulges siskkáldaspassastemiid Hugo Roy ja Deven Sideroff gaskkas.

Nuppi bealis Clan dovdii, ahte spealu johtin fárrii sin beallái, go Steven Seigo čuohpai čáppa loahpahagain lahka guovllus Matthew Greenfielda meattá ja dásihii spealu.

Fargga dan maŋŋel Rylan Schwartz čuohpai ovddidančuoggá garrá luoitagiin maŋábealde, maŋŋel go Clan lihkostuvai garvit ráŋggáštusa badjen spealláriid geažil.

source_doc:
Good Morning Worlds!
We are going to the tip this morning. It will clear some of the stuff we sorted yesterday from the drive. I don't think we can clear it all unless we took the trailer, but the trailer is full of steel for weighing in.
Later I might carry on packing tote crates.
#GoodMorningWorlds

Tip trip done, and another car load cleared out.
I have taken the new trailer axle, and trailer drive motor system, out of the scrap metal trailer load. That means we can get more scrap metal in there and also not accidentally weigh in the parts I want to keep.
I think, next, I will start moving the scrap steel from the back garden into the trailer so that it is ready to go.
Scrap steel prices are not very high at the moment but better than nothing, if I take enough of it in one go.
Still have to sort the non-ferrous scrap.

That thing when you are taking the rotten tyres off small, wide lawn tractor wheels....
Huge effort to unmount one side of the tyre, but it was really badly rusted tight on the other side of the rim.
In the time it took me to break the bead free, I'd forgotten I had already done the other side, and ended up with the rim free but completely inside the tyre!
I had to remount the tyre that side, and then work around it to get the rim out.
I had to cut up the inner tube to get that out too!
I wonder how many more tyres I need to unmount? Four done so far.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Buorre iđit, máilmmat!
Mii leat mannamin ruskabáikái iđit. Dat veahkeha čorget muhtun diŋggaid maid ortneimet eilen biilaluotta alde. In jáhke ahte mii sáhttit buot dan čorget jus ii leat nu ahte válddit maŋŋebeažžá, muhto maŋŋebeažžá lea dievva stáliin mii galgá vigihahttit.

Maŋŋel beaivvi sáhtán joatkit pakket tote-bovssažiid.
#BuorreIđitMáilmmat

Ruskabáikemátki geargan, ja vel okta biillalasti lea guođđon eret.
Leán váldán ođđa maŋŋebeažžá-ássa ja maŋŋebeažžá vuojihanmotorvuogádaga eret romemetálla-maŋŋebeažžá-lasttas. Dat mearkkaša ahte sáhttit bidjat vel eanet romemetálla doppe sisa ja maid ahte in deattuhahttá vuovdit oasit maid háliidan seailluhit.
Jáhken ahte čuovvovaččat álgán sirdit romestála duohkenbáikkis maŋŋebeažžái vai dat lea gárvvis fárret.
Romestála hattiid eai leat hirbmat allat dál, muhto buoret go ii mihkkege, jus viežžan doarvái ollu oktanaga.
Vel fertet sorteret ii-ruovdemetálla romu.

Dat diŋga go leat váldimin rotnan bonjoriid eret unna, viiddis rásseluotta-tráktora juvllain....
Hui stuoris bargu oažžut bonjora okta bealli eret, muhto dat lei nubbi bealde juvlla-rimmis duođas hui bahá rusttásit badjelas.
Dan áiggi go mun oaččuin bonjora beadja luovvanit, lean vajáldahttán ahte lean juo dahkan nuppi beali, ja loahpas lei rimmi luovvanan muhto ollásit bonjora siste!
Ferten bidjat bonjora ruovttoluotta dan bealde, ja de bargat dan birra oažžut rimmi olggos.
Ferten maid čuohppat sisdoalu bohccužiid vai oaččuin dan ge olggos!
Imáštallan galle eará bonjora vel dárbbašan váldit eret? Njeallje leat dál geargan.
hypo_1:
Buorre iđit, máilmmat!
Mii leat mannamin ruskabáikái odne iđit. Dat veahkeha čorget muhtun diŋggaid maid ortneimet eilen biilaluotta alde. In jáhke ahte mii sáhttit buot dan eret oažžut, jos ii váldde maŋŋebeažžá mielde, muhto maŋŋebeažžá lea dievva stáliin mii galgá vigihahttit.
Maŋŋá sáhtán joatkit tote-bovssažiid pakket.
#BuorreIđitMáilmmat

Ruskabáikemátki lea geargan, ja vel okta biillalasti lea eret čorgon.
Leán váldán ođđa maŋŋebeažžáása ja maŋŋebeažžá vuojihanmotorvuogádaga eret romemetálla-lasttas. Dat mearkkaša ahte sáhttit bidjat vel eanet romemetálla doppe sisa, ja seammás eai deattuhahtti vigihahttit oasiid maid háliidan seailluhit.
Jáhken ahte čuovvovažžan álgán sirdit romestála duohkenráiddus maŋŋebeažžái vai dat lea gárvvis mannat.
Romestála hattiid eai leat hirbmat allat dál, muhto buoret go ii mihkkege, jos viežžan doarvái ollu oktanaga.
Vel ferten sorteret ii-ruovdemetálla romu.

Dat diŋga go leat váldimin rotnan bonjoriid eret smávva, viiddis rásseluotta-tráktora juvllain....
Hui stuoris bargu oažžut bonjora okta beali eret, muhto dat lei nubbi bealde rimmmis duođaid bahá rusttásit gitta.
Dan áiggi go mun oaččuin bonjora beadja luovvanit, lean juo vajáldahttán ahte lean nuppi beali juo dahkan, ja loahpas lei rimmi luovvanan muhto ollásit bonjora siste!
Ferten bidjat bonjora ruovttoluotta dan bealde, ja de bargat dan birra oažžut rimmi olggos.
Ferten maid čuohppat sisdoallobonjora vai oaččuin dan ge olggos!
Imáštallan galle vel bonjoriid dárbbašan váldit eret? Njeallje leat dál geargan.

hypo_5:
Buorre iđit, máilmmat!
Mii leat mannamin ruskabáikái odne iđit. Dat veahkeha čorget eret muhtun oasi daid diŋggain maid mii eilen sortereimmet biilaluotta alde. In jáhke ahte mii sáhttit buot čorget eret, earret jus váldit maŋisvuojnja mielde, muhto maŋisvuojnja lea dievva stáliin mii galgá deattuhuvvot.
Maŋŋel beaivvi sáhtán joatkit tote-boksaid pakket.
#BuorreIđitMáilmmat

Ruskabáikemátki lea geargan, ja vel okta biillalasti lea čorget eret.
Leán váldán ođđa maŋisvuojnjaása ja maŋisvuojnja vuojihanmotorvuogádaga eret romemetálla-lasttas. Dat mearkkaša ahte mii sáhttit bidjat doppe vel eanet romemetálla sisa, ja seammás ii šatta deattuhuvvot oasit maid háliidan seailluhit.
Jáhken ahte čuovvovažžan álgán sirdit romestála duohkkegárddis maŋisvuojnjii vai dat lea gárvvis vuojihit.
Romestála hattiid eai leat dál hui allat, muhto dat lea buoret go ii mihkkege, jos viežžan doarvái olu oktanaga.
Vel fertet sorteret ii-ruovdemetálla romu.

Dat diŋga go leat váldimin rotnan bonjoriid eret smávva, viiddis rásseluotta-tráktora juvllain....
Hui stuoris bargu lei oažžut bonjora okta beali eret, muhto rimma nuppi bealde dat lei duođaid bahásit rusttásan gitta.
Dan áiggi go mun oaččuin bonjora beadja luovvanit, lean juo vajáldahttán ahte lean nuppi beali juo dahkan, ja loahpas lei rimmi luovvanan muhto ollásit bonjora siste!
Ferten bidjat bonjora ruovttoluotta dan bealde, ja de bargat dan birra oažžut rimmi olggos.
Ferten maid sisdoallobonjora čuohppat vai oaččuin dan ge olggos!
Imáštallan galles vel bonjoriid dárbbašan váldit eret? Njeallje leat dál geargan.

source_doc:
i am hesitant to declare it but i may be right around the point of behavior calculation optimization where there's nothing more that can be done without actually decimating the number of paths being processed.
And that might actually be the play because things like UCT are smarter about traversing a tree with a budget and splitting how deep vs broad you go

at the end of the day, it's always going to be possible that some enemy picks up some combination of abilities/items where the combinatorial explosion of possibility space is unable to calculate fast on any hardware, so I was always going to need to cap it somewhere, just that theoretical cap is now 40x bigger than it was in january

Welp think I'm going to implement UCT because my game's just Go now this is going to be a journey
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
mun lean veaháš eahpidahttimin dadjat dan, muhto sáhttá leat ahte lean juste dan báikkis láhttenrehkenastima buorideami dáfus gos ii leat šat mihkkege dahkat, jus ii duođaid geahpit gieđahallojuvvon geainnuid logu.
Ja dat sáhttá duođaid leat dat vuohki, danne go diekkár áššit go UCT leat jierbmaseappot dan dáfus mo johtilit muora bušeahtain ja juohkit man čikŋalit vs. viidát mannat

loahpas lea dat álo vejolaš ahte muhtin vašši čohkká fal mielde muhtin návccaid/diŋggaid kombinašuvnna, gos vejolašvuođaid kombinatoriiala rábmasupmi ii sáhte rehkenastit johtilit oktage hardware:s, nu ahte mun liikon álo dárbbašan bidjat dasa muhtin rádjái, dušše dat teorehtalaš rádji lea dál 40x stuorát go dat lei ođđajagemánus

Noo jurddašan ahte áiggun UCT:a impleneteret danne go mu speallu lea dál dušše Go, dát šaddá leat mátki
hypo_1:
mun lean veaháš eahpideamen almmuhit dan, muhto sáhttá leat ahte lean juste dan ráji lahka láhttenrehkenastima buorideami dáfus, gos eai leat šat makkárge doaimmat dahkamis ilman ahte duođaid njiedjan gieđahallojuvvon geainnuid logu.
Ja dat sáhttá duođaid leat buorre vuohki, danne go diekkár áššit go UCT leat jierbmaseappot dan dáfus mo mannat muora čađa bušeahtain ja juohkit man čikŋalit vs. man viidát manat

loahpas lea dat álo vejolaš ahte muhtin vašši oažžu muhtin návccaid/diŋggaid kombinašuvnna, gos vejolašvuođaid kombinatoriijalaš rábmasupmi ii sáhte rehkenastit doarvái johtilit oktage hardware:s, nu ahte mun dárbbašin álo bidjat dasa muhtin rádjái, dušše dat teorehtalaš rádji lea dál 40x stuorát go dat lei ođđajagemánus

Noo, jurddašan ahte áiggun UCT:a implementeret, danne go mu speallu lea dál dušše Go. Dát šaddá leat mátki.
hypo_2:
mun lean veaháš eahpideamen cealkit dan, muhto sáhttá leat ahte lean juste dan báikki lahka láhttenrehkenastima buorideamis gos ii leat šat maidge dahkat tanpa ahte duođaid unnidit gieđahallojuvvon geainnuid logu hui olu.
Ja dat sáhttá duođaid leat dat vuohki, danne go UCT-lágan áššit leat jierbmaseappot muora čađa mannamis budjehtain, ja das mo juohkát man čikŋa vs. man viiddis manat

loahpas lea álo vejolaš ahte muhtin vašši oažžu muhtin návccaid/diŋggaid kombinašuvnna, gos vejolašvuođaid kombinatoriijalaš rábmasupmi ii sáhte rehkenastit doarvái johtilit oktage hardware:s, nu ahte mun dárbbašin goitge bidjat dasa rádjái juogas báikkis; dušše dat teorehtalaš rádji lea dál 40x stuorát go dat lei ođđajagemánus

No de, jurddašan ahte áiggun UCT:a implenteret, danne go mu speallu lea dál dušše Go, ja dát šaddá leat mátki
hypo_3:
mun lean veaháš eahpideamen dadjat dan, muhto sáhttá leat ahte lean justeaivve dan rájáid lahka láhttenrehkenastima buorideamis, gos ii leat šat maide dahkat ilman ahte duođaid čuhccot gieđahallojuvvon bálgáid logu.
Ja dat sáhttá duođaid leat dat vuohki, danne go UCT-lágan áššit leat jierbmaseappot muora čađa mannamis budjehtain, ja das mo juohkit man čikŋa ja man viiddis manat

loahpas lea álo vejolaš ahte muhtin vašši oažžu muhtin návccaid/dávviriid kombinašuvnna, gos vejolašvuođaid kombinatoriijalaš rábmasupmi ii sáhte rehkenastit doarvái johtilit oktage rusttegis, nu ahte mun dárbbašin goitge bidjat dasa rádjái juogas báikkis; dušše dat teorehtalaš rádji lea dál 40x stuorát go dat lei ođđajagemánus

No de, jurddašan ahte áiggun UCT:a implenteret, danne go mu speallu lea dál dušše Go, ja dát šaddá leat mátki
hypo_4:
mun lean veaháš eahpideamen dan nannosit dadjat, muhto sáhttá leat ahte lean olles lahka dan báikki, gos láhttenrehkenastima buorideamis ii leat šat maide dahkat ilman ahte duođaid unnidit gieđahallojuvvon bálgáid logu ruovttoluotta.
Ja dat sáhttá duođaid leat juste dat vuohki, danne go UCT-lágan vuogit leat jierbmaseappot go lea gažaldat mannat muora čađa dihto budjehtain ja juohkit dan, man čikŋa ja man viidát manat

loahpas lea álo vejolaš ahte muhtin vašši oažžu muhtin návccaid/dávviriid ovttastusa, gos vejolašvuođaid kombinatoriijalaš rábmasupmi ii leat heivehahtti rehkenastojuvvot doarvái johtilit oktage rusttegis, nu ahte mun livččen álo dárbbašan bidjat dasa rádjái juogas báikkis; dušše dat teorehtalaš rádji lea dál 40x stuorát go dat lei ođđajagemánus

No de, jurddašan ahte áiggun UCT:a implenteret, danne go mu speallu lea dál dušše Go, ja dát šaddá leat olmmošlaš mátki
hypo_5:
mun lean veaháš eahpideamen dan nannosit dadjat, muhto sáhttá leat ahte lean just dakkár báikkis láhttenrehkenastima buorideamis, gos ii leat šat maide dahkat ilman ahte duođaid stuorámusat geahpidit gieđahallojuvvon bálgáid logu.
Ja dat sáhttá duođaid leat juste dat veara, danne go UCT-lágan vuogit leat jierbmaseappot go lea gažaldat johtit muora čađa dihto budjehtain ja juohkit dan, man čikŋasit dahje man viidát manat

loahpas lea álo vejolaš ahte muhtin vašši oažžu muhtin návccaid/dávviriid ovttastusa, mas vejolašvuođaid kombinatoriijalaš rábmasupmi ii leat vejolaš rehkenastit doarvái johtilit mihkkege rusttegis, nu ahte mun livččen goit dárbbašan bidjat dasa rádjái juogas báikkis; dušše dat teorehtalaš rádji lea dál 40x stuorát go dat lei ođđajagemánus

No de, jurddašan ahte áiggun UCT:a implenteret, danne go mu speallu lea dál dušše Go, ja dát šaddá leat muhtun mátki
