source_doc:
$partner has a video consult with Ikea to quote for a fitted kitchen. It's a fascinating glimpse into the ecosystem of online services for boomers.
1. They send link for video consult, three weeks ago. It uses Ikea's proprietary videoconf solution
2. They request the designs & 3D renders for the new kitchen
3. they send an email saying "thanks for sending through the design
4. We dial in today, they start the call with "our system blocked your files, let's design your kitchen together"
1/x

5. Partner asks if there's any way to share the (very detailed, took us like a full man week to put together) designs, but the Ikea salesdrone is on a script, and isn't having a bar of it.
6. The next step in the script is "laboriously do the design from scratch over the phone with the client, hunting and pecking on the keyboard and not fast using the UI of their design software"
2/x

7. They cannot share their screen, so it's a clown show of repeated misunderstanding about which part of which image is being referred to

8. the clock has just ticked past what should have been the full consult, and they're 35% the way thru getting the required measurements.

9. So far there's been literally 8 minutes of salesdrone laboriously inputting the measurements supplied
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
$partner:is lea video-konsultašuvdna Ikea:in vai oažžu haddi beavdehit mieldeheivehuvvon gisttaidbargui. Dat addá hui miellagiddevaš geahččaleami dasa mo boomeriid várás neahtta-bálvalusat doibmet.
1. Sii sáddejit liŋkka video-konsultašuvdnii, golbma vahku dás ovdal. Dat geavaha Ikea iežas videokonferánsa-čoavddusa
2. Sii jearahit sihke sárgosiid & 3D-visualiseremiid ođđa gisttas
3. Sii sáddejit e-poastta mas dadjet "giitu go sáddejet sárgosa
4. Mii čállit searvái otne, sii álggahit gohččuma dainna ahte "min vuogádat hehttii du fiillaid, ráhkadallot du gistta ovttas"
1/x

5. Partner jearrá lea go muhton vuohki juogadit (hui dárkilis, válddii mis olles olmmošvahku dan bidjat oktii) sárgosiid, muhto Ikea-vuovdinrobot lea čadnon skriptii, ii ge manne seamma guvlui ollenge.
6. Boahttevaš lávki skriptas lea "ráhkadit sárgosa vuođđudallat ođđasit telefovnnas klienttain, njuiket ja deaddilit boallobeavddi alde ja hui njoazut geavahit sin sárgonprográmma UI:a"
2/x

source_doc:
right, so, as i was saying, i dmed this very well known and very friendly seeming artist-type person and gave em the usual spiel:
- how bridge works
- how to bridge
- please do so because i want to follow you and reblog some of your stuff that i like
- if you don't want to, that's fine
and they responded "not doing that" which is all well and good but then they blocked me???
just like, for absolutely no fucking reason

not naming any names because i do NOT dislike anybody involved and i certainly do not want to incite any brigading, but this has happened with several people now, including people who have REBLOGGED AND LIKED BRIDGED POSTS FROM THIS ACCOUNT (my main), which is WHY I WANTED TO FOLLOW THEM

if they had just said "no thanks" they would have gotten an "ok, perfectly understandable! :)" or the like from me, but now everyone has to put up with my confused ranting instead. i'm not even angry, i'm just *genuinely baffled*

bsky people, is this a genuine issue over on your platform (because it's one i've almost *never* had over here on this side of the bridge) or am i just running into bad apple after bad apple

I honestly don't know what people's general feelings are about enabling the Bridgy Fed here, because that's just not a topic that ever comes up tbh (unfortunately)… But there's definitely some subset of people here who are super trigger-happy about the block button, I'm not a fan of this either.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
nu, dego mun lohken, de mun sáddejin DM:a dakkár hui bures dovddujuvvon ja hui usttádus dovdanlágan dáidagaolbmui ja attán daid dábálaš čilgeheami:
- mo bridge doaibmá
- mo bridgea bidjat johtui
- geahča, dahkat dan, danne go háliidan čuovvut du ja reblogget muhtun du juttuin maid liikon
- jos it háliit, dat lea oalle buorre
ja son vástidii "in dahkko dan", mii lea oalle buorre ja bures, muhto de son blockii mu???
dego, ollesit ii mihkkege vittu siva geažil

in mainit namaid, danne go mun ii vaikkošge heaitit oktage dain maid dát guoská, ja mun duođalaččat in háliit heaitit olbmuid mannat brigade-módde, muhto dát lea dál dáhpáhuvvan muhtun olbmuiguin juo máŋgii, maiddái olbmuiguin geat leat REBLOGGEN JA LIHKON bridged-postaid dán kontos (mu váldokontos), ja DANNE MUN HÁLIIDIN ČUOVVUT SIDJIIDE

jos sii livčče dušše lohkan "ii giitu", de sii livčče ožžon mus "ok, oalle ipmárdusat! :)" dahje sullásaš vástádusa, muhto dál buohkat fertejit gierdat mu seaguhis rantema sajis. mun in leat vel suhttan, mun lean dušše *duođaid ollásit imaštallan*

bsky-olbmot, leago dát duohta váttisvuohta doppe din platformas (danne go dát lea okta mii mus lea measta *goassege ii* leat leamaš dáppe dán bridge-bealde), dahje lean go mun dušše deaividit heittot eappaliid ovtta maŋŋel nuppi

Mun duođaid in dieđe, mo olbmuin dábálaččat jurddat dán birra ahte Bridgy Fed bidjá johtui dáppe, danne go dat ii leat fáddá mii goassege boahtá bajás, tbh (váttisvuođalaččat)… Muhto dáppe lea duođalaččat muhtun joavku olbmuin geat leat hui jođánit geavahit block-boalu, ja munge in liikko dán.

source_doc:
Ironing the lightweight green corduroy for my first try at the Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern. I don't know how I feel about the recommendation to use interfacing but it probably does want something to stiffen and thicken it a bit.
#millinery

Sachi's newsboy cap pattern advises to cut the crown pieces diagonal to the weave ("on the bias") to allow more stretch around the circumference but that will make the corduroy rows run aslant, where I prefer them vertical.
We shall see. This is the test cookie to get a feel for the pattern. I like corduroy for texture but green wouldn't be my first choice, and this fabric is lightweight enough that I should add a layer, whether interfacing or what-have-you from the stash.

On a second look, my fabric isn't corduroy at all, it's just velvet, so I can cut at 45° to the fabric weave like Sachi suggests in the Newsboy Cap pattern and it won't look strange.
#millinery
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Lihten dan čuvges ruoná ruovdagiidan velveta vuosttaš geardde geahččalit Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap-minstera. In dieđe, maid jurddašan dan rávvagis geavahit tuksema, muhto dán gal dáidá dárbbašit juoidá mii dahká dan veaháš jievjjadeabbon ja buohccut.
#gahpirduodji

Sachi’s newsboy cap-minster rávve čuohpat kruvnna oasis sárgái guovttebeallásaččat vuokŋadaga ektui ("biasii"), vai dat geannida eanet birra birrasis, muhto dat dahká ahte velvet-sárggat mannet veaháš čiŋat, go mus lea miela eanet das ahte dat leat ceaggut.
Oaidnit maid dás šaddá. Dát lea geahččalanveršuvdna vai oainnán mo minster dovdduha. Mun liikon velvetii dan strukturra dihte, muhto ruoná ii livčče mu vuosttaš válljen, ja dát bátnes lea nu čuvges ahte mun gal berre lasihit ovtta muđui, livččii dat tuksen dahje juoga eará maid gávnnan vurkkis.

Nuppi geardde geahččadettiin fuobmájin ahte mu bátnes ii leat ruovdagiidan velveta ollege, dat lea dušše velveta, nu ahte sáhtán čuohpat dan 45° vuokŋadaga ektui nu go Sachi rávve Newsboy Cap-minsteris, iige dat oro sihkkarit.

#gahpirduodji
hypo_1:
Lihten dan geahpes ruoná kordfløyela mu vuosttaš geardde geahččalit Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap-minstera. In dieđe mo mun dovddan dan rávvagii geavahit tuksenbáhpára, muhto dás ilbmilis gal livččii buorre juoga mii dahká dan veaháš garrasabbun ja buohccut.
#gahpirduodji

Sachi's newsboy cap-minster rávve čuohpat kruvnna oasis veavdaga ektui čiččohallat ("biasii"), vai dat geannida eanet birra birrasa, muhto de kordfløyela sárggat mannet ceakkočiŋat, go mun mieldehivčen ahte dat leat ceaggut.
Oaidnit maid dás šaddá. Dát lea geahččalanveršuvdna vai oainnán mo minster orru. Mun liikon kordfløyelii dan struktuvrra dihte, muhto ruoná ii livčče mu vuosttaš válljen, ja dát bátnes lea nu geahpes ahte mun gal berre lasihit ovtta muđui, livččii dat tuksenbáhpár dahje mii nu beare gávdno vurkkis.

Nuppástusa geahččadettiin fuobmájin ahte mu bátnes ii leat kordfløyel ollege, dat lea dušše velveta, nu ahte sáhtán čuohpat dan 45° veavdaga ektui nu go Sachi rávve Newsboy Cap-minsteris, iige dat oro oddasit.
#gahpirduodji

#gahpirduodji

#gahpirduodji
hypo_3:
Lihkadan dan geahpes ruoná kordfløyela go geahččalan vuosttaš geardde Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap -minstera. In leat vissis mo dovddan das ahte ávžžuhit geavahit tuksebáhpára, muhto ilbmilis dát gal háliida juoidá mii dahká dan veaháš garraseabbon ja buohccut.
#gahpirduodji

Sachi's newsboy cap -minster rávve čuohpat kruvnna oasis veavdaga ektui čiččohallat ("biasii"), vai dat geannida eanet birra birrasa, muhto de kordfløyela sárggat mannet veaháš ceakkočiŋat, go mun mieldehivččen ahte dat leat ceaggut.
Oaidnit maid dás šaddá. Dát lea geahččalanveršuvdna vai oainnán mo minster doibmá. Mun liikon kordfløyelii dan struktuvrra dihte, muhto ruoná ii livčče mu vuosttaš válljen, ja dát bátnes lea nu geahpes ahte gal berrešan lasihit ovtta muđui, livččii dat tuksebáhpár dahje mii nu beare gávdno vurkkis.

Go geahččalin vel oktii, de fuobmájin ahte mu bátnes ii leat kordfløyel ollege, dat lea dušše velveta, nu ahte sáhtán čuohpat dan 45° veavdaga ektui nu go Sachi rávve Newsboy Cap -minsteris, iige dat oro oddasit.
#gahpirduodji
hypo_4:
Ruoššamin dan geahpes ruoná kordfløyela vai geahččalan vuosttaš geardde Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap -minstera. In dieđe mo mun dovddan dan birra ahte rávvejit geavahit tuksebáhpára, muhto ilbmilis dat gal háliida juoidá mii dahká dan veaháš garraseabbon ja buohccut.
#gahpirduodji

Sachi's newsboy cap -minster rávve ahte kruvnna oasis galgá čuohpat veavdaga ektui čiččohallat ("biasii"), vai dat geannida eanet birra birrasa, muhto de kordfløyela sárggat mannet ceakkočiŋat, go mun mieldehivččen ahte dat leat ceaggut.
Oaidnit maid dás šaddá. Dát lea geahččalanveršuvdna vai oažžun dovddu minstera birra. Mun liikon kordfløyelii dan struktuvrra geažil, muhto ruoná ii livčče mu vuosttaš válljen, ja dát bátnes lea nu geahpes ahte gal berrešan lasihit oktan lasimuđu, livččii dat tuksebáhpár dahje mii nu beare gávdno vurkkis.

Go geahččalin dan nubbi geardde, de fuobmájin ahte mu bátnes ii leat ge kordfløyel ollege, dat lea dušše velveta, nu ahte sáhtán čuohpat dan 45° veavdaga ektui nu go Sachi rávve Newsboy Cap -minsteris, iige dat oro oddasit.
#gahpirduodji
hypo_5:
Mun ruoššamin dán geahpas ruoná kordfløyela vuosttaš geahččalussan Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap -minstteriin. In leat visot sihkkar das mo dovddan dan rávvagiin ahte galggašii geavahit tukseduogáža, muhto ilbmilis dát gal háliida juoidá mii dagaha dan veaháš jievjjaseabbon ja buohccut.
#gahpirduodji

Sachi's newsboy cap -minstteris rávvejit čuohpat kruvnna oasis veavdaga ektui veallat, dego "biasii", vai dat geannida eanet birra birrasa. Muhto de kordfløyela sárggat mannet ceakkočis, ja mun mielas dat livčče buoret ceaggut.
Oaidnit maid dás boahtá. Dát lea geahččalanveršuvdna vai oažžun buoret dovddu minsttera birra. Mun liikon kordfløyelii dan struktuvrra geažil, muhto ruoná ii livčče mu vuosttaš válljen, ja dát bátnes lea nu geahpas ahte berrešin lasihit oktan lasimuđu, livččii dat tukseduogáš dahje juoga eará maid gávnnat vurkkis.

Nubbi geardde geahččaladettiin fuobmájin ahte mu bátnes ii leat ge kordfløyel ollege, dat lea dušše velveta. Danne sáhtán dan čuohpat 45° veavdaga ektui nu go Sachi rávve Newsboy Cap -minstteris, iige dat oro veadrahahttin.
#gahpirduodji
hypo_6:
Ruoššan dán geahpas ruoná kordfløyela mu vuosttaš geahččalussii Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap -minstteriin. In leat sihkkar das maid jurddašan rávvagis geavahit tukseduogáža, muhto ilbmilis dát dárbbaša juoidá mii dagaha dan veaháš jievjjaseabbon ja buohccut.
#gahpirduodji

Sachi's newsboy cap -minstteris rávvejit čuohpat kruvnna oasis veavdaga ektui veallat, dego "biasii", vai dat geannida eanet birra birrasa. Muhto de kordfløyela sárggat mannet ceakkočis, ja mun mielas dat livčče buoret ceaggut.
Oaidnit maid dás boahtá. Dát lea geahččalanveršuvdna vai oažžun dovddu minsttera birra. Mun liikon kordfløyelii dan struktuvrra geažil, muhto ruoná ii livčče mu vuosttaš válljen, ja dát bátnes lea nu geahpas ahte berrešin lasihit oktan lasimuđu, livččii dat tukseduogáš dahje juoga eará maid gávnnat vurkkis.

Nubbi geardde geahččaladettiin fuobmájin ahte mu bátnes ii leat ge kordfløyel ollege, dat lea dušše velveta, nu ahte sáhtán dan čuohpat 45° veavdaga ektui nu go Sachi rávve Newsboy Cap -minstteris, iige dat oro veadrahahttin.
#gahpirduodji

hypo_0:
@theynege Mun lean leat dihton dansup birra (du geažil ja muhtun eará olbmuid geažil), muhto in lean oaidnán dan dáhpáhuvvat duohta áiggis. Dán háve oidnen dan duohta áiggis, ja dat lei duođas bargu. Fiinnašit. Dego son livčče dábálaš dahkki.

@theynege Son válddii skearbmagoarggu su kontos ja almmuhii dan iežas “veahkkalaš maska-nissonolbmo” kommentariiguin, ja go su ii gohčoduvvui dan geažil, de son DALÁNAGA sihkkui dan almmuhemiid ja álggahii almmuhit iežas “searválagaid huksejeaddji” duođaštusaid ja buot olbmuid geain son lea bargan ja ja ja vau, ii go son leat hui buorre — ii oktage dovddastupmi das ahte son — searválagaid huksejeaddji ja olmmái geas leat geassejuvvon identitehtat ja buot — čujuhii doaibmankeahttes, rassiihtalaš nissonolbmo neahtas hehttehussii go dahkai dan.
Dat geahččaleaddji, dego snáipera láhtten, lei juoga maid ii sáhttán guođđit fuobmátkeahttá. Son lei gárvvis muitalit buohkaide man buorre son lei, vai veadjit vuolgit duohken juoidá mii lei vuođđolaččat njeaidan, maid son dieđii sáhttit dagahit vahágiid.

@quietmarc @theynege dat almmuhus lei dego ableisma hat trick

@hannorein@mastodon.social sooo, we’re tagging verified human content now for them to have a dataset with less slop to train on?
I don’t know, they should asphyxiate from their own barfed up slop mess they’ve created until their latent vector space converges to unity.

@helpsterTee @hannorein My first thought as well. I killed off my personal site since I didn't want to feed the various Torment Nexuses. Marking genuine human content just makes building new, unpoisoned and slop free data sets easier.
I thought about doing the opposite and building a "poison pot" for AI crawlers but my poor little server is not that beefy.

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social yeah, if we suffer, let them suffer.
If your employer stuffs AI in your daily routine, instead of resigning, use malicious compliance and apply it to totally mundane problems and embrace slightly-wrong answers while burning through corporate token credit to ruin quarterly performance.
I’m so fed up with this and they’re using it anyways against us, so let’s have a little fun, while we can 🫤
Edit: they’re making up numbers all the time and faking profits for a while now, the usage that’ll bankrupt your employer won’t place a dent at slop headquarters unprofitable scam business anyways or their forest burning slopetuum mobile.

hypo_0:
@hannorein@mastodon.social oii, de merkejit dál verifiserejuvvon olbmuid sisdoalu vai sis lea dataset main lea unnit sloppa hárjehallat?
In dieđe, sii galberedje iežaset oksadan sloppa-sotkkaldagasas maid leat ráhkadan, dassážii go sin latent vector space konvergere unitii.

@helpsterTee @hannorein Mu vuosttaš jurddašupmi lei seamma. Mun heaittihin iežan persovnnalaš neahttasiiddu danne go in háliidan biebmat iešguđetlágan Torment Nexuseid. Duohta olbmuid sisdoalu merkejet dušše dahká álkit hukset ođđa, eai mieđihuvvon ja sloppa-váilevaš datačohkkemiid.
Mun jurddašin dahkat vuostebáikkálaččat ja hukset AI-crawleriide "mirkkopáni", muhto mu geahpaš unna server ii leat nu veadjemeahttun.

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social jo, jus mii gillimet, de gillijehket sii ge.
Jus du bargoaddi deavdá AI:a du beaivválaš rutiinnas, de eai gal eretcealkke, muhto čuovo baháslaš gulahallama ja geavat dan ollásit dábálaš problemain, ja dohkkeš veahá boasttu vástádusaid go kulutat fitnodat-tokenkredihta vai bilidat njealjátjahkebeali bohtosiid.
Mun lean nu ollásit váiban dás, ja sii geavahit dan guđe nu guđe min vuostáge, de leat vel uhcán suohtas go vel sáhttit 🫤
Divvut: sii hutket loguid álo ja leat feaikkahan vuoittu juo dii buoli, ja dat geavaheapmi mii du bargoaddi bankruptta dahká ii bággege sloppa-váldobáikki ihkeprofihtalaš skámmafitnodahkii dahje sin vuovddi buollán sloppa-perpetuum mobile:e.

In dieđe, muhto sii gal berrešedje iežaset iežaset oksadan sloppa-sotkkaldagasas hehttejuvvot, dan maid leat ráhkadan, gitta dassážii go sin latent vector space čoahkkanii ovttadussii.

@helpsterTee @hannorein Mu vuosttaš jurddašupmi lei seamma. Mun heaittihin iežan persovnnalaš neahttasiiddu, go in háliidan biebmat daid iešguđetlágan Torment Nexusaid. Jus merkejit duohta olbmuid sisdoalu, de dat dušše álkkida ođđa, eai mirkkohuvvon ja sloppa-váilevaš datačohkkemiid huksema.
Mun jurddašin maid dahkat vuostebáikkálaččat ja hukset AI-crawleriide "mirkkobáni", muhto mu geafes unna server ii leat nu fámolaš.

source_doc:
The Case for Impeaching Donald Trump

Bombs over Latin America: It's giving Wag the Dog, if you ask me. The administration, seemingly hot to bring back neoconservative military conquest, soft-launched its latest regime change war in Venezuela by making indiscriminate attacks on boats in the Caribbean and Pacific waters off of Central America. These attacks, all undertaken without a jot of congressional oversight and on the dubious premise that the boats were packed with fentanyl bound for the United States, were murderous on their own. But the news that the military was ordered to strike an already stricken boat in a "double tap" attack to kill any survivors has raised the specter of war crimes - and in a way that even many Republicans don't seem ready to countenance.

Trump's Binance buddy gets a pardon: Changpeng Zhao began this year the disgraced former CEO of Binance, the world's largest cryptocurrency exchange, having done prison time for, as the Biden DOJ put it, "failing to maintain an effective anti-money laundering (AML) program," violating the Bank Security Act, and allowing money to flow freely to a host of bad actors, including "terrorists, cybercriminals, and child abusers." But Zhao, having forfeited the right to run Binance, wanted back in. So he used his connections to Trump's family and inner circle to secure a pardon that would let him run the show again. In return, Zhao showered his attention on World Liberty Financial - using Binance's leverage to enrich Trump's private crypto fund. TNR's Tim Noah was positively apoplectic about the shady arrangement.

Chips to China: Speaking of Tim Noah and apoplexy: It's probably not great that one firm, Nvidia, has come to possess such godlike, market-moving power. Its outsize importance to the global economy had Noah fingering it as one of the major pillars to crumble, when he gamed out a potential Trump stock market crash back in October. Trump's been doing what he can to boost Nvidia's fortunes, however: This year, the president broke with long-standing national security tradition and announced that he was permitting the firm to sell its H200 chips to China. As The New York Times" David Sanger noted, the deal - the fruits of "intense lobbying" from Nvidia CEO and White House gadfly Jensen Huang - raised a basic question: "If the chips that power the most advanced technology can be sold to the United States" chief technological, military and financial competitor, where is the new line drawn?" That's probably the least of Trump's concerns, however: The deal also guaranteed that "25 percent of all the revenues from the sales would go to the United States," in yet another case of this administration's affection for fascist corporatism.

hypo_0:
Vuođđu Donald Trumpa virgerávdnjui bidjamii

Bommát Latin-Amerihka badjelis: Mu mielas dát mii addá Wag the Dog -vuođđoassosišvuođa. Hálddahus, mii orru hui beroštumin buktit ruovttoluotta neokonservatiivvalaš soahteveagalaš valljema, álggahii ođđa režima molsuma soahka Venezuelas vuollegaččat go dagai váralaš ja earuhis rihkkosiid fatnasiidda Karibialaš mearas ja Gaska-Amerihka olggobealde Pasifikačáziin. Dát rihkkosit, buot dahkan haga veahášge kongreassa geahčadeami ja eahpedieđolaš vuođul ahte fatnasiin lei fentanyl mii lei johtimin Ovttastuvvan Stáhtaid guvlui, ledje iešalddes jápmingaskavuođalaččat. Muhto diehtu ahte soahteveaga gohččui čuohcit juo vahágahtton fatnasa "double tap" -rihkkosis vai goddit buot veajáheaddjiid, lea čuožžilan soahterihkkosiid varjjága — ja dánu láhkái ahte vel ollu republikanerat eai oro leat geargan dohkket dan.

Trumpa Binance-ustibii oažžu árbmogihtima: Changpeng Zhao álggahii dán jagi heaittihuvvon ovdalaš Binance-jođiheaddjin, mii lea máilmmi stuorámus kryptovaluhtta lonuhallanbáiki, go son lei giddagasvuođa gollan dan dihte ahte, nugo Bidena riektedepartemeanta dadjai, son "ii doalahuvvan dohkálaš ruhtapesu eastadeaddji (AML) prográmma," rihkkui Báŋkasuodjalanlága, ja divttii ruđa friijalaččat golahit ollu bahás doaibmiide, maiddái "terroristaide, cybersivdnide ja mánáid heajutbárttejeaddjiide." Muhto Zhao, gii lei massán vuoigatvuođa jođihit Binancea, háliidii fas sisa. Danne son geavahii oktavuođaid Trumpa bearrašii ja sisabahkkái vai oažžut árbmogihtima mii livččii su ahte son sáhtášii fas jođihit. Máksin Zhao vuolggahii iežas fuomášumi World Liberty Financialii — geavahettiin Binance váikkuhanfámu riggodit Trumpa priváhta kryptofoandda. TNR:a Tim Noah lei čielgasit vuolggaheapmásaš dán hámis ortnegiin.

Čippat Kiinái: Go Tim Noahs ja vuolggaheapmásis hupmat: Ii leat nu buorre ahte okta fitnodat, Nvidia, lea beassan oažžut nu ipmilalaš, márkanaid lihkostuvvi fámu. Dan erenoamáš dehálašvuohta máilmmi ekonomiijii oaččuhii Noah nammadit dan ovdanbuktin okta stuorámus čuožžileaddji baliid, go son geahččalii jurddašit vejolaš Trumpa oskemárkanatruvkkodeami juo golggotmánus. Trump lea dattetge dahkan maid sáhttá nannet Nvidia lihkostumiid: Dán jagi presideanta massii guhkesáigásaš álbmotdorvvolašvuođa árbevieru ja almmuhii ahte son diktá fitnodahkii vuovdit iežas H200-čippaid Kiinái. Nugo The New York Timesa David Sanger fuomášii, sohppa — mii lei Nvidia jođiheaddji ja Vilges Viessosa deaddilabbui Jensen Huanga "garra lobbeheami" bohtosat — čuožžilii vuođđogažaldaga: "Jus čippat mat addet fámu ovdánahttimus teknologiijii sáhttet vuovdojuvvot Ovttastuvvan Stáhtaid váldo teknologalaš, soahteveagalaš ja ruhtalaš gilvaleaddjái, gos ođđa rádji dalle sárgojuvvo?" Dat ii leat iláge Trumpa stuorámus fuolahus, dattetge: Sohppa maiddái dáhkidii ahte "25 proseantta buot vuovdima boađuin mannet Ovttastuvvan Stáhtaide," vel oktii dán hálddahusa mieldeorun fascisttalaš korporativismmii.

Dan erenoamáš stuorra mearkkašupmi máilmmi ekonomiijii oaččuhii Noah nammadit dan oktan daid váldovuođuin mat sáhttet luohppat, go son juo golggotmánus smiehttai vejolaš Trumpa oskemárkana ruccaneami. Trump lea dattetge bargan dan maid sáhttá nannet Nvidia lihkostumiid: Dán jagi presideanta botkkii guhkesáigásaš álbmotdorvvolašvuođa árbevieruin ja almmuhii ahte son diktá fitnodahkii vuovdit iežas H200-čippaid Kiinái. Nugo The New York Times:a David Sanger fuomášii, sohppa — mii lea Nvidia jođiheaddji ja Vilges Viessosa dábálaš deattuhisvári Jensen Huanga ”garra lobbeheami” bohtosat — bajidii vuođđogažaldaga: ”Jus čippat mat addet fámu ovdánahttimus teknologiijii sáhttet vuovdojuvvot Ovttastuvvan Stáhtaid váldo teknologalaš, soahteveagalaš ja ruhtalaš gilvaleaddjái, de gos ođđa rádji sárgojuvvo?” Dat lea várra unnimus Trumpa fuolahusain, dattetge: Sohppa maiddái dáhkidii ahte ”25 proseantta buot vuovdima boađuin manná Ovttastuvvan Stáhtaide”, vel oktii čájehettiin dán hálddahusa mieltymu fascisttalaš korporativismmii.

Dát rihkkosit, mat buot čađahuvvojedje almmá mihkkege kongreassa geahčadeami haga ja eahpečielga vuođđudusa vuolde ahte fatnasiin lei fentanyl mii lei mannamin Ovttastuvvan Stáhtaide, ledje ieža alcceseaset jápmimiidda vuođđuduvvan. Máksin Zhao deattuhii World Liberty Financiala — geavahettiin Binance váikkuhanfámu riggodit Trumpa priváhta kryptofondii. TNR:a Tim Noah reagerehii dán suorggálaš ortnega dihte hui garra.

Čippat Kiinái: Ja go Tim Noahs ja garra reaksuvnnain hupmat: Ii leat várra buorre ahte okta fitnodat, Nvidia, lea oažžun nu stuorra, dego ibmelaš fámu mii lihkosta márkanaid. Dan erenoamáš stuorra mearkkašupmi máilmmi ekonomiijii oaččuhii Noah nammadit dan oktan daid váldotugiin mat sáhttet luohppat, go son juo golggotmánus smiehttai vejolaš Trumpa oskemárkana ruccáneami. Trump lea dattetge bargan dan maid sáhttá buoridit Nvidia boahtteáiggiid: Dán jagi presideanta botkkii guhkesáigásaš álbmotdorvvolašvuođa árbevieruin ja almmuhii ahte son diktá fitnodahkii vuovdit iežas H200-čippaid Kiinái. Nugo The New York Times:a David Sanger fuomášii, sohppa — mii lea Nvidia jođiheaddji ja Vilges Viessosa dábálaš deattuheaddji Jensen Huanga ”garra lobbeheami” bohtosat — bajidii vuođđogažaldaga: ”Jus čippat, mat addet ovdánahttimus teknologiijii dan fámu, sáhttet vuovdojuvvot Ovttastuvvan Stáhtaid váldo teknologalaš, soahteveagalaš ja ruhtalaš gilvaleaddjái, de gos ođđa rádji geassojuvvo?” Dat ii leat várra vel Trumpa stuorámus fuolahus: Sohppa maiddái dáhkidii ahte ”25 proseantta buot vuovdima boađuin manná Ovttastuvvan Stáhtaide”, mii fas čájeha dán hálddahusa mieltymu fascisttalaš korporativismmii.

Bombbat Latin-Amerihka badjelis: Jus mus jearát, de dát muittuha filmma Wag the Dog. Hálddahus, mii orru hui áŋgirin máhcahit neokonservatiivvalaš soahtevalljema, álggahii hilggos láhkai ođđamus režimmamolsašupmisoađis Venezuelas, go čađahii válljeheapmehis ávkkuhusaid fatnasiid vuostá Karibia- ja Bassemearačázain Gaska-Amerihka olggobealde. Dát ávkkuhusat, mat buot dahkkojedje almmá mihkkege kongreassa geahčadeami haga ja eahpečielga vuođđudusa vuolde ahte fatnasiin lei fentanyl mii lei mannan Ovttastuvvan Stáhtaide, ledje iešalddis jápmima dagahit. Muhto diehtu ahte soahteveaga lei gohččon čuohcit juo časkkojuvvon fatnasa ”double tap” -ráidalusas, vai goddit buot vejolaš eallinbáhccejeaddjiid, lea bajidan oaivilis ovdan soahtelága rihkkosiid suoládaga — ja dán láhkai ahte vel ollu republikanerat eai oro leat gearggus dan dohkkehit.

Trumpa Binance-ustit oažžu árbmogihtima: Changpeng Zhao álggahii dán jagi heaittihuvvon ovdalaš Binance-jođiheaddjin. source_doc:
Melbourne Renegades host Glenn Maxwell and the Melbourne Stars at Marvel Stadium in BBL15 after Usman Khawaja and Brisbane Heat host Sydney Thunder

Sam Harper dominated with 82 not out off 51 balls and Glenn Maxwell recalled the feeling of ball on bat in a subdued innings of 20 not out off 17 balls, which included one massive six. He has not lost his ability and would have enjoyed the chance to spend time in the middle.

The crowd of 42,846 was not given the contest they hoped for as the Stars won the match by eight wickets with 25 balls remaining.

It keeps Melbourne Stars in contention as they break a three-match losing sequence and makes life hard for Melbourne Renegades. Marcus Stoinis bowled well to take 3-33 and was on a hat-trick at one stage while Harper is in great form having hit 356 runs at a strike rate of 159 for the tournament. He was man-of-the-match.

Tom Rogers bounced back with a fast 50 against Melbourne Renegades

But it was all over once Tom Rogers helped himself to 50 off 19 balls to start the innings with an opening partnership of 84 with Harper.

"They outplayed us at the "G so it was nice to get our fifth win," Harper told Fox Cricket.

Most interesting were the comments from the Fox Cricket commentary box where former England captain Michael Vaughan made it clear how disappointed he was with the way the English hierarchy handled a nightclub incident involving Harry Brook in New Zealand before they arrived in Australia for The Ashes.

Melbourne Stars veteran Peter Siddle said "it was a good turnaround" with the win pushing the team back into second spot on the BBL table.

It's starting to heat up with three games remaining for Melbourne Renegades and two matches for Melbourne Stars.

There is still plenty of cricket left this summer so keep tuning in. Thanks for following. Can the Stars finally win the title?

The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Melbourne Renegades guossoha Glenn Maxwella ja Melbourne Starsa Marvel Stadiumas BBL15:s maŋŋel go Usman Khawaja ja Brisbane Heat guossohedje Sydney Thundera

Sam Harper válddii dievas ráđđi 82 juohkinkehttehis ruvnnain 51 bállus, ja Glenn Maxwell muitalii fas dovddu go bállu deaivvá bátti, su geahpes inningsas gos son čuovui 20 juohkinkehttehis ruvnna 17 bállus, mas lei maiddái okta hirbmat stuorra guhtta. Son ii leat massán iežas máhtu, ja son livččii illudan vejolašvuođa geavahit áiggi guovddážis.

42,846 olbmo čohkkáŋas ii ožžon dan gilvvu maid sii sávvejedje, go Stars vuittii spealu gávcci wicketiin ja 25 bállu báhcásiin.

Dat doallá Melbourne Starsa ain gilvosis go sii botkejit golmma-spealu massinráiddu, ja dahká eallima váttisin Melbourne Renegadesii. Marcus Stoinis báhčii bures ja váldii 3-33, ja son lei ovtta muttus hat-tricka lahka, muhto Harper lea hui buori hámis go son lea deavdán 356 ruvnna 159 strike rateain dán gilvvu várás. Son válljejuvvui spealu buoremussan.

Tom Rogers máhcahii iežas buori hámii johtilis 50:in Melbourne Renegadesa vuostá

Muhto buot lei mearriduvvon go Tom Rogers ráhkadii iežas várás 50 ruvnna dušše 19 bállus ja álggahii inningsa 84 ruvnna rahpaseaddji ovttasbargguin Harperain.

"Sii vuoitte min 'G:s, nu ahte lei buorre oažžut min viđát vuoittu," Harper dadjai Fox Cricketii.

Eanemus miellagiddevaččat ledje kommentárat Fox Cricket kommentahtorbokssas, gos ovddeš Englándda kapteena Michael Vaughan čielgasit čájehii man stuora váibmuheami son dovddii dan dihte mo eŋgelaslaš jođiheaddjit gieđahalledje idja-klubba dáhpáhusa mii guoskkai Harry Brooka Ođđa-Selánddas ovdal go sii bohte Austrrálii The Ashes várás.

Melbourne Starsa veterána Peter Siddle dadjai ahte "dat lei buorre jorgaleapmi", go vuoitto loktii joavkku fas nubbin sadjái BBL-tabellas.

Álggá garžžidit go Melbourne Renegadesas leat vel golbma spealu báhcán ja Melbourne Starsas guokte spealu.

Dán geasi lea vel ollu cricketa báhcán, nu ahte joatkke geahčadeami. Giitu go čuovvulit. Sáhttetgo Stars loahpalaččat vuoitit namahusa?

Dat doallá Melbourne Starsa ain gilvvu siste, go joavku botkkihii golmma spealu massinráiddu, ja seammás dagaha dili váddásabbon Melbourne Renegadesii. Marcus Stoinis báhčii bures ja váldii loguid 3–33, ja son lei ovtta muttus hat-tricka lahka, seammás go Harper lea hui buori hámis, go son lea dán gilvvus čohkken 356 ruvnna 159 strike rateain. Son válljejuvvui spealu buoremussan.

Tom Rogers máhcai fas buori hámái johtilis 50:in Melbourne Renegadesa vuostá.

Muhto buot lei measta geahčen dan maŋŋel go Tom Rogers čohkkádii 50 ruvnna dušše 19 bállus, ja son álggahii inningsa 84 ruvnna rahpaseaddji ovttasbargguin Harperain.

"Sii ledje min buoret ‘G:s, nu ahte lei somá oažžut min viđát vuoittu,” Harper dadjai Fox Cricketii.

Eanemus miellagiddevaččat ledje cealkámušat Fox Cricketa kommentáhtorbokssas, gos ovddeš Englándda kapteena Michael Vaughan čielgasit čájehii man stuorra su heahpádus lei dan geažil, mo eŋgelaslaš jođiheaddjit gieđahalle Harry Brooka guoski idjaklubba dáhpáhusa Ođđa-Selánddas ovdal go sii bohte Austrálii The Ashes -ráiddu várás.

Melbourne Starsa veterána Peter Siddle dadjai ahte “dat lei buorre jorgaleapmi”, go dat vuoitto loktii joavkku fas nubbin sadjái BBL-tabellas.

Dál álgá garrašit, go Melbourne Renegadesas leat vel golbma spealu báhcán ja Melbourne Starsas guokte.

Dán geasi lea vel ollu cricketa báhcán, nu ahte joatkke čuovvuma. Giitu go leat mielde lean. Sáhttágo Stars loahpalaččat vuoitit namahusa?

source_doc:
This morning while walking to work I had a thought: is it possible that the reason why the perception of the #replyGuy problem being worse on #Mastodon (and the #Fediverse in general) is due to sheer (lack of) numbers?
So I came up with a simplified model to check if this was indeed sufficient to explain the phenomenon.
Let's assume that, similarly to Mario Cipolla's Basic Laws of Human Stupidity, the fraction of reply guys in a population is a given constant ρ.
1/n
#maths

Let's also assume for simplicity that reply guys operate mechanically, i.e. do not use some kind of automation to find posts to reply to. This puts an upper limit to the total number of posts a reply guy can reply to in the course of a single day. Let's call this D.
We can also assume that on average a single non-reply-guy will generally post P < D posts per day.
Ignoring for a moment larger timeframes than a single day (but the discussion is similar if we extend the observation period) …
2/n

 … and assuming replyguys select randomly the posts to reply to (i.e. they don't specifically target a person for any particular reason), can we calculate what is the probability that a given person will see at least one reply from a reply guy?
Before doing the actual math, let's look at some practical example. Let's say that 1 in 10 users are reply guys, a reply guy goes through 100 posts per day, and a regular user posts 10 messages per day.
3/n

If there are 10 users in the network, 9 are regular users and 1 is a reply guy. There are 90 regular posts per day, and the the single reply guy will see ALL of them (because they can read 100 posts per day, so they see all the posts made on that network on that day.
However, if there are 100 users in the network, 10 of which are reply guys, the network will produce 900 posts in a day, but reply guys will NOT necessarily see all of them!
4/n

In the second scenario, each reply guy will see 100 random posts of the 900. Even if there are 10 reply guys, this does NOT mean that each post will be found by a reply guy! There may be posts that are seen by multiple reply guys, and posts that will not be seen by any reply guy!
So how do we compute the probability for a post to be seen by a reply guy in this case?
One way to do this is to compute the probability of NOT being seen by ANY reply guy, and taking the complement.
5/n

Now, since each reply guy sees 100 of the 900 posts, each post has a 1/9 probability of being seen by any particular reply guy, i.e. an 8/9 probability of NOT being seen by that particular reply guy. The probability of not being seen by ANY reply guy is thus 8/9 for each reply guy and assuming that the probabilities are independent, this means that the probability of not being seen by any of the 10 reply guys is (8/9)^10, which is 0.30794....
6/n

This means that the probability for each post to be seen by AT LEAST ONE reply guy is 1-(8/9)^10 or approximately 69%.
Of course, if someone posts 10 posts per day, then the probability for them to come across a reply guy is higher than that, because it will be the probability of at least on their post being seen by at least one reply guy!
Again assuming that for each post the probabilities are independent, the math is only slightly more complex:
6/n

each post has a (8/9)^10 probability of not being seen, but for the probability for ALL posts not being seen, that has to be further elevated to the number of posts made by the same person, which is 10, so (8/9)^100, and the probability of AT LEAST ONE POST being seen by AT LEAST ONE reply guys becomes 1 - (8/9)^100 = 0.99999233… which is not 100% but very close to it.
This was the case of a network 100 people, 10 of which are reply guys. Let's do one more and then go general.
7/n

Let's now assume the network has 100K users, still with the same 10% of reply guys (90K regular users, 10K reply guys).
Each reply guy still reads 100 posts per day, and the regular users still produce 10 posts per day.
This means that in a single day the regular users produce 900K posts, and each reply guys reads 100 of those 900K posts!
Still under the randomness assumption, this means that a single reply guy will only see 100/900K posts!
8/n
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
Odne iđit go vázzán bargui, de jurddašin: sáhttá go leat nu ahte sivva manne #replyGuy-váttisvuohta orru leat váibbasut #Mastodon:s (ja #Fediverse:s oppalaččat) lea dušše ollislaš logu (váilivuođa) geažil?
De ráhkadin ovttageardánis modealla geahččalit, leago dát duođaid doarvái čilget fenomena.
Váldde ahte, seammaláhkai go Mario Cipolla Human Stupiditya Vuođđolágat, reply guy-id oassi álbmogis lea addojuvvon konstánta ρ.
1/n
#matematihkka

Váldde maid álkesvuođa dihtii ahte reply guy-t doaibmet meahcálaččat, dahje eai geavat makkárge automašuvnna gávdnat čállosiid maidda vástidit. Dát bidjá bajimus ráji olles logui čállosiin, maid reply guy sáhttá vástidit ovtta beaivvi mielde. Gohčodit dan D:n.
Fertet maid váldit ahte gaskamearálaččat okta dábálaš, ii-reply-guy olbmo čállá dábálaččat P < D čállosa beaivvis.
Ja jos guođđit veahá stuorát áigegaskkaid go ovtta beaivvi (muhto ságastallan lea sullii seamma jos guhkidit observašuvnna áiggi) …
2/n

… ja jos váldit ahte reply guy-t válljejit čállosiid maidda vástidit randombas (dahje ii nu ahte sii erenoamážit čuovvut juoga ovtta olbmo muhtun sivva geažil), sáhttit go rehkenastit man stuoris lea vejolašvuohta ahte muhtun dihto olbmo oaidná unnimusat ovtta vástádusa reply guy:s?
Ovdal go manašii ieš matematihkkai, geahččalit muhtun geavatlaš ovdamearkka. Dadjat ahte 1 juohke 10 geavaheaddjis lea reply guy, okta reply guy geahččá 100 čállosa beaivvis, ja dábálaš geavaheaddji čállá 10 dieđu beaivvis.
3/n

Jos fierpmádagas leat 10 geavaheaddji, 9 leat dábálaš geavaheaddjit ja 1 lea reply guy. De leat 90 dábálaš čállosa beaivvis, ja dat áidna reply guy oaidná BUOT daid (danne go son sáhttá lohkat 100 čállosa beaivvis, de son oaidná buot dan beaivvi čállosiid dán fierpmádagas.
Muhto jos fierpmádagas leat 100 geavaheaddji, geain 10 leat reply guy-t, de fierpmádat ráhkada 900 čállosa beaivvis, muhto reply guy-t eai geahččal buot daid dárbbašlaččat!
4/n

Nubbi scenários juohke reply guy oaidná 100 random čállosa dan 900:s. Vaikko leat 10 reply guy-t, dát ii MEARKKAŠ ahte juohke čállosa gávdná muhtun reply guy! Sáhttet leat čállosat maid máŋga reply guy oaidná, ja čállosat maid ii oktage reply guy oainne!
De mo rehkenastit vejolašvuođa ahte muhtun čállosa oaidná reply guy dán diliin?
Okta vuohki lea rehkenastit vejolašvuođa ahte ii oktage reply guy oainne dan, ja de váldit kompletmeantta.
5/n

Dal, go juohke reply guy oaidná 100 dan 900 čállosis, juohke čállosis lea 1/9 vejolašvuohta ahte muhtun dihto reply guy oaidná dan, dahje 8/9 vejolašvuohta ahte dát dihto reply guy ii oainne dan. Vejolašvuohta ahte ii OKTAGE reply guy oainne dan lea nappo 8/9 juohke reply guy várás, ja jos váldit ahte dát vejolašvuođat leat iešheanalaččat, de dat mearkkaša ahte vejolašvuohta ahte ii oktage dan 10 reply guy:s oainne dan lea (8/9)^10, mii lea 0.30794....
6/n

Dát mearkkaša ahte vejolašvuohta juohke čállosa várás ahte unnimusat OKTA reply guy oaidná dan lea 1-(8/9)^10, dahje sullii 69%.
Dieđusge, jos muhtun čállá 10 čállosa beaivvis, de vejolašvuohta ahte son boahtá vuostá reply guy lea stuorát go dat, danne go dalle dat lea vejolašvuohta ahte unnimusat okta su čállosiin oaidnojuvvo unnimusat ovtta reply guy:s!
Fas jos váldit ahte juohke čállosa várás vejolašvuođat leat iešheanalaččat, de matematihkka lea dušše veahá eanet komplikerejuvvon:
6/n

juohke čállosis lea (8/9)^10 vejolašvuohta ahte ii oaidnojuvvo, muhto vejolašvuohta ahte BUOT čállosat eai oaidnojuvvo, dat ferte vel loktojuvvot seamma olbmo čállosiid loguin, mii lea 10, nappo (8/9)^100, ja vejolašvuohta ahte unnimusat OKTA ČÁLLOSA oaidná unnimusat OKTA reply guy lea 1 - (8/9)^100 = 0.99999233… mii ii leat 100% muhto hui lahka dasa.
Dát lei dili fierpmádagas mas leat 100 olbmo, geain 10 leat reply guy-t. Dahkat vel ovtta ja de manašit oppalašvuhtii.
7/n

Váldde dal ahte fierpmádagas leat 100K geavaheaddji, ain seamma 10% reply guy-id mielde (90K dábálaš geavaheaddji, 10K reply guy-t).
Juohke reply guy lohká ain 100 čállosa beaivvis, ja dábálaš geavaheaddjit ráhkadit ain 10 čállosa beaivvis.
Dát mearkkaša ahte ovtta beaivvis dábálaš geavaheaddjit ráhkadit 900K čállosa, ja juohke reply guy lohká 100 daid 900K čállosis!
Ain dan randomness-vuođđooaivila vuolde dat mearkkaša ahte okta reply guy oaidná dušše 100/900K čállosa!
8/n

#matematihkka

Váldde maid álkesvuođa dihtii ahte reply guy-t doaibmet meahcálaččat, dahje eai geavat makkárge automatiihka gávdnat čállosiid maidda vástidit. Dát bidjá bajimus ráji dasa, man galle čállosa okta reply guy sáhttá ovtta beaivvi áigge vástidit. Gohčodit dan D:n.
Fertet maid váldit ahte gaskamearálaččat okta dábálaš, ii-reply-guy olbmo čállá P < D čállosa beaivvis.
Ja jos guođđit veahá stuorát áigegaskkaid go dušše ovtta beaivvi (muhto seamma ságastallan gusto juos guhkidit observašuvnna áiggi) …
2/n

… ja jos váldit ahte reply guy-t válljejit randombas daid čállosiid maidda vástidit (dahje eai erenoamážit čuovo juoga ovtta olbmo muhtun sivva geažil), sáhttitgo rehkenastit man stuoris lea vejolašvuohta ahte muhtun dihto olbmo oaidná unnimusat ovtta vástádusa reply guy:s?
Ovdal go mannat ieš matematihkkai, geahččalit muhtun geavatlaš ovdamearkka. Dadjat ahte 1 juohke 10 geavaheaddjis lea reply guy, okta reply guy geahččá 100 čállosa beaivvis, ja dábálaš geavaheaddji čállá 10 dieđu beaivvis.
3/n

Jos fierpmádagas leat 10 geavaheaddji, de 9 leat dábálaš geavaheaddjit ja 1 lea reply guy. De leat 90 dábálaš čállosa beaivvis, ja dat áidna reply guy oaidná BUOT daid (danne go son sáhttá lohkat 100 čállosa beaivvis, de son oaidná buot dan beaivvi čállosiid dán fierpmádagas.
Muhto jos fierpmádagas leat 100 geavaheaddji, geain 10 leat reply guy-t, de fierpmádat ráhkada 900 čállosa ovtta beaivvis, muhto reply guy-t eai dárbbašlaččat oainne buot daid!
4/n

Nubbi scenários juohke reply guy oaidná 100 random čállosa dan 900:s. Vaikko leat 10 reply guy-t, dát ii MEARKKAŠ ahte juohke čállosa gávdná muhtun reply guy! Sáhttet leat čállosat maid máŋga reply guy oaidná, ja čállosat maid ii oktage reply guy oainne!
De mo rehkenastit dás vejolašvuođa ahte muhtun čállosa oaidná reply guy?
Okta vuohki lea rehkenastit vejolašvuođa ahte ii OKTAGE reply guy oainne dan, ja de váldit dan vuostábeali.
5/n

Dal, go juohke reply guy oaidná 100 daid 900 čállosis, de juohke čállosis lea 1/9 vejolašvuohta ahte muhtun dihto reply guy oaidná dan, dahje 8/9 vejolašvuohta ahte dát dihto reply guy ii oainne dan. Vejolašvuohta ahte ii OKTAGE reply guy oainne dan lea nappo 8/9 juohke reply guy várás, ja jos váldit ahte dát vejolašvuođat leat iešheanalaččat, de dat mearkkaša ahte vejolašvuohta ahte ii oktage dan 10 reply guy:s oainne dan lea (8/9)^10, mii lea 0.30794....
6/n

Dát mearkkaša ahte vejolašvuohta juohke čállosa várás ahte unnimusat OKTA reply guy oaidná dan lea 1-(8/9)^10, dahje sullii 69%.
Dieđusge, jos muhtun čállá 10 čállosa beaivvis, de vejolašvuohta ahte son boahtá vuostá reply guy lea vel stuorát go dat, danne go dalle dat lea vejolašvuohta ahte unnimusat okta su čállosiin oaidnojuvvo unnimusat ovtta reply guy:s!
Fas jos váldit ahte juohke čállosa várás dát vejolašvuođat leat iešheanalaččat, de matematihkka lea dušše veahá eanet komplikerejuvvon:
6/n

juohke čállosis lea (8/9)^10 vejolašvuohta ahte ii oaidnojuvvo, muhto vejolašvuohta ahte BUOT čállosat eai oaidnojuvvo ferte vel loktojuvvot seamma olbmo čállosiid loguin, mii lea 10, nappo (8/9)^100, ja vejolašvuohta ahte unnimusat OKTA ČÁLLOSA oaidná unnimusat OKTA reply guy lea 1 - (8/9)^100 = 0.99999233… mii ii leat 100% muhto hui lahka dasa.
Dát lei dilli fierpmádagas mas leat 100 olbmo, geain 10 leat reply guy-t. Dahkat vel ovtta ovdamearkka ja de mannat oppalašvuhtii.
7/n

Váldde dal ahte fierpmádagas leat 100K geavaheaddji, ain seamma 10% reply guy-id mielde (90K dábálaš geavaheaddjit, 10K reply guy-t).
Juohke reply guy lohká ain 100 čállosa beaivvis, ja dábálaš geavaheaddjit ráhkadit ain 10 čállosa beaivvis.
Dát mearkkaša ahte ovtta beaivvis dábálaš geavaheaddjit ráhkadit 900K čállosa, ja juohke reply guy lohká 100 daid 900K čállosis!
Ain dan random-vuođđooaivila vuolde dát mearkkaša ahte okta reply guy oaidná dušše 100/900K čállosa!
8/n
hypo_3:
Odne iđit, go váccihin bargui, de mu mielas šattai jurdda: sáhttágo leat nu ahte sivva manne #replyGuy-váttisvuohta orru garraseabbon #Mastodon:s (ja oppalaččat #Fediverse:s) lea dušše dan dihte ahte olbmot leat njealjeslohkuvuođas hui unnán?
De ráhkadin ovttageardánis modealla geahččalit, leago dát iešalddes doarvái čilget fenomena.
Váldde ahte, seammaláhkai go Mario Cipolla olbmo jápmesvuođa vuođđolágain, reply guy-id oassi álbmogis lea addojuvvon konstánta ρ.
1/n

Jos guođđit ovtta botta olggobeallái guhkit áigegaskkaid go ovtta beaivvi (muhto seamma digaštallan gusto maid jos geahčadeapmi guhkkiduvvo) …
2/n

… ja jos váldit ahte reply guy-t válljejit randombas daid čállosiid maidda vástidit (dat lea ahte eai erenoamážit čuohcá muhtun olbmui man ge sivva dihte), sáhttitgo rehkenastit man stuoris lea vejolašvuohta ahte muhtun dihto olbmo oaidná unnimusat ovtta vástádusa reply guy:s?
Ovdal go mannat ieš matematihkkai, geahččalit ovtta geavatlaš ovdamearkka. Dadjat ahte juohke logis okta geavaheaddji lea reply guy, okta reply guy geahččá 100 čállosa beaivvis, ja dábálaš geavaheaddji čállá 10 dieđu beaivvis.
3/n

Jos fierpmádagas leat 10 geavaheaddji, de 9 leat dábálaš geavaheaddjit ja 1 lea reply guy. De leat 90 dábálaš čállosa beaivvis, ja dat áidna reply guy oaidná BUOT daid (danne go son sáhttá lohkat 100 čállosa beaivvis, de son oaidná buot dan beaivvi čállosiid dán fierpmádagas).
Muhto jos fierpmádagas leat 100 geavaheaddji, geain 10 leat reply guy-t, de fierpmádat ráhkada 900 čállosa ovtta beaivvis, muhto reply guy-t eai dárbbašlaččat oainne buot daid!
4/n

Nubbi dilis juohke reply guy oaidná 100 random čállosa dan 900:s. Vaikko leat 10 reply guy-t, dát ii MEARKKAŠ ahte juohke čállosa gávdná muhtun reply guy! Sáhttet leat čállosat maid máŋga reply guy oaidná, ja maid ii oktage reply guy oainne!
De mo rehkenastit dás vejolašvuođa ahte muhtun reply guy oaidná muhtun čállosa?
Okta vuohki lea rehkenastit vejolašvuođa ahte ii OKTAGE reply guy oainne dan, ja de váldit dan vuostábeali.
5/n

Dal, go juohke reply guy oaidná 100 daid 900 čállosis, de juohke čállosis lea 1/9 vejolašvuohta ahte muhtun dihto reply guy oaidná dan, dahje 8/9 vejolašvuohta ahte dát dihto reply guy ii oainne dan. Vejolašvuohta ahte ii OKTAGE reply guy oainne dan lea nappo 8/9 juohke reply guy várás, ja jos váldit ahte dát vejolašvuođat leat iešheanalaččat, de dat mearkkaša ahte vejolašvuohta ahte ii oktage dan 10 reply guy:s oainne dan lea (8/9)^10, mii lea 0.30794....
6/n

Dát mearkkaša ahte vejolašvuohta juohke čállosa várás ahte unnimusat OKTA reply guy oaidná dan lea 1-(8/9)^10 dahje sullii 69%.
Dieđusge, jos muhtun čállá 10 čállosa beaivvis, de vejolašvuohta ahte son boahtá vuostá reply guy lea stuorát go dát, danne go dalle lea sáhka das ahte unnimusat okta su čállosiin oaidnojuvvo unnimusat ovtta reply guy:s!
Fas, jos váldit ahte juohke čállosa várás dát vejolašvuođat leat iešheanalaččat, de matematihkka lea dušše veahá komplikerejuvvon:
6/n

juohke čállosis lea (8/9)^10 vejolašvuohta ahte ii oaidnojuvvo, muhto jos háliidat vejolašvuođa ahte BUOT čállosat eai oaidnojuvvo, de dat ferte vel loktojuvvot seamma olbmo čállosiid loguin, mii lea 10, nappo (8/9)^100, ja vejolašvuohta ahte unnimusat OKTA ČÁLLOSA oaidná unnimusat OKTA reply guy lea 1 - (8/9)^100 = 0.99999233… mii ii leat 100%, muhto hui lahka dasa.
Dát lei 100 olbmo fierpmádaga dilli, mas 10 leat reply guy-t. Dahkat vel ovtta ovdamearkka ja de mannat oppalašvuhtii.
7/n

Váldde dal ahte fierpmádagas leat 100K geavaheaddji, ain seamma 10% reply guy-id mielde (90K dábálaš geavaheaddjit, 10K reply guy-t).
Juohke reply guy lohká ain 100 čállosa beaivvis, ja dábálaš geavaheaddjit ráhkadit ain 10 čállosa beaivvis.
Dát mearkkaša ahte ovtta beaivvis dábálaš geavaheaddjit ráhkadit 900K čállosa, ja juohke reply guy lohká 100 daid 900K čállosis!
Ain dan random-vuođđooaivila vuolde dát mearkkaša ahte okta reply guy oaidná dušše 100/900K čállosa!
8/n

Odne iđit, go ledjen vázzimin bargui, de jurddašii mu mielas okta ášši: sáhttágo leat nu ahte sivva manne #replyGuy-váttisvuohta orru bahábun #Mastodon:s (ja oppalaččat #Fediverse:s) lea dušše dan dihte ahte geavaheaddjit leat hui unnán?
Dan dihte ráhkadin ovttageardánis modealla geahččalit, leorigo dát okto čilget dán fenomena.
Váldde ahte, seammaláhkai go Mario Cipolla:s Basic Laws of Human Stupidity, reply guy-id oassi álbmogis lea addojuvvon konstánta ρ.

source_doc:
@JugglingWithEggs at least in my friend circle mobile phones not uncommon from early 90s, but they cost a *lot* to call from a landline (so if you were living at home your parents would discourage it), and until 1995-1999 were insecure, anyone with a radio scanner could (and often did) listen to them.
Whilst radio scanners were out of the price range of youths, many older folk had them, and until late 90s were often the kind of radio enthusiast who was a Tory bootlicker and supported the Police and other Establishment organisations, so you if discussing anything subversive on a mobile phone you risked being grassed up..
Ironically the tide turned by late 90s when scanners became affordable, and the Police were still on analogue radios 😁

@JugglingWithEggs by late 1990s everyone had a mobile phone and calls were cheaper (often with a good amount of free minutes) but SMS messages were unreliable and initially didn't even work across networks - people actually talked to each other on them!
One difference was access to physical spaces wasn't as heavily controlled as today - even though there was still CCTV and locals would call old bill on youths "hanging around", there was neither sufficient boots on the ground nor interconnected CCTV (a real security guard had to watch the footage locally, and property owners generally didn't want to pay for these folk at evenings and weekends.
There were also fewer cops on duty in outer suburbs during nights/weekends - they were all deployed into the town centres)

@vfrmedia
I remember texts sometimes taking hours to come through in the early noughties - so not always great for making on the fly arrangements.
Living in market town definitely meant less cctv and coppers back in 90’s. Remember difference when heading out into Bournemouth or Norwich of an evening. But young people having fun wasn’t frowned upon like it is now. My earlier post about facial recognition was about area where there has been uptick in teens just hanging out.
instruction: You are a professional Northern Sámi translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Northern Sámi (sme_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Northern Sámi grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Northern Sámi. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Northern Sámi translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Northern Sámi (sme_Latn):
hypo_0:
@JugglingWithEggs unnimusat mu ustibiid guovllus mátketelefovnnat eai lean mihkkege erenoamáš harvvit jo 90-logu álggus, muhto eatnigielas ringet sidjiide máksii *hirbmat olu* (nu ahte jus orui ruovttus, de váhnemat gal geahččalit du eastadit dan), ja gitta 1995–1999 rádjai dat eai lean sihkkarit, vaikko gii geas lei radioskánner sáhtii (ja dávjá dagai nu) gullat maid sii hupme.
Vaikke radioskánnerat ledje nuhorráid ovddas menddo divrras, de máŋga boarrásut olbmo ledje daid oastán, ja 90-logu maŋimuš beallái rádjai dat ledje dávjá dakkár rádiohálaideaddjit geat ledje Tory-báhccečalbmejeaddjit ja doarjjuhedje politiija ja eará ásahusorganisašuvnnaid, nu ahte jus hupmát mobilen birra juoidá vuosteháliideaddji, de lei várra ahte du fitnoduvvo..
Ironalaččat rievdadii dilli 90-logu maŋimuš bealis go skánnerat šadde olámuttus, ja politiijas ledje vel analogalaš rádiót 😁

@JugglingWithEggs 90-logu loahpas lei juohkehaččas mátketelefovdna ja ringenhaddi lei unnit (dávjá vel buori muddui nuvttá minuhtat mielde), muhto SMS-dieđut eai lean luohttámušas ja álggus eai doaimman vel iešguđet fierpmádagaid gaskkas - olbmot duođaid hupme guhtet guimmiideaset daiguin!
Okta erohus lei ahte beassama fysalaš sadjiide ii lean nu garra dárkkistuvvon go odne - vaikke lei vel CCTV ja báikkálaččat sáddet politiija nuorráide geat “dušše hengestalle”, de ii lean ollislaš mearrasat olgun barggus dahje oktii čatnasuvvon CCTV (duohta sihkkarvuođaguoddi ferte geahččat videomateriála báikkálaččat, ja opmodat eaiggádat oppalaččat eai háliidan máksit dakkár olbmuide eahkediid ja vahkkoloahpaid.
Maiddái lei uhcit politiijat barggus olggobeale guovlluin idjain/vahkkoloahpain - sii buohkat ledje bidjon gávpotguovddážiidda)

@vfrmedia
Mun muitan ahte teavsttat sáhttejedje muhtumin diimmuid geažes boahtit 2000-logu álggus - nu ahte dat eai lean álo nu buorit jus fertii jođánit soahpat juoidá.
Go orui márkángávpogas, de lei duođaid unnit cctv ja politiijat go 90-logus. Muitan erohusa go vulgen eahkedis Bournemouthii dahje Norwichii. Muhto nuorat geat vázzet suohtastallat eai lean nu bahás geahččojuvvon go dál. Mu ovddit posttas iežasnahttin birra lei guovllus gos lea lassánan ahte teiniijat dušše leat olgun hengašteamen.
hypo_1:
@JugglingWithEggs unnimusat mu ustibiguovllus mátketelefovnnat eai lean mihkkege erenoamáš harvvit juo 90-logu álggus, muhto eatnigielatelefovnnas ringet daidda máksii *hirbmat olu* (nu ahte jus orui vel ruovttus, de váhnemat dakkár dábálaččat eai suovvan dan), ja gitta 1995–1999 rádjai dat eai lean sihkkarit: juohkehaš geas lei radioskánner sáhtii, ja dávjá maid dagai, gullat maid doppe ságastalle.
Vaikke radioskánnerat ledje nuoraid ovddas menddo divrras, de máŋga boarrásut olbmo ledje daid oastán, ja 90-logu loahpageažis ledje dávjá dakkár rádioduohkkit geat ledje Toryid njálbmebáhcit ja doarjjuhedje politiija ja eará vuođđoásahusaid, nu ahte jus ságastalai mobilen birra juoidá vuostálas dahje “heaittihis” ášši, de lei várra ahte muhtin vásihii du politiijii..
Ironalaččat rievdadii dilli 90-logu loahpas, go skánnerat šadde heivvolaš hattiin, ja politiijas ledje vel analogalaš rádiót 😁

@JugglingWithEggs 90-logu loahpageažis lei juohkehaččas mátketelefovdna ja ringenhaddi lei vuollegut (dávjá vel bures ollu nuvttá minuhtat mielde), muhto SMS-dieđut eai lean luohttámušat, ja álggus eai doaimman vel fierpmádagaid gaskkas - olbmot duođaid hupme guhtet guimmiideaset daiguin!
Okta erohus lei dat ahte beassan fysalaš sajiide ii lean nu garrasit dárkkistuvvon go odne - vaikke lei vel CCTV ja báikkálaččat sáhtejit ringet politiijii nuoraid geažil geat “dušše ledje hengesteamen”, de ii lean piisán ollu politiijat olgun, ii ge oktii čatnasuvvon CCTV-vuogádat (duohta sihkkarvuođaguoddi ferte geahččat materiála báikkálaččat, ja opmodateaiggádat eai dábálaččat háliidan máksit dakkár olbmuide eahkediid ja vahkkoloahpaid.
Maiddái ledje uhcit politiijat barggus olggobeale ássanguovlluin idjain/vahkkoloahpain - sii buohkat ledje biddjojuvvon gávpotguovddážiidda)

@vfrmedia
Mun muitan ahte teavsttadieđut sáhttejedje muhtumin váldit diimmuid ovdal go bohte 2000-logu álggus - nu ahte dat eai lean álo nu buorit jus fertii jođánit soahpat juoidá.
Go orui márkángávpogas, de dat mearkkašii duođaid ahte lei unnit cctv ja unnit politiijat go 90-logus. Muitan maid erohusa go vulgen eahkedis Bournemouthii dahje Norwichii. Muhto nuorat geat ledje suohtastallame eai lean nu bahás geahččojuvvon go dál. Mu ovddit posttas ovdaneamahan birra lei guovllus gos lea lassánan teiniijaid dušše olgun hengesteapmi.
hypo_2:
@JugglingWithEggs unnimusat mu ustibeaivvis mátketelefovnnat eai lean mihkkege erenoamáš harvvit juo 90-logu álggus, muhto eatnigielatelefovnnas ringet daidda máksii *hirbmat olu* (nu ahte jus orui vel ruovttus, de váhnemat dábálaččat eai movttiidahtán dan), ja gitta 1995–1999 rádjai dat eai lean sihkkarit: juohkehaš geas lei radioskánner sáhtii, ja dávjá maid dagai, gullat maid olbmot daiguin hupme.
Vaikke radioskánnerat ledje nuoraid ovddas menddo divrras, de máŋga boarrásut olbmo ledje daid, ja 90-logu loahpageažis ledje dávjá dakkár rádioduohkkit geat ledje Toryid njálmmihit ja doarjjuhedje politiija ja eará vuođđoásahusaid, nu ahte jus ságastalai mobilen birra juoidá vuostálas dahje “heaittihis” ášši, de lei várra ahte muhtin vásihii du politiijii..
Ironalaččat rievdadii dilli 90-logu loahpas, go skánnerat šadde mávssolaččat, ja politiijas ledje vel analogalaš rádiót 😁

source_doc:
I expected to love Project Hail Mary, I LOVED Project Hail Mary, it also destroyed me in a particularly unique way as the wife of a science teacher after a year of watching all science teaching be relentlessly attacked and defunded. People love this movie, which I'm sure will be a success, and they hate my wife's work and destroy her programs and want us to lose our careers. How is it possible for all this to be true at once.

She left at 7am to go teach the hands on labs that she teaches where they handle cells, where they've increased class sizes and reduced TAs, she spends more contact hours with students in lab basements than any other class on the campus. She created a program for community college transfer students to get funded jobs in labs, opening up STEM pathways for those who never would've gotten the chance. For all her above and beyond work she's demonized as "doing DEI in science" which they call illegal

But you know, I guess if she were a white male software engineer writing fanfic about science teaching.... she'd be safe.

@grimalkina the same roots are already in Hail Mary tbh. I like Andy Weir a lot and I don't think he meant it, but the whole "bureaucracy and cooperation are truly the barrier to getting things done, and when shit hits the fan we get a powerful anti-bureaucrat to forego diplomacy and strongarm everyone into doing the project, ethics or what the participants want be damned" struck me as a very American individualism power fantasy, and I would guess an American wrote it if I didn't know

@jcachada @grimalkina
For what it's worth, the book contains this passage that didn't make it to the movie.
---
“I’m curious,” I say to Stratt. “Once we launch Hail Mary. What will you do then?”
“Me?” she said. “Doesn’t matter. Once the Hail Mary launches, my authority ends. I’ll probably be put on trial by a bunch of pissed-off governments for abuse of power. Might spend the rest of my life in jail.”
“I’ll be in the cell next to you,” said Leclerc.
“Are you at all concerned about that?”
She shrugged. “We all have to make sacrifices. If I have to be the world’s whipping boy to secure our salvation, then that’s my sacrifice to make.”
---
Is she better or worse if she thinks she's sacrificing herself?

hypo_0:
Mun vuorddán ahte ráhkistan Project Hail Mary, mun RÁHKISTAN Project Hail Mary, ja dat maid duođas dahkkái mu iežan láhkai go leat luonddudiehtooahpaheaddji áhčči maŋŋel jagi gos buot luonddudiehtooahpahus lea álo rievdaduvvon vuostálastin- ja ruhtaváilevuođain. Olbmot ráhkistit dán filmma, mii mun lean sihkar ahte lihkostuvvá, ja sii vaššejit mu áhčči barggu ja bilidit su prográmmaid ja háliidit ahte mii massit bargguidamet. Mo lea vejolaš ahte buot dát sáhttá leat duohta seamma áigái.

Son vulggii diibmu 7 iđđes oahpahit daid praktihkalaš laboratoriabargguid maid son oahpaha, gos sii gieđahit sellaid, gos luohkkásturrodagaid leat stuoriduvvon ja assistenttaid unnituvvon, son geavaha eanet oktavuohtaáiggi studeanttaiguin laboratoriabáikái vuolábealde go makkárge eará luohkká kampusas. Son ráhkadii prográmma servodatallaskuvlla sirdásolbmuide vai sii ožžot ruhtaduvvon bargguid laboratoriain, rahpemin STEM-geainnuide daidda geat eai goassege livčče ožžon vejolašvuođa. Buot su badjel ja badjel barggu ovddas son demoniserejuvvo dego “dahká DEI luonddudieđas” maid sii gohčodit lobiheapmin

Muhto diehtátgo, jurddašan ahte jos son livččii vilges olmmái software-insenevrrra čállimin fanfihka luonddudiehtooahpahusa birra.... de son livččii dorvvolis.

“Mun lean beroštuvvan,” dadjan mun Strattii. “Go mii lea Hail Mary bidjan johtui. Maid don de dahkat?”
“Mun?” son dadjá. “Ii leat mávssolaš. Go Hail Mary johtui biddjojuvvo, de mu váldi nohká. Dáidduhan ahte mu biddjojit suodjalit suotnjarráđđehusaid ovddas geat leat suhttan váldeváikkuheami geavaheamis. Sáhtán veahkehit eallinvuostá jeavddalašvuođas.”
“Mun lean sellas du bálddas,” dadjá Leclerc.
“Leatgo don olles beroštuvvan dan birra?”
Son geigii geažis. “Mii buohkat fertejit dahkat áldagasaid. Jos mun fertejin leat máilmmi cábmanolmmái vai mii oažžut beassat, de dat lea mu áldagas.”

Doppes leat lassánan luohkásturrodagat ja unniduvvon oahpahusveahkkit, ja son geavaha eanet oktavuođaáiggi studeanttaiguin laboratoriijaid vuolábealde go oktage eará kurssa olles kampusas. Son ráhkadii prográmma servodatskuvllas bohtosii sirdásstudeanttaide, vai sii besset oažžut ruhtaduvvon bargguid laboratoriijain, ja rahpá STEM-bálgáid daidda geat eai livčče muđui goassege ožžon dan vejolašvuođa. Ja buot dan ovddas maid son lea dahkan badjel dan maid son galggašii, son duššojuvvo dainna ahte son lea “dahkamin DEI:a luonddudieđas”, maid sii gohčodit lobálašvuođavasttálažžan

Muhto diehtát go, arválan ahte jos son livččii vilges dievvaolmmoš software-insenevra čállimin fanfihka luonddudiehtooahpahusa birra.... de son livččii dorvvolis.

@grimalkina seamma vuođut leat juo Hail Mary:s, tbh. Mun liikon Andy Weirii hui ollu, ja in jáhke ahte son dat áiggošii, muhto olles dat jurdda ahte “byrokratiija ja ovttasbargu leat duođaid dat mii hehtte áššiid čađaheami, ja go buot mana heajut, de mii oažžut fámolaš anti-byrokráhta guhte guođđá diplomatiija ja bággá buohkaid searvat projektii, olis etihkka dahje dat maid oassálastit háliidit mannan ge” čuohcái mu dego hui amerikálaš indiviidalašvuođa fápmofantasiija, ja jos in diehtáš, de mun arvvoštallin ahte amerikálaš olmmoš lea dan čállán

@jcachada @grimalkina
Jos das lea makkárge mearkkašupmi, de girjjis lea dát oassi mii ii bohtán filmii.
---
“Mun lean beroštuvvan,” dadjan mun Strattii. “Go mii leat Hail Mary bidjan johtui. Maid don de dahkat?”
“Mun?” son dadjá. “Ii leat dehálaš. Go Hail Mary biddjojuvvo johtui, de mu váldi nohká. Dáiddán ahte mu biddjojit duopmostuolu ovddas máŋgga suhttaduvvan ráđđehusa beales váldeváikkuheami boasttogeavaheami dihte. Sáhttá leat ahte geavahan eará eallima mu giddagas.”
“Mun lean sellas du bálddas,” dadjá Leclerc.
“Leatgo don ollenge beroštuvvan dan birra?”
Son geahččalii árvitkeahttá. “Mii buohkat fertejit áldagasaid dahkat. Jos mun ferten leat máilmmi verrojuvvon olmmoš vai mii sihkkarastit iežamet beahttejeami, de dat lea mu áldagas.”
---

source_doc:
US bound Thompson stars as Galway reach FBD final

California-bound Matthew Thompson lashed home 2-06 as Galway overcame Leitrim by 11 points in Tuam to book their spot in next week's FBD League decider.

2025 Young Footballer of the Year nominee Thompson will be out of action for the entirety of the league and the early part of the championship, with Padraic Joyce confirming that the Salthill-Knocknacarra players is studying in Berkeley for the upcoming semester.

He was the leading figure on a largely experimental Galway side - which also contained Cian Hernon and Kieran Molloy - as they came from three points down at half-time to beat Leitrim.

Thompson buried a goal in the top corner in the first half but the Connacht champions trailed Leitrim at the break, Killian Gaffney proving effective from placed balls, while Ryan O'Rourke and Jack Kelly also landed points.

Galway manager Padraic Joyce remonstrates with the referee over a decision

However, with Thompson converting a second half penalty, Galway eased home after the interval, with 10 different scorers overall as they ran out 2-19 to 0-14 winners.

After two rounds of the FBD League, the top two progress to next week's final, with Galway facing the winner of tomorrow's Roscommon-Mayo tie.

In Leinster, Westmeath have booked their spot in the O'Byrne Cup final after an 11-point win over Offaly in a goal-fest in Mullingar.

Waiting for them in the decider is a Kildare outfit that defeated Dublin 1-22 to 1-13.

Mark McHugh's Westmeath side advanced ahead of reigning champions Longford following a coin toss last Saturday but they impressed on the field of play on Saturday.

A brace of goals apiece from Danny McCarton and Brandon Kelly, plus another from Senan Baker, saw them run out 5-10 to 2-08 winners.

Ciaran Murphy scored two goals either side of half-time to pull the visitors back into the contest, the margin being briefly reduced to three points 11 minutes into the second half.

However, an unanswered burst of 3-02 over the next 15 minutes saw the hosts settle the contest in an emphatic manner.

Kildare found their feet in the second half against Dublin and now are one game away from a first O'Byrne Cup since 2014.

Harry O'Neill fires to the net for Kildare

Both management teams experimented in Newbridge with Dublin in particular shorn of overly familiar faces, but in the first half it seemed to matter little as they led 1-08 to 0-08 at the break.

Jamie McCarville palmed home their goal but it was Clyde Burke who caught the eye for the travelling support with some brilliant shooting that included two orange flags - the second of which was of the highest quality.

Alex Beirne was racking up the scores for the Lilywhites though and his two-point free early in the second half kick-started a run of 1-05 without reply, Harry O'Neill with the goal in the 43rd minute.

Kildare continued to turn the screw with James Harris' late two-pointer sending them on their way.

hypo_0:
Thompson, gii lea mannámin USA:i, čuovvuin čuovvui go Galway beasai FBD-finalii

Matthew Thompson, guhte lea mannámin Californii, skoraidii 2-06 go Galway vuoitii Leitrimii 11 čuoggáin Tuamis ja sihkkarasttii saji su boahtte vahku FBD-lihka mearrideaddji spealus.

2025 jagi nuoraid buoremus jalkaspálli ávvudusa evttohuvvon Thompson ii spealá lihka olles áigodaga eaige maid čempionáhta álgooasi, go Padraic Joyce nanne ahte Salthill-Knocknacarra-spealli studere Berkeley:s boahtte semeasteris.

Son lei ovddasteaddji olbmo stuorra oasi geahččalansurggiide huksejuvvon Galway-liiddus – mas leat maiddái Cian Hernon ja Kieran Molloy – go sii jorggihit spealu golbma čuoggá duohken bealleáiggi maŋŋel ja vuoitit Leitrimii.

Thompson čuohppii vuosttaš bealis mánus goalu alimus guovllu, muhto Connacht-measterat ledje boatkkas Leitrimis bealleáiggi nohkanis, go Killian Gaffney lei dohkkehahtti bidjonspárttain, ja Ryan O'Rourke sekä Jack Kelly maid čohkkejedje čuoggáid.

Galway-hoavda Padraic Joyce váidalit duopmáriin mearrádusa geažil

Muhto go Thompson skoraidii nuppi beale rihkusdákka, de Galway geahpedettiin jođihii ruoktot bealleáiggi maŋŋel, ja ollislaččat logi iešguđet skoraideaddji veahkehedje sii vuoittahit 2-19 vuostá 0-14.

FBD-lihka guovtti vuoru maŋŋel guovtte bajimus joavkku joatkit boahtte vahku finalii, gos Galway deaivvada ihttin Roscommon-Mayo spealu vuoitejin.

Leinsteris lea Westmeath sihkkarastan saji O'Byrne Cup finalis 11 čuoggá vuoittuin Offaly badjel máŋgga goaluin Mullingaris.

Mearrideaddji spealus vuordá sin Kildare-joavku, mii vuoitii Dublina 1-22 vuostá 1-13.

Mark McHugh Westmeath-joavku beasai ovddos guovddu measter Longford ovddabealde maŋŋel ruđaskruvnniduvvama mannan lauvvardaga, muhto sii čájehedje buori barggu girdiin dán lauvvardaga.

Dánny McCarton ja Brandon Kelly guđege guokte goalu, ja vel okta goalu Senan Bakeris, veahkehedje sii čuožžilit vuoitejin 5-10 vuostá 2-08.

Ciaran Murphy skoraidii guokte goalu bealleáiggi guovtte bealde ja dat buktii guossiid ruovttoluotta gilkui, go erohus oaniduvvui oanehaččat golmma čuoggái 11 minuhta nuppi beale álggus.

Muhto 15 čuovvovaš minuhta geažil 3-02 vástádusa haga dagahii ruovttuluottajoavku mearridit spealu čielga vuogi mielde.

Kildare gávnnahii ritni nuppi bealis Dublin vuostá ja lea dál dušše okta speallu eret vuosttaš O'Byrne Cupas jagi 2014 rájes.

Harry O'Neill čuohppá pallo fierpmádahkii Kildare ovddas

Goappašat hoavddajoavkkut geahččaledje Newbridge:s, ja erenoamážit Dublinis váiluhedje ollu dábálaš namaid, muhto vuosttaš bealis dat ii orron máksit mihkkege go sii jođihe 1-08 vuostá 0-08 bealleáiggi nohkanis.

Jamie McCarville láigui sin goalu ruoktot, muhto Clyde Burke govvidii eatnigiid mátkki fánuid mielaštusaid čábbát skoraideamiin, mas ledje maiddái guokte guovtti čuoggá skori – ja maŋimuš dain lei erenoamáš buorre.

Alex Beirne čohkkehii čuoggáid Lilywhites-joavkui, áfacha, ja su guovtti čuoggá friispeallu nuppi beale álggus álggahii 1-05 ráiddu vástádusa haga, Harry O'Neill skoraideamen goalu 43. minuhtas.

Kildare joatkkai deaddilit vuosttáldaga, go James Harris maŋit guovtti čuoggá skori buktihii sin ovddos.

Ciaran Murphy skoraidii guokte goalu, okta ovdal bealleáiggi ja okta dan maŋŋel, ja dat veahkehii guossiid ruovttoluotta gilvui; erohus unniduvvui oanehaččat golmma čuoggái 11 minuhta nuppi bealis.

Muhto čuovvovaš 15 minuhta sisa skoraidedje ruovttoluottat 3-02 vástádusa haga, ja danin sii mearridedje spealu čielgasit.

Kildare oaččui buoret doaibmama nuppi bealis Dublin vuostá, ja dál lea dušše okta speallu eret vuosttaš O'Byrne Cupas jagi 2014 rájes.

Harry O'Neill skoraida fierpmádahkii Kildare ovddas

Goappašat hoavddajoavkkut geahččaledje Newbridge:s iešguđetlágan čoahkkádusaid, ja erenoamážit Dublinis váiluhedje máŋga dábálaš nama, muhto vuosttaš bealis dat ii orron stuorra mearkkašumis go sii jođihe bealleáiggi loahpas 1-08 vuostá 0-08.

Jamie McCarville bálbii sin goalu ruoktot, muhto Clyde Burke geasuhii mátkki doarjjuid fuomášumi čábbát skoraideamiin, masa gulle maiddái guokte guovtti čuoggá skori – maŋimuš dain lei erenoamáš buorre kvalitehta.

Alex Beirne čohkkehii gal čuoggáid Lilywhites-joavkui, ja su guovtti čuoggá friispeallu nuppi beale álggus álggahii 1-05 ráiddu vástádusa haga; Harry O'Neill skoraidii goalu 43. minuhtas.

Kildare joatkkai vel garrasit deaddilit vuosttáldaga, go James Harris maŋit guovtti čuoggá skori addii sidjiide vel eanet fárttu.

USA:i vuolgi Thompson čuovvola, go Galway beassá FBD-finalii

Californiai vuolgi Matthew Thompson skoraidii 2-06, go Galway vuoitii Leitrima 11 čuoggáin Tuamis ja sihkkarasttii saji boahtte vahku FBD League-finalas.

Thompson, guhte lea evttohuvvon 2025 jagi nuorra jalkaspálli bálkkašupmái, ii galgga speallat olles liigga áigge eaige čempionáhta álgooasis, go Padraic Joyce nanne ahte Salthill-Knocknacarra-spiller oahppá Berkeley:s boahtte semeasteris.

Son lei ovddemus figuvra eanet geahččaleaddji Galway-joavkkus – mas ledje maiddái Cian Hernon ja Kieran Molloy – go sii geasuidedje iežaset golmma čuoggá duohken bealleáiggis ja vuoite Leitrima.

Thompson skoraidii vuosttaš bealis goalu alimus čiegahkii, muhto Connacht-measterat ledje bealleáiggi loahpas Leitrima maŋis; Killian Gaffney čájehii buori beaktilvuođa bidjonspárttain, ja Ryan O'Rourke ja Jack Kelly lasiheigga maid čuoggáid.

Galway-hoavda Padraic Joyce váidal duopmáriin mearrádusa geažil

Muhto go Thompson čađahii rihkusdákka nuppi bealis, de Galway válddii spealu iežas háldui bealleáiggi maŋŋel, ja go oppalaččat 10 iešguđet skoraideaddji ledje mielde, sii vuoite loahpas 2-19 vuostá 0-14.

Guovtti FBD League-vuoru maŋŋel beassaba guovtte buoremusat joavkkut boahtte vahku finalii, ja Galway deaivvada doppe ihttin Roscommon-Mayo-spealu vuoitejiin.

Muhto čuovvovaš 15 minuhta sisa skoraidedje ruovttoluottat 3-02 vástádusa haga, ja danin sii mearridedje spealu čielgasit ja nannosit.

Kildare oaččui buoret doaibmama nuppi bealis Dublin vuostá, ja dál lea dušše okta speallu eret vuosttaš O'Byrne Cupas jagi 2014 rájes.

Harry O'Neill skoraida fierpmádahkii Kildare ovddas
